Haulla, a smart waste collection service by Ecube Labs, operates in major U.S. markets including Dallas, Houston, Austin, Denver, and Chicago — with plans for further expansion across North America. We help small and mid-sized businesses across the U.S. find better, more affordable waste solutions.



What You'll Do

The Quality Assurance (QA) Specialist is responsible for ensuring that all sales processes, documentation, and service agreements adhere to the company's quality standards and compliance regulations.



What We're Looking for

- This is a full-time remote position. This is NOT a part-time position.

title: CapCut Video Editor for Meme Reels (Long-Term, Daily Work)
description:
Job Type: Part-time to Full-time (long-term)

Rate: Please quote (paid trial first)

Start: ASAP



Overview

I’m hiring a dependable CapCut editor for simple 
-style short-form edits. This is repetitive, template-based work with high volume. First step is a paid trial of 3 reels. I will provide a short tutorial and exact style guidelines.



What you’ll do (CapCut)



Import clip and format to our dimensions



Reframe and split scenes to keep the important subject centered



Add captions/text (clean, readable, consistent)



Add watermark



Export with the correct settings and deliver files neatly



Trial (Paid)



3 reels



I provide: tutorial, clips, text rules, watermark assets, export settings



If the trial is clean, this becomes ongoing daily work



Requirements



Strong CapCut skills and fast turnaround



Can match a tutorial and follow a template exactly



Good caption timing and basic pacing instincts



Reliable daily availability and quick communication



Stable internet and ability to deliver files consistently



Nice to have



Experience editing 
 pages / short-form content (Reels/TikTok/Shorts)



Experience with high-volume output



How to apply

Reply with:



Your rate for the paid 3-reel trial



Your rate for ongoing work (per reel or per day for 20 to 30/day)



Turnaround time for the 3-reel trial



Your timezone and daily availability



Note

This is long-term work for the right person. Consistency and reliability matter more than flashy editing.

title: Personal Virtual Assistant – Calendar, Communication & Life Organisation
description:
Hi,



I am looking for a reliable and organised Virtual Personal Assistant to help manage personal administration and life logistics.



This role supports a busy professional managing work, family life, and children’s school and sports schedules. The goal is to help keep everything organised so that days run smoothly and important tasks stay on track.



I am looking for someone who enjoys creating systems, organising schedules, and bringing clarity to busy lives.



This is intended to be a long-term role if the partnership works well.



Approximately 5 hours per week, structured as:



• 1 hour per day

• 5 days per week



The goal is to provide daily support with organisation and coordination, rather than occasional large projects.



There is flexibility on the exact time of day, but the assistant should be able to check tasks and respond each weekday.



Onboarding period:

During the first week, the successful assistant may be asked to complete an additional 10 hours of work to help organise systems and catch up on existing tasks. After onboarding, the role returns to the regular 5 hours per week schedule.



Core Responsibilities



Calendar management using Google Calendar



• managing appointments and events

• organising children’s school and sports schedules

• tracking recurring reminders

• keeping the calendar organised and up to date



Communication and inbox support



• drafting replies to
s and messages

• coordinating appointments and catch-ups

• monitoring inboxes when needed



Task and project organisation using Trello



• maintaining organised task lists

• tracking life administration and reminders

• helping keep projects organised.



Examples of tasks this role may include:



• managing Google Calendar events

• organising children’s school and sport schedules

• coordinating appointments and bookings

• monitoring and responding to HomeExchange enquiries

• assisting with Airbnb guest communication and reviews

• organising reminders for bills and payments

• helping gather documents and reminders for tax preparation

• researching travel options and building itineraries

• researching local events, places to visit and activities

• helping plan birthday parties or family events

• organising small projects such as home or garden improvements.



Helpful Skills (Bonus)



Experience with any of the following is helpful:



• Canva

• travel planning

• event planning

• research and itinerary building.



Skills & Qualities



I am looking for someone who is:



• organised and detail-oriented

• proactive and able to suggest ideas

• calm, reliable and professional

• excellent written English

• comfortable coordinating schedules and tasks.



Tools



• Google Calendar

• Google Docs / Google Sheets

• Trello or similar task management tools

• messaging platforms such as WhatsApp.



Please include your timezone and your typical working hours when applying.



Confidentiality

This role involves personal information, so professionalism and confidentiality are essential.



To Apply, please include:



A short introduction about your experience as a Virtual Assistant



Your hourly rate

Your timezone and typical working hours

In 3–4 sentences, describe how you would organise a busy calendar with many activities and reminders

Start your application with the word Adventure so I know you read the full job description.



If the role works well, there is potential for additional hours and long-term collaboration.



Please include your current timezone and typical working hours when applying.



This role supports a client based in New Zealand (NZ time zone), so awareness of this timezone and the ability to check tasks daily is important.

title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter (US Market) – Remote – $3–$5/hr + Bonuses
description:
We are a fast-growing U.S. financial services company looking for motivated cold callers / appointment setters to join our remote team.



Your role is simple: call leads, qualify them, and transfer interested prospects to our senior specialists.



This is a long-term opportunity for someone who is reliable, confident on the phone, and comfortable speaking with U.S. consumers.



Pay Structure



• $3–$5 per hour (depending on experience)

• $5-10 bonus for every qualified live transfer

• Performance bonuses available for top performers

• Weekly pay



Top callers regularly earn significantly more through bonuses.



What You’ll Do



• Call U.S. leads using our dialer system

• Follow a simple script to start conversations

• Ask a few qualification questions

• Transfer qualified prospects to our closing team

• Update call notes in the CRM



Requirements



• Strong spoken English

• Confident and comfortable speaking with Americans

• Experience in cold calling, telemarketing, or appointment setting preferred

• Reliable internet (minimum 20 Mbps)

• Quiet workspace and good headset

• Available to work U.S. business hours



What We Provide



• Dialer and CRM system

• Call scripts and training

• Lead lists provided

• Supportive team environment

• Long-term consistent work for the right person



Who This Is Perfect For



• Experienced cold callers

• Telemarketers who enjoy performance bonuses

• Self-motivated remote workers who want steady work



If you are confident on the phone and ready to work, apply with:



A short introduction about your calling experience



Your internet speed test screenshot



A 1-minute voice recording introducing yourself



Applicants with cold calling experience will be prioritized.

title: Video Content Creator
description:
Video Content Creator



Part-Time Position — eCommerce & Social Media (Full Time is an option after trial period)



We are looking for a creative, resourceful, and committed Video Content Creator*to join a growing e-commerce company focused on developing innovative products that solve everyday problems.



This role is centered around creating engaging video content for social media platforms including Instagram, TikTok,
, and YouTube Shorts. The ideal candidate will have an intuitive understanding of visual storytelling, product marketing, and modern AI-assisted content creation tools.



This individual will work directly with the CEO and help transform ideas, raw footage, images, and product concepts into compelling short-form video content designed to educate, entertain, and convert viewers into customers.



The ideal candidate enjoys experimenting with new tools, understanding trends, and finding creative ways to showcase products through video.



---



Core Responsibilities



The primary responsibilities for the Video Content Creator include the following tasks, listed in order of priority.



---



Video Content Creation & Editing (Primary Responsibility)



The Video Content Creator will be responsible for producing short-form video content for social media and digital marketing channels.



This includes:



* Editing raw video footage into engaging short-form content

* Creating videos from existing images, product footage, and lifestyle media

* Utilizing AI tools to generate, enhance, or assist with video creation

* Producing vertical videos optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels,
, and YouTube Shorts

* Adding text overlays, captions, sound effects, music, and transitions

* Developing videos that clearly communicate product benefits and use cases

* Creating content designed to hook viewers within the first few seconds



The goal is to consistently produce authentic, engaging, and informative video content that tells a clear product story.



---



AI-Assisted Video Development



The right candidate will be comfortable working with modern AI creative tools to enhance productivity and creativity.



Examples may include:



* AI video generation tools

* AI voiceovers

* AI scripting assistance

* AI image-to-video tools

* Automated captioning and subtitle generation

* AI-assisted editing workflows



We are looking for someone who enjoys experimenting with emerging technology and integrating it into creative workflows.



---



Product Storytelling & Concept Development



A key part of this role is understanding how to communicate the story and benefit of a product visually.



This includes:



* Reviewing product features and identifying the most compelling customer benefits

* Creating short video concepts that highlight real-world use

* Developing simple storyboards or outlines for videos

* Understanding the differences between educational, entertaining, and promotional content



The goal is to create videos that demonstrate the product solving a real problem.



---



Social Media Content Development



The Video Content Creator will assist with the development of social media content across multiple platforms.



Responsibilities include:



* Producing a steady flow of short-form video content

* Helping test different creative formats and messaging

* Adapting videos for different social platforms

* Creating multiple variations of successful content



We are looking for someone who understands how to capture attention and encourage engagement on social platforms.



---



Secondary Responsibilities



Depending on skill level and interests, additional tasks may include:



* Assisting with image and video assets used in Amazon listings

* Creating videos for product pages and website content

* Helping organize creative assets and media files

* Contributing ideas for future video campaigns or product storytelling

* Assisting with development of longer-form videos or product demonstrations



---



Experience / Competencies



The ideal candidate will have experience or familiarity with the following:



* Video editing software (CapCut, Adobe Premiere, Final Cut, or similar)

* Creating content for TikTok, Instagram Reels, or YouTube Shorts

* AI creative tools for video, image, or audio generation

* Basic understanding of visual storytelling and product marketing

* Experience working with Canva or similar design tools

* Ability to organize files and manage creative assets

* Strong communication and willingness to collaborate



Additional assets include:



* Experience working with e-commerce brands

* Experience creating product videos

* Familiarity with Amazon or Shopify content

* Experience with Photoshop or Illustrator

* Understanding of social media trends and viral formats



---



What We Are Looking For



The right individual for this position will be:



* Creative and visually intuitive

* Comfortable experimenting with new tools and ideas

* Organized and able to manage multiple creative projects

* Interested in product storytelling and problem-solving products

* Excited about helping build a growing brand



This person should be able to follow clear guidelines when needed, while also feeling comfortable contributing their own creative ideas and approaches to improve content and workflow.



Over time, the candidate may also help develop standard operating procedures (SOPs) for video creation and content production workflows.



---



Work Environment



* Part-time role

* Work directly with the CEO and product development team

* Opportunity to grow with a rapidly expanding e-commerce brand



---



If you enjoy creating engaging video content, experimenting with AI tools, and telling compelling product stories, we would love to hear from you.

title: Proposal Writer – EHS Compliance Services
description:
***Please submit your application through the following link: 
=



About CDMS 



CDMS (Chemical Data Management Systems) is a California-based Environmental Health & Safety consulting firm with over 35 years of experience helping industrial facilities comply with federal, state, and local regulations. With offices in Dublin and Long Beach, we serve hundreds of manufacturing, distribution, and other industrial clients throughout California, providing comprehensive EHS compliance services including Air Quality permitting, Hazardous Materials management, Storm Water compliance, Wastewater management, and OSHA safety support. 



The Role 



We're seeking a Proposal Writer with 2-5 years of environmental or safety compliance experience to join our remote team. This role combines technical knowledge with strong writing skills to create compelling proposals for California businesses. You'll handle routine client conversations and proposal development independently, while collaborating with senior consultants on complex projects and long-term contracts. 



This is a technical role that requires understanding environmental compliance and California regulations. You'll have direct client interactions for routine proposals—answering questions, clarifying scope, and presenting services. For larger opportunities and complex regulatory projects, you'll work alongside our senior sales team to develop comprehensive proposals. Success requires technical competence, excellent communication skills, and the ability to build client relationships through clear, professional interactions. 



Work Schedule & Compensation 



Full-time: 8 hours/day, 40 hours/week 



Work shift: Pacific Standard Time (PST) 



Benefits: 10 days PTO + 5 sick days annually 



What You'll Do 



Conduct client conversations for routine proposals including discovery calls, scope clarification, and follow-up discussions 



Write clear, technically accurate proposals for CDMS services including air quality permitting, hazardous materials management, stormwater compliance, and safety consulting 



Handle routine client inquiries and proposal requests independently from initial contact through submission 



Collaborate with senior sales consultants on complex proposals, long-term contracts, and strategic client opportunities 



Research California environmental regulations (EPA, DTSC, CUPAs, Water Boards, Air Districts) to support accurate proposal content 



Draft professional client communications including
s, follow-up letters, and service agreements 



Present CDMS services and capabilities to prospective clients during routine sales conversations 



Coordinate with technical staff to gather project details, timelines, and pricing information for proposals 



Maintain proposal templates and standard language library for efficient proposal development 



Track proposal submissions, follow up on pending opportunities, and manage client communication timeline 



Update and maintain client database and proposal tracking systems 



Learn California compliance requirements and CDMS service offerings to improve proposal quality and client conversations over time 



What You Bring 



2-5 years of experience in environmental consulting, safety compliance, or EHS operations 



Bachelor's degree in Environmental Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Environmental Science, Safety Management, or related technical field (required) 



Technical background in environmental or safety compliance (experience with permits, audits, or regulatory documentation) 



Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English (professional business level required) 



Strong ability to understand and explain technical regulatory concepts to clients 



Experience writing technical proposals, reports, or regulatory documentation 



Comfortable conducting client conversations and answering technical questions 



Exceptional attention to detail and ability to produce accurate, professional documents 



Ability to work independently on routine proposals while knowing when to involve senior team 



Knowledge of environmental regulations (California regulations a plus) 



Proficiency with Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) 



Experience working with US-based clients highly valued 



Self-motivated with strong organizational and time management skills 



Able to manage multiple proposal deadlines and client conversations simultaneously 



Why Work With Us 



Opportunity to develop expertise in California environmental compliance while building your technical writing career 



Work directly with experienced EHS consultants and learn from senior tea
mbers 



Hybrid remote work arrangement with flexible scheduling within PST business hours 



Collegial, supportive team environment that values clear communication and continuous learning 



Make meaningful contributions that help California companies protect their employees and the environment 



Professional development opportunities to grow your technical knowledge and writing skills 



CDMS is committed to building a diverse and inclusive workplace. We are an Equal Opportunity Employer. 



How to Apply 



***Please submit your application through the following link: 
=

title: Automation Specialist
description:
Who We Are



Founded in 2016 here in San Diego, Jumper Media helps local businesses get the visibility they deserve. Our mission is to deliver 10x more value than expected — with high energy, curiosity, and genuine care for the people we serve.



We specialize in helping small businesses dominate the Google Map Pack — those top 3 listings that drive calls, foot traffic, and revenue. From restaurants and med spas to plumbers, attorneys, and coffee shops — we’ve helped thousands of business owners grow their local presence and attract more customers.



It’s likely you’ve already visited at least one of our clients this month.



We’re scaling fast and we’re looking for community-minded, driven sales reps to represent Jumper Media on the ground in San Diego.



The Role: Automation Specialist



We are seeking a versatile Automation Specialist to focus on developing scalable automation solutions that incorporate programming, low-code platforms, chatbots, and Voice AI technologies. This role will primarily involve building and maintaining systems that reduce manual intervention and improve efficiency across our business operations.



What We’re Looking For:



As an Automation Specialist at Jumper Media, you will be responsible for designing, implementing, and maintaining automated workflows using n8n and Retool. Your expertise will play a pivotal role in improving productivity, enhancing data accuracy, and accelerating various business processes through both automation and internal tool development.



Specialty A:



n8n workflow development

Retool internal tool and dashboard development

 automation systems

Lifecycle marketing automation

Analytics setup, tracking, and reporting



Specialty B:



Programming and custom scripting

Low-code development solutions (including Retool)

AI Chatbot development

Reverse ETL, SQL, and Data Warehousing

Customer IO Data Pipeline



You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify automation opportunities, build internal tools and dashboards in Retool, customize workflows, and ensure seamless integration between different tools and systems. This role also includes advanced automation development, lifecycle marketing automation, analytics tracking, AI-powered solutions, and internal operations tool building.



Responsibilities:



Design, configure, and customize automated workflows using Zapier, Make, and n8n to connect various apps and tools

Build internal tools, dashboards, and admin panels using Retool

Develop and optimize
 and lifecycle automation systems using Customer IO

Develop and integrate analytics tracking systems for performance measurement

Ensure smooth integration between different platforms, databases, APIs, and software applications

Analyze existing workflows, identify bottlenecks, and recommend improvements to optimize efficiency and accuracy

Develop low-code and custom-coded automation solutions when required

Build and deploy chatbots and AI chatbots to streamline operations

Thoroughly test automated workflows and Retool applications to ensure they function as intended, and troubleshoot and resolve any issues

Create comprehensive documentation of workflows and internal tools, including setup instructions and troubleshooting guides

Monitor automated processes and internal tools, proactively address errors, and perform necessary updates and maintenance



Qualifications/Skills:



3+ years of professional experience as an Automation Specialist or similar role

Proven expertise in n8n, and Retool (including Make and Zapier)

Experience building internal tools, dashboards, or admin systems using Retool

Strong understanding of
 automation and lifecycle marketing systems

Experience with analytics implementation and performance tracking

Programming knowledge and experience in low-code development environments

Solid understanding of API integrations, data mapping, and transformation processes

Excellent communication skills to collaborate with both technical and non-technical tea
mbers

Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects simultaneously

Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail



About Jumper Media

Welcome to Jumper Media! We are a dynamic and innovative digital marketing agency specializing in social media management and growth strategies. We help businesses and individuals harness the power of social media platforms to build their brands, engage their audiences, and achieve exceptional results.



How to Apply



Does this role sound like a good fit? Submit your resume to 
 along with the answers to the following questions below.



Is your experience and qualifications matches Specialty A or B?

Do you have experience using n8n and Retool?

What is your expected salary?

Are you able to work the graveyard shift (Pacific Standard Time?

Are you comfortable using Time Doctor?



Thank you!

title: Shopify Store Operator - Supplement Brand (DTC Expansion)
description:
About Us

We run a growing supplement brand currently selling on Amazon. After a successful launch on the marketplace, we're ready to expand into direct-to-consumer through Shopify. We're looking for an experienced Shopify operator to own this channel from the ground up.



The Role

This is an ownership-level position. You'll be responsible for building, managing, and scaling a high-converting single-product Shopify store for our supplement brand. You'll handle everything from the initial buildout through ongoing operations, advertising, and customer experience.



This is not a one-off project. The long-term vision is for this to become a full DTC operation with a team built under you as we scale.



What You'll Own

Store Build & Design

Design and launch a clean, high-converting single-product Shopify store

Optimize the storefront for conversions, mobile experience, and brand consistency



Fulfillment & Integrations

Set up and manage fulfillment through Amazon Merchant Fulfilled Network (MFN)

Connect all necessary integrations between Shopify and our existing Amazon operations



Advertising & Growth

Build and manage Google Shopping and Google Ads campaigns to drive traffic and sales

Optimize ad spend for profitability and scale winning campaigns over time



Operations & Customer Service

Handle day-to-day store operations including order management, returns, and customer inquiries

Monitor store performance and report on key metrics (revenue, ROAS, margin, etc.)



Scaling & Team Building

As the store grows, you'll help build out a small team under you to support operations

Continuously identify opportunities to improve conversion rates, expand product offerings, and grow the channel





Proven experience building and scaling Shopify stores (portfolio or case studies preferred)

Hands-on experience running Google Shopping and Google Ads campaigns profitably

Familiarity with Amazon MFN fulfillment or similar multi-channel fulfillment setups

Experience in the supplement, health, or wellness niche is a strong plus

Strong understanding of DTC metrics: CAC, LTV, ROAS, AOV, conversion rate

Self-starter who can operate independently with minimal oversight

Clear communicator who provides regular updates and reporting



To Apply

Please include:



A brief overview of Shopify stores you've built or managed (links appreciated)

Your experience with Google Shopping/Ads, including any performance metrics you can share

Any experience with supplement or health/wellness brands

Your availability and preferred engagement structure

Loom Video of why you are a good fit (No Video No Interview!)

title: Video Editor & Motion Designer (Paid Social) - Muscle Nation
description:
We’re looking for a mid-level Video Editor & Motion Designer to join Muscle Nation’s creative team and help produce high-performing paid social content. This role is equal parts editing and motion design where you’ll cut raw footage into conversion-focused video ads AND build polished motion assets including supers, lower thirds, animated transitions, and kinetic typography.



If you understand how paid media ads are structured, know what makes someone stop scrolling in the first 3 seconds, and can execute both live-action edits and motion graphics at a high level - we want to hear from you!



About the Role



You’ll work across
, Instagram, and TikTok ad campaigns, collaborating closely with our Creative Strategist, Paid Media Manager, and videographers. You’re not just assembling clips - you’re building ads with a clear understanding of direct-response structure: hook, body, CTA. You know how to re-hook viewers throughout a piece using pacing shifts, visual pattern interrupts and motion elements that maintain attention.



Your Day-to-Day



- Edit video content for paid social campaigns across Meta and TikTok, working with existing footage and assets stored in Google Drive

- Create 3+ variations per concept for testing - different hooks, pacing, CTAs and visual treatments to maximise performance

- Design and build motion assets: animated supers, lower thirds, text overlays, transitions, kinetic typography, and branded end cards

- Craft scroll-stopping hooks in the first 1–3 seconds using a combination of editing technique and motion design

- Apply re-hook techniques throughout each ad - pacing changes, visual pattern interrupts, text callouts, and motion cues that sustain viewer attention

- Adapt content across platform-specific formats and aspect ratios (9:16 Stories/Reels, 4:5 Feed, 1:1 where needed)

- Collaborate with the Creative Strategist and Paid Media Manager to interpret briefs, understand performance data, and iterate on creative direction

- Coordinate with videographers to understand available footage and plan asset requirements

- Test new creative approaches and editing styles while maintaining brand consistency

- Manage multiple projects simultaneously with quick turnaround times

- Stay current with paid social trends, platform algorithm changes, and emerging ad formats



What We’re Looking For



- 2-4 years of video editing experience with a focus on social media advertising or performance creative

- Strong motion graphics and animation skills - you can build supers, lower thirds, animated text, transitions, and branded elements from scratch in After Effects (or equivalent)

- Proficiency in video editing software (Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or similar) plus experience with After Effects or a comparable motion design tool

- Experience with AI-driven editing and design platforms

- Deep understanding of paid ad structure - you know how hooks, body content, and CTAs work together to drive conversions

- Strong design eye - you understand typography, layout, colour, and hierarchy, and can apply these principles to motion assets that look polished and on-brand

- Knowledge of platform-specific video formats, specs, and best practices across Meta and TikTok

- Experience creating multiple creative variations for testing and optimisation

- Ability to work with feedback efficiently, managing multiple projects with tight deadlines

- Excellent communication skills for collaborating with creative and paid media teams across time zones



Bonus Points



- Experience with fitness, wellness, or supplement brands

- Understanding of paid social advertising metrics (CTR, hook rate, hold rate, thumbstop ratio, ROAS)

- Experience editing UGC-style content for direct-response campaigns

- Familiarity with creative testing frameworks and iteration processes

- Background working with e-commerce brands or performance marketing agencies

- Familiarity with the Australian market and cultural nuances



Work Arrangement



- 30-day contract with a view to transition into a full-time role based on performance and mutual fit

- Based in the Philippines, working remotely with our Australian team

- Flexible schedule with regular meetings alongside AU creative and paid media teams

- Reporting to the Creative Strategist and Paid Media Manager



How to Apply



Please note: we will only progress applications that complete the task below.



Video Editing & Motion Design Task



Objective:



Promote our Protein Water to fitness enthusiasts aged 22–35 through engaging short-form paid social content.



Brief:



You’ve been provided with raw footage here. Your task is to create 3x short-form video ads (15–30 seconds each), each with a different hook and creative approach, suitable for
 and Instagram Feed/Stories.



You can use placeholder footage or describe your editing approach where needed.



Available Assets:

UGC-style fitness creator footage (gym setting, protein shaker)

Pouring clips

Workout clips

Product pack shots

Backdrop footage



What We Want to See:



- A strong, scroll-stopping hook within the first 3 seconds of each variation - show us you understand what makes someone stop and watch

- Re-hook techniques throughout each ad that sustain viewer attention (pacing shifts, visual pattern interrupts, text callouts, motion cues)

- Motion design elements you’ve built: supers, lower thirds, animated text, transitions, or branded end cards - these should demonstrate your design ability, not just your editing chops

- Understanding of paid ad structure: hook > body > CTA

- Platform-appropriate formatting in both 9:16 and 4:5 aspect ratios



Submission Requirements:

- 3x video ad variations as described above

- Your portfolio showcasing relevant paid social video and motion design work

- A brief cover letter explaining your experience with performance creative and motion design, and why this role excites you



Evaluation Criteria:



- Hook effectiveness - does it stop the scroll in the first 3 seconds?

- Re-hook and pacing techniques - how well do you sustain attention throughout the ad?

- Motion design quality - are your supers, text treatments, and transitions polished and well-designed?

- Understanding of paid ad structure and platform best practices

- Creative storytelling and performance marketing mindset

- Technical editing skills and attention to detail



We’re excited to see how you can help elevate our paid social creative and drive results for Muscle Nation!

title: Customer Support & Operations Assistant (Ecommerce – Growth Opportunity)

s and support tickets

Pay

About Us:



Maten & Degan was founded in 2020 after seeing the real impact of homelessness during the COVID-19 pandemic.

Since then, our mission has been to help vulnerable people by providing emergency and social housing. We work closely with local authorities and government organisations to house people in need.

We are now growing our team and looking for talented Lead Sourcing VAs to support our business.

Here’s our website: 
/

Zoopla

Rightmove

OpenRent

And more.

Search for property listings

Extract key information

Copy the data into our spreadsheet system

LinkedIn profile links

Your job will be to:

Find the correct professional
 address for each contact

Keep master council & government spreadsheet organised 

All
s will later be verified by our third-party verification team.



The ideal candidate should have:



Strong time management skills

Good written communication

High attention to detail

Ability to follow instructions carefully

Self-discipline when working remotely

Ability to work independently without constant supervision

Strong research skills

Ability to meet deadlines consistently

Organised and structured in daily work

Ability to manage repetitive tasks with focus

Problem-solving mindset

Willingness to learn new tools and processes

Ability to handle feedback and improve quickly

Professional attitude when communicating with the team

Reliability and consistency in completing assigned tasks



To apply, you must have:

Good computer and internet skills

Reliable high-speed internet connection

Quality microphone and headset

Internet Speed Test

Please test your internet speed using:

Speedtest by Ookla

Take a screenshot of the result and be ready to send it with your application.



Your working hours will be:

11:00 AM – 2:00 PM GMT

You will be working closely with our founder Mohammad and collaborating with our internal team.



Salary & Benefits:



Starting Salary (Part-time)

$6 per hour

30 hours per week

This role will start as a part-time position. After 3 months, based on performance and reliability, the role will transition into a full-time position.



After 3 Months

$7 per hour

Full-time position (40 hours per week)

We are looking for someone who wants to grow with our company long term, so strong performers will have the opportunity to take on more responsibility within the team.



13th Month Pay:



In line with common employment practices in the Philippines, we offer a 13th Month Pay benefit.

This means you will receive an additional bonus equivalent to one month's salary, typically paid in December, provided you have worked with the company long enough during the year. The amount will be prorated based on the number of months worked.

We value our team and believe in rewarding loyalty, performance, and long-term commitment.

Performance Bonus

Because our company is growing in social housing and property sourcing, we reward tea
mbers who help us secure new property opportunities.

If a property lead that you source results in a signed property deal, you will receive a $50 performance bonus for that deal.

This bonus is designed to reward initiative, quality lead sourcing, and contribution to company growth.

At Maten & Degan, we believe in recognising tea
mbers who help the business succeed and make a real impact.



Next Steps

Screenshot of your internet speed 

The word “M&D” in your subject line 



Good luck :)

title: Expert LinkedIn Growth Strategist – Marketing Agency (Remote)
description:
The Opportunity

We are seeking an experienced LinkedIn Growth Strategist to support a fast-moving marketing and advertising agency focused on helping agencies turn conversations into predictable revenue. The team builds and manages full-funnel systems designed to generate demand, convert opportunities, and nurture long-term client relationships.



This role plays a critical part in driving LinkedIn-based outreach and appointment generation, working closely with internal tea
mbers to maintain consistent pipeline activity for clients. The ideal candidate is highly independent, detail-oriented, and experienced in managing outbound activity that results in booked meetings.



You will collaborate daily with the internal team while taking ownership of LinkedIn outreach execution and appointment-setting performance.



Key Responsibilities:

- Manage LinkedIn outreach and outbound activity designed to generate qualified conversations and meetings

- Conduct cold outreach and appointment-setting efforts through LinkedIn

- Coordinate outreach initiatives with internal tea
mbers to support client pipeline goals

- Track activity and performance metrics related to outreach and booked meetings

- Manage multiple outreach initiatives simultaneously across different client accounts

- Maintain organized workflows using collaboration and communication tools

- Consistently generate 2–4 booked meetings per week per client through LinkedIn outreach efforts



Compensation

Competitive monthly compensation based on experience and role scope.



Monthly compensation ranges from ?32,000 – ?42,000, depending on experience and role scope. Final compensation is aligned with the candidates experience level.



Core Technical Skills Required

- LinkedIn outbound outreach and appointment setting

- Project management and coordination across multiple initiatives

- Resource planning and workflow organization for outreach campaigns

- Marketing analytics and reporting related to outreach performance

- Experience using Slack, Google Workspace, and LinkedIn for daily operations



Professional Skills Required

- High level of self-direction with the ability to work independently

- Strong attention to detail when managing outreach activity and communications



Candidate Fit

- Professionals who are comfortable managing multiple outreach initiatives and priorities simultaneously

- Individuals who require minimal supervision and can take ownership of their results

- Process-minded professionals who can maintain consistent outreach activity and performance tracking



Professional Readiness

- Candidates applying for this role should have a reliable home office setup, stable internet connection, and the ability to maintain consistent availability during the required working hours.

- Successful candidates communicate proactively, meet deadlines, and take ownership of responsibilities while working remotely.



About Our Client

Our client is a marketing and advertising agency that partners with other agencies to help them generate consistent revenue through structured growth systems. Their work focuses on building and managing full-funnel strategies that drive demand, improve conversion, and nurture long-term opportunities.



The team specializes in pipeline generation, sales enablement, and marketing automation systems designed to turn conversations into predictable business outcomes for their clients.



About Intelus Agency

Intelus Agency is a remote staffing and talent-matching firm that helps businesses hire reliable, role-trained remote professionals. Intelus manages sourcing, screening, placement, and ongoing support while candidates work day-to-day with our clients’ teams.



Application Process

If you meet the requirements outlined above and are interested in this opportunity, please complete our quick application form by uploading your resume and submitting a short 1-minute introduction video.



In your video briefly share:

- Your professional background

- The types of work you specialize in

- Why this opportunity interests you

title: Video Editor — Stable Work, Fair Pay, and Path to Full-Time + Performance Bonuses (US Health Brand)
description:
Are you looking for consistent work, fair pay, and a path to full-time based on your performance?  If yes, keep reading.



Most video editor jobs pay you a flat rate and that's it. Doesn't matter if your ad gets a million views or drives $50,000 in sales you get the same paycheck. No bonus. No raise. No recognition. Just the same rate, forever.



This role is different. When your ads win, you get paid more. When you prove yourself, your rate goes up. Perform well and you move to full-time. Keep growing and you become a senior editor on the team.



What You'll Do:



Receive a script and clear brief from us

Generate AI talking heads using HeyGen

Use Sora for hook sequences when the concept calls for it

Source and generate b-roll using Kling and footage from TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube

Assemble the full ad — talking head as the anchor, b-roll sprinkled throughout

Native caption styles, correct safe zones, clean transitions

Deliver polished, ready-to-run Meta ads



All AI tools are provided. You pay for nothing.

Before You Keep Reading

Watch these examples first — this is the style we create: 

If you cannot match this style, do not apply.



What We're Looking For:



Comfortable generating AI talking heads in HeyGen

Can source non-generic footage — not stock, real TikTok/Instagram/YouTube clips

Native caption styles — not auto-generated, knows safe zones

Experience editing video ads for
 or Instagram

Fast, reliable, and coachable



Pay:



$500/month to start

Performance bonuses when your ads win

Rates go up as you prove yourself

Path to full-time as we grow

Top performers move into senior editor roles



To Apply:



Send 2-3 examples of video ads you've made in the style of the videos in the drive above

Tell us which AI tools you use

Your availability and expected monthly rate

title: Digital Systems & Operations Integrator
description:
We are an Australian-based company looking for a Digital Systems & Operations Integrator to work directly with our General Manager.



This role sits between technology, operations, and leadership support. You will help ensure our internal systems run smoothly, automation workflows operate correctly, and operational processes are followed across the business.



This is not a typical virtual assistant role. This role is best suited for someone who enjoys automation, systems thinking, and solving technical problems, not general administrative work.



If you are comfortable working with digital systems, diagnosing issues, and improving processes, this could be an excellent long-term opportunity.



We are looking for someone who naturally thinks in systems, workflows, and automation, and enjoys improving how businesses operate.



Key Responsibilities

Systems & Automation

• Diagnose and troubleshoot issues within internal applications and systems

• Work with integrations, APIs, and webhooks

• Build and manage automation workflows (n8n preferred)

• Support and maintain Go High Level (GHL) CRM systems

• Work with Base44 and internal applications

• Test new features, automations, and integrations

• Ensure system data is accurate and reliable



Operations & Process

• Help ensure internal processes are followed across the team

• Support hiring workflow and interview coordination

• Ensure onboarding and staff review processes are completed on time

• Maintain and update internal documentation and training systems

• Support the GM by ensuring tasks and processes do not fall through the cracks



System Adoption & Training

• Help tea
mbers use internal systems properly

• Identify where systems or data entry processes can be improved

• Support the development of our internal onboarding and training application

• Assist with testing, bug fixes, and system improvements



Required Skills & Experience



You must have experience with:

• Go High Level (GHL)

• Automation tools such as n8n or Zapier

• Understanding of API and webhook concepts

• Web-based applications and integrations

• AI tools such as ChatGPT or Claude



NB: Experience with Base44 or similar internal app platforms is highly beneficial.



You must also:

• Speak and write fluent professional English

• Be organised and structured in your thinking

• Be proactive and able to solve problems independently

• Be comfortable working directly with an Australian GM



If you are not comfortable working with systems, automation, and technical troubleshooting, this role may not be the right fit.



Work Details

• Full-time (40 hours per week)

• 8:30am – 5:00pm AEST

• Remote contractor role

• Australian public holidays observed

• 13th month bonus

• 2 weeks unpaid leave per year



We also offer performance incentives, including additional half-day rewards when KPIs are achieved.



Work Environment Requirements



You must have:

• Reliable high-speed internet

• Backup internet connection

• Backup power supply or an alternative workspace option (such as a nearby internet café)

• Quiet and professional workspace



Growth Opportunity

This role has strong long-term potential. The successful candidate may grow into a Digital Operations Integrator leadership role as the business expands.

We value people who take ownership, think logically, and proactively improve systems.





***How to Apply***





To apply for this role, please complete the application form below.

Application Form:







You will be asked to:

1?? Complete a short questionnaire

2?? Upload your resume

3?? Upload a 3–5 minute video introduction

Applications that do not follow these steps will not be reviewed.



Video Introduction

In your video please answer:

Tell us about your experience with Go High Level

Describe a system or automation you helped build or troubleshoot

Explain how you approach solving technical problems

Why you believe you are suited to a systems and operations role

Attention to Detail



To confirm you carefully read this job description, please begin your application with the phrase:

Systems Thinking Operator

title: Ecommerce Product Copywriter (AI-Assisted) – Furniture & Design
description:
We are a growing ecommerce brand in the home and design space looking for a Product Copywriter to help create clear, thoughtful, and compelling product pages.



This role focuses on writing high-quality ecommerce product descriptions for furniture, home goods, and design objects.



Our copy style is clean, design-focused, and informative, similar to publications like NYMag or Wirecutter. We focus on explaining materials, craftsmanship, and design history while keeping the writing concise and engaging.



You will work directly with our product team to transform supplier specifications, product details, and research into polished product pages.



AI Writing Requirement



This role requires strong skill using AI writing tools such as ChatGPT or Claude.



Using AI is not considered cheating — it is an expected part of the workflow. Strong candidates know how to:



• Use AI to generate drafts quickly

• Structure prompts to produce high-quality output

• Edit and refine AI output into polished writing

• Maintain consistent tone and formatting

• Use AI to help research materials, design history, and product details



We are looking for someone who understands that AI is a tool for productivity, not a replacement for judgment or editing.



Candidates who are comfortable collaborating with AI tools will succeed in this role.



Responsibilities



• Write ecommerce product descriptions for furniture and home goods

• Translate supplier specs and technical information into customer-friendly copy

• Research design inspiration and background behind products

• Use AI tools effectively to draft and refine product copy

• Help maintain a consistent brand voice across the website



Our Copy Style



We prioritize writing that is:



• Clear and informative

• Design-aware and thoughtful

• Structured and easy to read

• Confident but not overly promotional



We avoid marketing clichés like:



• “luxurious”

• “elevated”

• “built to last”



Instead we focus on explaining:



• materials

• craftsmanship

• design heritage

• functional details



Requirements



• Excellent written English

• Experience writing product descriptions or ecommerce copy

• Strong ability to use AI writing tools like ChatGPT or Claude

• Strong attention to detail

• Ability to follow structured writing formats

• Ability to research products and design inspiration



Experience with furniture, interiors, or design writing is a strong plus.



Pay



Hourly rate depends on experience.



This can start as a project-based role with the potential to grow into a long-term position as we expand our product catalog.



How To Apply



Please follow the instructions below carefully. Applications that do not follow the steps may not be reviewed.



1. Introduction



At the top of your message, write 2–3 sentences explaining why you would be a good fit for this role.



2. Writing Samples



Include 2–3 examples of product descriptions you have written, preferably for ecommerce, furniture, home goods, or design-related products.



3. AI Experience



Briefly describe your experience using AI tools such as ChatGPT or Claude for writing or research.



4. Hourly Rate



Include your hourly rate expectation.



Selected candidates will receive a short product copy test using AI tools before interviews are scheduled.

title: Digital Marketing Account Manager (Healthcare Practices)
description:
Looking for a full-time digital marketing role with stable hours, ongoing client work, and a long-term position? 



We’re an established Australian digital marketing agency (operating since 2014) offering a stable career path, competitive pay, and a genuinely collaborative team across Australia and the Philippines. 



You’ll manage accounts for regulated healthcare providers, including local clinics and professional practices. 



This role is ideal for an experienced Digital Marketing Account Manager who is looking for: Employment stability with a long-term agency (not a startup)



*Fixed Philippines-friendly hours (Monday to Friday, 7:00am–3:00pm Manila time - currently 6am - 2pm due to Australia’s Daylight Saving time)

*Attractive, marketing-based pay 70,000PHP - 120,000PHP per month

*10 paid leave days per year

*Additional paid time off over Christmas and New Year (for example, this year from 24 December to 6 January).

*Birthday and work anniversary gifts

*A friendly, structured team with daily support and collaboration



*** TO APPLY, COMPLETE THIS FORM



Day-to-Day Responsibilities

*Client & Campaign Management

*Manage digital marketing projects for Australian clients

*Oversee
 Ads, Google Ads, SEO, and related marketing initiatives

*Act as the key liaison between clients and internal specialists, including by phone and sms

*Campaign Monitoring

*Monitor advertising campaigns weekly (Google and
) with paid media specialists

*Work closely with advertising specialists to identify issues and opportunities

*Ensure campaigns remain optimised and aligned with client goals

*Reporting & Performance Review

*Review reports prepared by the SEO and Advertising teams

*Ensure reports are logical, accurate, and easy to understand

*Communicate performance insights clearly to clients via written updates and/or video meetings

*Campaign Improvement & Strategic Input

*Contribute ideas to improve campaign performance

*Review competitors and market positioning

*Recommend website or landing page improvements

*Suggest creative changes to ad copy, visuals, offers, and messaging



*** TO APPLY, COMPLETE THIS FORM



Required Experience

*Previous experience as a Digital Marketing Account Manager (required)

*Basic hands-on experience with
 Ads and Google Ads preferred

*Understanding of SEO fundamentals

*Experience in healthcare marketing (e.g. dental, allied health, or other professional practices) is highly preferred.

*Experience working with Australian clients is a strong advantage

*Excellent English communication skills, both written and spoken



Personal Attributes We’re Looking For

*Strong attention to detail with the ability to spot issues quickly

*Confident communicator (including by phone/video calls) who can clearly explain results

*Highly organised, reliable, and skilled in time management

*Analytical mindset with the ability to interpret data, not just report on it

*Proactive and solutions-focused

*Comfortable working in a fast-paced agency environment

*Team player who values collaboration and regular check-ins

*Calm, professional, and client-focused



You will manage established clients and work alongside dedicated Google Ads,
 Ads, SEO, and web specialists. The focus of this role is account management, performance oversight, and strategic input — not doing everything yourself, but you can do it if required.



*** TO APPLY, COMPLETE THIS FORM

title: Virtual Assistant – Scheduling & Wellness Studio Admin
description:
Part-Time Virtual Assistant – Wellness Studio (Remote)



About Us:

We are a boutique nurse-led wellness studio located in North Charleston, SC focused on IV hydration, vitamin therapies, weight management support, and holistic wellness services. Our environment is calm, professional, and supportive, with an emphasis on high-quality client care and organization behind the scenes.



Position:

Part-Time Virtual Assistant (Remote)



Hours:

• 5–10 hours per week to start

• Flexible schedule

• Mostly independent work with occasional same-day communication preferred





Role Overview:

We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented, and calm virtual assistant to help with scheduling, client communication, light administrative tasks, and social media posting support. This role starts with clear, simple tasks and may grow over time depending on fit.



Responsibilities:

• Appointment confirmations and reminder messages

• Rescheduling appointments and calendar updates

• Basic
 organization and responses using provided templates

• Maintain simple spreadsheets and client tracking lists

• Organize digital files and intake forms

• Assist with supply ordering and vendor follow-up when needed

• Schedule and publish social media posts (Instagram/Facebook) using content provided by the business owner

• Upload reels, photos, and captions provided by the owner

• Add hashtags and format posts for consistency



Ideal Candidate:

• Strong written English communication

• Reliable, organized, and detail-oriented

• Experience with administrative or virtual assistant tasks

• Comfortable using scheduling platforms and social media

• Able to work independently and follow clear directions

• Calm, professional, and respectful communication style



Important Notes:

• This role supports a healthcare and wellness business; professionalism and confidentiality are essential.

• Clinical or medical decisions are NOT part of this role.

• Content and messaging will be provided — creativity is not required initially.



How to Apply:

Please send:

• Short introduction

• Relevant experience

• Weekly availability

• Examples of similar work (if available)

title: LinkedIn Lead Generation Specialist
description:
We are looking for a results-driven LinkedIn Lead Generation Specialist based in the Philippines to help us grow our pipeline through outbound LinkedIn outreach.



RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Send personalized LinkedIn connection requests to targeted prospects daily

- Follow up with accepted connections via messaging and InMail

- Craft and send compelling InMail messages to reach prospects outside your network

- Qualify leads based on provided Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) criteria

- Track outreach activity and results in a shared spreadsheet or CRM

- Provide daily/weekly updates on outreach performance and pipeline



REQUIREMENTS:

- Must have an active, well-established personal LinkedIn account with 500+ connections

- Proven experience in LinkedIn lead generation, outbound sales, or similar role

- Excellent written English communication skills

- Familiarity with LinkedIn Sales Navigator is a plus

- Ability to write personalized, non-spammy outreach messages

- Detail-oriented with strong organizational skills

- Reliable internet connection and own device

- Available to work during US business hours (flexible)



NICE TO HAVE:

- Experience with CRM tools (GHL, HubSpot, Airtable, Notion, etc.)

- Prior experience in B2B lead generation or appointment setting

- Knowledge of any specific industry niche (will be discussed during interview)



Please include your LinkedIn profile URL when applying so we can review your account.

title: TikTok Shop Virtual Assistant (Brand Collaborations)
description:
I am looking for a Virtual Assistant to help manage my TikTok Shop collaborations with brands.



I am an active TikTok Shop affiliate generating over $70k in monthly GMV, and I receive many collaboration invites from brands. I need someone to help review these opportunities, communicate with brands, and organize potential retainers / collaborations.



This is a long-term opportunity for the right person.



RESPONSIBILITIES

• Review daily TikTok Shop collaboration invites

• Respond to brands through TikTok Shop messages with a focus on looking for retainers

• Request product samples when appropriate

• Track brand conversations and deals in a spreadsheet

• Identify high-potential products

• Help organize products for upcoming videos



REQUIREMENTS

• Experience with TikTok Shop Affiliate platform (preferred)

• Experience with influencer outreach or e-commerce

• Good written English

• Organized and reliable



WORKLOAD

Approximately 1–2 hours per day



COMPENSATION

Monthly salary $150 – $300 depending on experience



TO APPLY

Please answer the following:



1. Have you worked with TikTok Shop affiliate before?

2. Have you worked with influencers or creators?

3. What experience do you have with brand collaborations?



Please include the word “TikTok” in the first line of your application so I know you read the full job post.

title: Experienced Direct Response Copywriter ($2,000 – $4,000 Per Month)
description:
Work Hours: Full-time, Monday to Friday, normal Philippine working hours



Young Publisher | 



We’re an international digital publishing company hiring from the Philippines for over 5 years.

We have 50+ tea
mbers worldwide and 200+ verified reviews with a 4.9 average rating.

We build long-term partnerships, not short-term gigs.

We don't disappear, we pay on time



We’re looking for an experienced direct response copywriter who can:

- Take full ownership of performance-driven campaigns

- Write
s that get opened, read, and clicked

- Create Ads that stop people from scrolling.

- Craft persuasive copy that drives readers to act.



This is a full-time remote role with clear growth opportunities. You’ll start with
s and ads, and as you prove yourself, move into sales pages and VSLs.



What you’ll do



- Write broadcast
s and automated sequences

- Create Meta ad copy and video scripts

- Help produce ebooks and lead magnets using AI tools

- Progress into sales pages and VSL scripts for launches



Why is this role different?



- You’ll receive direct feedback from an 8-figure copywriter. This is a serious opportunity to sharpen your skills fast.

- You’ll also get access to premium courses and AI communities. We invest in our team because we want long-term growth.

- We encourage AI tools — but only with strong critical thinking. This is not a beginner role.



Essentials



- Full-time, Monday to Friday, Philippine standard working hours

- Long-term position with growth into sales pages and VSLs

- $2,000–$4,000 USD per month, depending on experience

- Fully remote

- Reliable, on-time payments every two weeks via Wise



Requirements



- At least 2 years of direct response copywriting experience (not blog or content writing)

- Proven results: open rates, CTR, conversions, ROAS

- Experience writing for coaches, course creators, or info product businesses

- Native-level English for US, UK, or Australian audiences

- Strong understanding of hooks, emotional triggers, objection handling, and CTAs

- Experience with Meta ad copy and video scripts

- Ability to adapt to different brand voices

- Comfortable using AI tools with critical thinking

- Strong communication skills and independence

- Reliable, responsive, proactive, and coachable



Hiring process



#1: Paid test task

#2: Interview

#3: Paid test month at 50% salary



We’re looking for professionals who know their craft and want long-term growth.



How to apply



Apply via our Typeform here: 



Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



Young Publisher



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: YouTube Specialist
description:
We are looking for a YouTube Specialist who understands how to turn video content into a high-performing YouTube channel. This role focuses on editing, optimizing, and strategically managing YouTube content so videos rank in search, drive consistent views, and grow subscriber audiences.



The ideal candidate understands YouTube SEO, audience retention, and content packaging (titles, thumbnails, descriptions) and knows how to optimize both individual videos and entire channels for discoverability and growth.



Key Responsibilities

YouTube Video Editing



Edit long-form and short-form YouTube content to maximize viewer retention.

Cut, pace, and structure videos to maintain engagement and reduce drop-off.

Add graphics, captions, sound effects, and transitions that enhance storytelling.

Repurpose long-form content into YouTube Shorts where appropriate.



YouTube SEO & Optimization



Optimize video titles, descriptions, and tags using YouTube SEO best practices.

Conduct keyword research to identify ranking opportunities.

Structure video metadata to improve search ranking and discoverability.

Implement YouTube best practices for thumbnails, descriptions, and CTAs.



Channel Optimization



Audit existing YouTube channels to identify opportunities for growth.

Optimize channel layout, playlists, and content organization.

Improve channel branding, descriptions, and keyword targeting.

Implement strategies that improve watch time, click-through rate, and subscriber growth.



Content Performance Analysis



Monitor analytics including:

Click-through rate (CTR)

Audience retention

Watch time

Subscriber conversion

Identify patterns and recommend improvements.

Develop optimization strategies based on performance data.



Content Strategy Support



Help plan content that aligns with YouTube search demand and trending topics.

Recommend video formats and structures that perform well on the platform.

Collaborate on thumbnail and title strategies that increase click-through rate.



Qualifications



Proven experience editing YouTube videos and growing YouTube channels

Strong understanding of YouTube SEO and ranking factors

Experience with video editing software such as:

Adobe Premiere Pro

Final Cut Pro

DaVinci Resolve

or similar tools



Familiarity with tools like:

TubeBuddy

VidIQ

YouTube Studio Analytics

Understanding of audience retention, watch time, and algorithm signals

Ability to identify opportunities to improve video packaging and discoverability



Preferred Skills

Experience managing YouTube channels from launch to growth

Thumbnail design experience

Knowledge of YouTube Shorts optimization

Experience with creator brands, podcasts, or educational content

Ability to recommend content formats that drive consistent channel growth



What Success Looks Like



Videos rank for targeted keywords in YouTube search

Improved click-through rates and audience retention

Consistent subscriber growth

A well-organized channel optimized for discoverability



How to Apply



Please include:

Examples of YouTube channels you have worked on

Links to videos you edited

A short explanation of how you helped a video or channel grow

title: Web Designer / Web Developer (Remote – Full Time)
description:
About Us



Ashoori Law is a fast-growing U.S. immigration law firm helping individuals and businesses worldwide navigate the U.S. immigration process. Our team serves clients across the globe and is committed to delivering exceptional legal services and client experiences.



We are looking for a talented, detail-oriented Web Designer / Web Developer who can design and develop visually stunning, conversion-focused, and high-performing websites for multiple brands within our organization.

The Web Designer / Web Developer will be responsible for designing, building, optimizing, and maintaining modern websites that deliver excellent user experiences and fast performance. You will work closely with our marketing and content teams to ensure brand consistency, high conversion rates, and optimal website functionality.

Excellent communication skills and ability to collaborate with a team



Preferred Qualifications

What We Offer

Competitive monthly compensation

Full-time remote position

Supportive and collaborative remote work environment

Opportunity to work on multiple websites and brands

title: Patient Care Coordinator
description:
**Applicants must have a Bachelor’s degree in a medical field. Please do not apply if you do not meet this qualification.**



The Patient Care Coordinator (PCC) is the primary administrative and coordination point of contact for patients. PCCs ensure seamless communication between patients, providers, and clinic operations, enhancing patient experience, operational efficiency, and provider workflow. This role is an evolution of the Healthcare Virtual Assistant (HVA) with increased autonomy, patient-centered focus, and clearly defined responsibilities.



Duties and Responsibilities:

1. Patient Advocacy & Engagement

Respond to all patient communications (portal, Elevate,
) within 4 business hours.

Resolve non-clinical patient concerns or escalate appropriately.

Proactively educate patients on care pathways, including medication refills, lab orders/procedures, and form completion.

Recognize and triage urgent clinical or safety issues following established protocols.



2. Clinical & Provider Coordination

Care Plan Summarization: Generate After Visit Summaries using the live document, outlining discussed care plans, goals, and follow-ups.

Manage provider schedules and patient flow to optimize clinic efficiency.

Draft and prepare documentation: AVS, FMLA, ESA, referrals, treatment letters, prior authorizations.

Ensure chart readiness: all intake forms, labs, and external records are complete prior to appointments.

Serve as intermediary between patients and providers, relaying communications promptly.



3. Administrative Task Management

Send health screeners and virtual meeting links to patients prior to visits.

Initiate and manage prior authorizations, order genetic testing, handle medical records, and coordinate lab/referral orders.

Demonstrate adaptability and flexibility in attending to additional duties assigned by the Lead PCC, including providing coverage for other PCC responsibilities as needed.

Ensure compliance with HIPAA, clinic policies, and ethical standards in all tasks.



4. Operational Excellence & Autonomy

Use standardized communication templates for consistency and compliance.

Track patient requests and unresolved items using workflow tools.

Collaborate with billing, front desk, and leadership for cross-functional patient issues.

PCCs are empowered to own and complete tasks within a clear decision matrix, balancing autonomy with escalation when appropriate.



Qualifications for the Job:

Education: Bachelor’s degree in a healthcare field

1-3 years as Medical Assistant is required

HIPAA (Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act) certified



Preferred Experience:

Previous employment in healthcare administration or similar roles that involved assisting healthcare professionals.

Proficiency in using virtual platforms, electronic health records (EHR) systems, and other healthcare-related software is important.

Knowledge of healthcare regulations and compliance: Understanding HIPAA regulations and other healthcare compliance requirements is highly desirable. 



Equipment Required:

Desktop/Laptop Computer

Internet



Key Competencies:

Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to interact professionally. 

Effective time management skills, capable of prioritizing tasks and meeting deadlines consistently.

Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

Exhibit reliability by consistently being punctual for both work and meetings.

Ability to adapt to changing priorities and work in a fast-paced environment.

Knowledge of medical terminology and healthcare processes.

Familiarity with platforms such as Cover
ds, GeneSight, and iFax is preferred.

Proven ability to handle sensitive information with confidentiality and professionalism.

title: Accessibility Specialist (Documents / PDFs)
description:
This role requires advanced accessibility expertise and attention to detail, rather than general graphic design capability

alone. The specialist supports the remediation and production of complex documentation to meet WCAG 2.2 AA and PDF accessibility standards, ensuring outputs are compliant, usable, and fit for purpose.



Key Responsibilities

• Produce high-end, accurate finished art across complex, long-form financial services documentation.

• Create accessible interactive form PDFs using Adobe InDesign and Acrobat.

• Remediate existing documents to meet WCAG 2.2 AA and PDF accessibility standards.

• Apply and validate correct tagging, reading order, alt text, structure, and logical document flow.

• Conduct screen reader testing and accessibility validation.

• Ensure all documents meet compliance requirements within regulated environments.

• Liaise with IVE stakeholders to clarify briefs and accessibility requirements.

• Maintain exceptional attention to detail and technical accuracy.



Essential Skills & Experience

• Experience working within corporate brand guidelines and compliance frameworks.

• Advanced Adobe InDesign skills — complex layouts, long-form documents, print and digital production.

• Proven experience creating accessible interactive PDFs in InDesign and Acrobat.

• Strong working knowledge of WCAG 2.2 AA and PDF accessibility standards.

• Demonstrated experience remediating documents for accessibility compliance.

• Confident conducting screen reader testing and validating tagging, reading order, alt text and document structure.

• Experience working with regulated or financial services documentation highly regarded.



Accreditations & Desirable Skills

• Accessibility accreditations or formal accessibility certifications.

• Familiarity with Common Look PDF or other remediation tools.

• Proficiency in Microsoft Word and PowerPoint for document formatting.



***Work from home ready

***Amenable to work around 6AM-3PM //7 AM-4PM MNL time

***Comfortable using time tracker (time doctor app)



Interested applicants may send their most updated CV and portfolio. Apply now!
