title: Social Media Content Creator (Canva, Reels, Video Editing)
description:
Social Media & Content Support (Remote)



About the Role



Dr. Robin is a Canadian Naturopathic Doctor who runs an online thyroid education program and hosts educational workshops.



This role supports the creation, design, and scheduling of social media content that promotes thyroid education, workshops, and programs.



The role focuses primarily on execution of content, with creative input welcomed but not required.



Primary platforms:

• Instagram

•

• Private
 Group

________________________________________

Important Skill Requirement



This role requires the ability to create multiple types of social media content, including:

• Carousel posts

• Reels and short-form video

• Simple educational social media posts



The ability to edit and create reels from video content is especially important for this role.



Candidates must be comfortable editing short-form video using tools such as Descript, CapCut, or similar video editing software.

________________________________________

Core Responsibilities



1. Create Social Media Posts

Design and prepare social media content such as:

• Instagram carousel posts

• Educational carousel slides explaining thyroid topics

• Informational posts about thyroid health

• Promotional posts for workshops or programs

• Teaser posts promoting longer educational content



Posts will be created using topics, ideas, or materials provided by Dr. Robin.

________________________________________

2. Canva Design



Use Canva to design content including:

• Carousel posts

• Educational carousel slides explaining thyroid topics

• Promotional graphics

• Quote posts

• Simple infographic-style posts



Occasionally assist with:

• Presentation slides

• Educational handouts

• Workshop graphics

________________________________________

3. Create Reels (Important)



Create short-form video content, including:

• Reels from longer educational videos

• Reels using clips from recorded videos

• Reels using captions and simple edits

• Reels using audio from videos combined with B-roll or static visuals



Candidates must be comfortable editing short-form video and creating reels.

________________________________________

4. Repurpose Existing Content



Repurpose content from:

• Long-form educational videos

• Workshop materials

• Previously created posts



Into:

• Carousel posts

• Reels

• Shorter educational posts

________________________________________

5. Schedule Social Media Posts



Use a scheduling tool such as Buffer to:

• Upload posts

• Format captions

• Add hashtags

• Schedule posts



Coordinate with the GoHighLevel assistant when social media posts or videos need to be linked to
 campaigns.

________________________________________

6. Post Content to the
 Group



Schedule and publish relevant content to the private 
munity group using Buffer, including:

• Workshop replay announcements

• Educational posts

• Reminders or updates

________________________________________

7. Content Inspiration (Ideal but Not Required)



An ideal candidate may also bring creative inspiration for posts.



This could include:

• Suggesting carousel ideas

• Adapting trending social media formats, 
s, or themes for educational content

• Identifying social media formats that could work for educational content



Examples may include:

• “My Favorite Tips For ___”

• “What I Would Do If I Were Just Diagnosed With ___”

• “3 Mistakes I See Patients Make With ___”



Dr. Robin will always guide the educational content and messaging.

________________________________________

What This Role Does NOT Include



This role does not involve:

• Answering DMs

• Community management

• Running ads

• Managing comments

• Writing long-form content



________________________________________

Position Details

• This is a long-term role with a growing online education business

• Work is hourly and task-based, with no monthly retainer

• There will be recurring work each month creating and scheduling social media content

• Typical workload is 5–15 hours per month, depending on projects

• Additional hours may be available as content production grows

• Looking for someone comfortable with flexible hours and variable workloads



________________________________________

Work Structure

• Remote

• Hourly pay (hours tracked with Clockify or similar)

• Flexible schedule for most tasks

• Communication through Slack

• Files and assets shared through Google Workspace



________________________________________

Tools Used



You will be working with tools such as:

• Canva

• Buffer (for scheduling posts)

• Descript (for editing and repurposing video content)

• Slack (team communication)

• Google Workspace (shared files and folders)



You will be provided access to Dr. Robin’s paid accounts for Canva, Descript, and other tools as needed.



Experience with Descript or similar video editing tools is helpful.

________________________________________

Ideal Skillset



A strong candidate will have experience with multiple content formats, including:

• Editing reels or short-form video

• Creating Instagram carousel posts

• Designing graphics in Canva

• Repurposing long-form content into short-form posts

• Using social media scheduling tools



Experience with video editing and reels creation is especially important for this role.



________________________________________

To Apply



Please include:

1. A portfolio of social media content you have created

2. Examples of carousel posts you designed

3. Examples of reels or short-form video you edited

4. Your hourly rate (USD)

5. Your availability and when you could start



Ideally, your portfolio should include multiple examples of your work.



Applications without examples of social media design or reels editing may not be reviewed.



Please start your application subject line with:

CONTENT – [Your Name]



This helps us confirm you read the full posting.

title: Sales Manager - Affiliate Marketing SaaS
description:
We are a Berlin-based, bootstrapped B2B SaaS company building products for the affiliate and performance marketing industry. Our platform combines affiliate tracking with integrated fraud prevention, link testing, and data privacy features. We are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based in the Philippines who knows the sweepstakes, cost-per-lead, and performance marketing world inside out - and can bring networks, agencies, and advertisers onto our platform.



The role

This is a full-time outbound sales role. You will own the full sales cycle from prospecting to close, with a primary focus on affiliate networks and agencies running sweepstakes, cost-per-lead, and other performance campaigns. Your job is to understand our product deeply and convince prospects that our platform is the better, more cost-effective alternative to what they are using today. You are not managing a sales team. You are the sales team.



What you will do

-Identify and prospect target accounts: affiliate networks, agencies, and advertisers running sweepstakes, CPL, and performance campaigns on competing platforms (Everflow, Affise, Tune, Cake, HasOffers)

-Become a product expert on our platform and clearly articulate why it beats the competition on features, pricing, and integrated fraud prevention

-Run outbound campaigns via cold
, LinkedIn, and industry events to generate qualified pipeline

-Conduct product demos and discovery calls with decision-makers in the U.S. and Latam markets

-Own the full sales cycle: from first touch to signed contract, including price negotiations and deal structuring

-Upsell existing clients on additional products and features (fraud prevention, link testing, data privacy tools)

-Minimize churn by building strong client relationships and proactively addressing issues before they escalate

-Support new clients during onboarding to ensure a smooth transition and fast time-to-value

-Maintain a clean CRM pipeline and provide accurate forecasting

-Share market intelligence with the product team: what competitors are doing, what prospects are asking for, and where we have gaps



What we are looking for

-Minimum 2 years of experience working at an affiliate network, performance marketing agency, or ad tech company in a sales or business development role

-Existing network and contacts among affiliate networks, agencies, and advertisers - especially those running sweepstakes, -CPL, and lead generation campaigns

-Hands-on experience with affiliate tracking platforms (e.g., Everflow, Affise, Tune, Cake, HasOffers, or similar)

-Deep understanding of CPC, CPL, CPA, and CPI campaign models and how networks/agencies operate

-Fluent in industry terminology: postbacks, conversion pixels, sub-IDs, offer caps, payouts, EPC, CR, and similar metrics

-Ability to learn our product inside out and position it confidently against competitors in demos and sales calls

-Excellent spoken and written English - you will be on calls with U.S.-based clients daily

-Comfortable working U.S. time zone hours (evening/night shift in the Philippines)

-Hunter mentality: you are driven by outbound prospecting and opening new accounts, not waiting for inbound leads

-Self-starter who can work independently without micromanagement



Nice to have

-Experience selling SaaS or platform products (not just media/traffic)

-Familiarity with fraud prevention in affiliate marketing (click fraud, install fraud, lead fraud)

-Direct relationships with sweepstakes and CPL networks or offer owners

-Experience with CRM tools like Pipedrive, HubSpot, or Salesforce

-Experience with outbound sales tools (Apollo, Lemlist, or similar)



Compensation

-Base salary: $1,200 - $1,500 USD per month, depending on experience.

-Commission: 15% of monthly recurring revenue on every deal you close, paid for as long as the client remains active. This -means your income grows with every client you bring in and retain.

-You will invoice us as a freelancer. As an independent contractor working with a foreign company, you are responsible for your own tax filing in the Philippines. Most freelancers qualify for the 8% flat income tax rate on gross receipts under 3 million PHP annually. We pay via international bank transfer.



What we offer

-A real commission structure that rewards long-term client relationships, not just closing

-Fully remote work

-Direct access to the CEO and product team - no layers of bureaucracy

-A profitable, bootstrapped company with no VC pressure or arbitrary growth targets

-Room to grow into a sales leadership role as the team expands



Important: Working hours

This role requires regular availability during U.S. business hours (Eastern/Pacific time), which means evening and night shifts in the Philippines. If you are not willing or able to work these hours consistently, this role is not for you. Please only apply if you are comfortable with this schedule.



How to apply

Tell us about your experience in affiliate/performance marketing. Which networks or agencies have you worked with? What tracking platforms have you used? Do you have contacts at networks or agencies running sweepstakes, CPL, or lead generation campaigns? We value real experience over polished CVs. If you can name actual companies, platforms, and people you have worked with, you will stand out.

title: Remote Appointment Setter - Outbound Calls
description:
About the Company

We are a fast-growing company in the pavement assessment and maintenance industry, dedicated to helping property owners and businesses maintain safe, high-quality surfaces. Our team is passionate about delivering top-tier solutions, and we are looking for an Appointment Setter to play a key role in our sales process.

About the Role



The Appointment Setter is responsible for outbound prospecting, lead generation, and scheduling pavement assessments with commercial property owners and facility managers. This role directly contributes to sales growth by ensuring a steady pipeline of qualified appointments that lead to service quotes and closed deals. Additionally, you will assist in drafting pavement assessment reports, ensuring accuracy and completeness in post-site evaluations.



Key Responsibilities



Daily Tasks:

Conduct outbound calls to potential clients, introducing them to our pavement assessment services

Respond to inbound inquiries and follow up on leads to schedule appointments



Weekly Tasks:

Strategically schedule pavement assessments with decision-makers

Collaborate with the sales team to ensure seamless transitions from assessment to proposal



Monthly Tasks:

Draft comprehensive pavement assessment reports following field evaluations

Prepare and review performance metrics, tracking outbound calls, appointments booked, and conversion rates

Performance Metrics

Lead Indicators (Proactive Measures for Success):

Outbound calls: Maintain a high volume of strategic outreach to qualified prospects

Quality of conversations: Ensure effective engagement and communication with potential clients

Appointment conversion rate: Monitor the efficiency of turning calls into scheduled assessments

Client relationship development: Foster strong connections to improve long-term success rates

Lag Indicators (Results & Impact):

Appointments booked: Reflects the effectiveness of lead generation efforts

Assessments converted to sales: Measures how successfully booked assessments lead to revenue

Timeliness and accuracy of reports: Ensures all assessments are well-documented for the sales team

Client satisfaction and feedback: Tracks the overall experience of customers throughout the process

What We’re Looking For



Proactive mindset: Takes initiative and seeks out opportunities



Results-driven: Motivated by goals and consistently strives to exceed them



Excellent communicator: Engages prospects, builds relationships, and presents value clearly



Highly organized: Manages follow-ups, schedules appointments efficiently, and meets deadlines



Adaptable and resilient: Thrives in a fast-paced environment and embraces new challenges



Team-oriented: Works closely with sales and leadership to drive company success



Why Join Us?



Be part of a growing company with opportunities for advancement

Competitive base salary plus performance-based bonuses

Work in a high-impact role where your efforts directly drive business success

Remote position with flexibility and autonomy



Apply Today

If you’re a motivated sales professional who excels in outbound prospecting and appointment setting, we want to hear from you. Apply now and take the next step in your career.



Application Instructions (Please Read Carefully):

To be considered for this position, you must follow these instructions exactly:



1. Begin your application with the word “Rhino.”

2.  Tell us your favorite productivity tool and why you like it.

3. Attach or link a short video (1 minutes) where you introduce yourself, share your background, and tell us why you think you’d be a great fit for this role.

title: Medical Assistant/Administrator
description:
We are a fast-growing, physician-led retina specialty practice seeking a full-time Virtual Medical Assistant (VMA) to support our office manager and clinical team. This role is ideal for someone experienced in medical administration who thrives in a high-responsibility, detail-oriented environment.

Please add "Hi RSCT" at the title



You will be the remote backbone of our patient communication, scheduling coordination, insurance workflow, and surgery logistics — while our in-office team focuses on direct patient care.

We are perfectionists and want a professional communicator and very a hard worker individual. 

You will be given daily tasks (see below) and we would we want meticulous daily reports of tasks completed.

You will be in direct communication with out office manager on daily basis. We are always happy to answer questions and train the ideal candidate as much as necessary,  but we would also expect self driven, problem solving mind-set.



Role Overview:

Patient communication - Answer incoming calls and call patients regarding their scheduled appointments

Scheduling coordination - schedule new and established patients

Insurance & authorization workflows - You will be given certain tasks daily regarding insurance prior Authorization

Surgery coordination - You will be uploading and following up with surgery coordination; call surgical centers, call PCPs for notes, Call patients and close the loop.

Referral and documentation management - upload fax documents from referring doctor

Reporting and administrative tracking

Important: This is a remote role. You will not perform hands-on clinical tasks but will function as a high-level medical administrative professional.



PATIENT COMMUNICATION

Incoming Patient Calls

Answer calls professionally and compassionately

Triage urgency (vision changes, flashes/floaters, post-op concerns, injection reactions) and escalate when appropriate (always check with manager initially)

Route calls correctly (clinical vs billing vs scheduling)

Document detailed call notes in EMR



Outgoing Calls

Reschedule missed appointments

Contact patients regarding insurance eligibility issues

Coordinate outside imaging (MRI/CT) logistics

Discuss deductibles and payment expectations



SCHEDULING & INTAKE

Schedule new and returning patients appropriately (urgent vs routine)

Collect demographics and insurance information

Enter referring doctor information into system

Send intake paperwork promptly

Request prior records from referring doctors



SURGERY COORDINATION

Schedule surgery cases in surgical system

Confirm PCP clearance and follow up

Obtain and transmit H&Ps

Communicate with surgery center

Prepare surgical packets

Handle pre-op reminder calls

Process work/FMLA notes



INSURANCE & AUTHORIZATIONS



Verify benefits for visits, injections, and surgery

Estimate patient out-of-pocket costs

Check drug coverage (J-codes, specialty medications)

Coordinate secondary insurance coverage

Submit and track prior authorizations (drugs & surgery)

Arrange peer-to-peer reviews when needed



REFERRALS & DOCUMENTATION



Ensure consult letters are sent

Track referring providers

Support scribing and note completion remotely - Possibly in the future



REQUIRED SKILLS (MUST HAVE)



Strong spoken and written English (clear, professional)

Experience in medical office workflow

Knowledge of insurance verification and prior authorizations

Comfortable discussing finances with patients

Organized, detail-oriented, reliable

Tech-savvy (EMR systems, scheduling software, portals)



APPLICATION REQUIREMENT



To be considered, applicants must submit a short video (2–3 minutes) introducing themselves in English, describing:

Their medical office experience

Their comfort with patient phone communication

Their experience with insurance/authorizations

This helps us evaluate communication clarity and professionalism.



Employment Details



Full-time, remote position

Long-term role with growth potential

Work directly with physician and office leadership



If you’re highly organized, calm under pressure, and enjoy helping a medical team run smoothly behind the scenes, we would love to meet you.

title: Prospect Research & Email Outreach Assistant
description:
Company: Willow Education (US-based EdTech startup) 

Type: Full-Time (~40 hours/week)

Salary: $1,000-1,200/month (based on experience) 

Schedule: Flexible hours with some overlap with US Eastern Time (EST) 

Payment: Bi-weekly (via Wise or PayPal)



About Us

Willow Education is a US-based education technology company helping school districts and education organizations reimagine career readiness for students. We work with large public school districts, charter networks, and education nonprofits across the United States. Our founder has a strong network in the K-12 education space, and we're at a stage where we need help turning that network into a structured, scalable outreach engine.

We're a small, mission-driven team — you'll work directly with our founder (and for the first month with an external consultant) and have real impact on the growth of the company.



The Role

We're looking for a sharp, detail-oriented Lead Research &
 Outreach Assistant to help us identify, research, and reach high-priority prospects in the US education market.

You will both add leads into a mass
 tool (Instantly) AND set up targeted
s for the founder to send. 

You'll be doing thoughtful, personalized research on each lead and drafting tailored
s that our founder reviews and sends.

Quality is important alongside consistent daily output (quantity).

Your core responsibilities:

Review and qualify lead lists — We'll provide you with lists of school districts, education organizations, and potential partners. You'll review them against our Ideal Customer Profile (ICP), flag the strongest prospects, and organize them by priority in our CRM (Day AI).

We will also enable you to research and add new leads. We’ll provide tools for this.

Freckle will be a helpful tool for identifying the right stakeholder,
, LinkedIn for each district.

Research leads using AI tools — Use Claude, ChatGPT, NationGraph, LinkedIn, and Google to build brief research dossiers on priority leads. This means finding the right decision-maker, understanding what the district or organization cares about, identifying recent news or initiatives, and noting anything that makes the outreach more relevant.

Draft 25 personalized
s per day — Based on your research, draft short, personalized outreach
s (2-3 paragraphs each MAX) for our founder to review and send. These CAN use templated sections, but need to be highly personalized and reference something specific about the recipient and/or their organization. 

Maintain and update the CRM — Log your activity in Day AI. Track which leads have been contacted, what stage they're in, and flag any responses or engagement signals for follow-up.

Flag warm signals — When someone opens an
 multiple times, clicks a link, or replies, flag it immediately so our founder can follow up while the lead is warm. (we’re also looking to integrate LinkedIn engagement and webinar RSVPs too)



What a Typical Day Looks Like

Check an Excel sheet for new leads (15 min)

Research 25–30 leads using AI tools and public sources (~2 hours) ? if Excel has been updated, use regular instructions (go through the country’s largest districts in order by number of students; 
)

Draft 25 personalized
s in founder’s
 inbox and queue them for founder review (~2 hours)

Update the CRM with activity and notes (30 min)

Send a brief daily summary via Slack — leads researched,
s drafted, signals flagged (15 min)



Required Skills

Excellent written English — You'll be drafting
s to senior education leaders in the US. Grammar, tone, and professionalism matter.

Experience with AI tools — You should be comfortable prompting Claude, ChatGPT, or similar LLMs to do research, summarize information, and draft copy. If you already use AI daily in your workflow, that's a big plus. You’ll also learn to use NationGraph a tool specifically for researching education and government institutions.

Research skills — Ability to quickly find relevant information about a person or organization using LinkedIn, Google, news sites, and specialized databases.

Attention to detail — Each
 needs to feel personalized and accurate. Sending the wrong name or referencing the wrong school district is a dealbreaker.

Self-starter — You'll get a framework and training, but day-to-day you need to manage your own time and output without constant supervision.

Comfortable with CRM tools — Experience with any CRM (HubSpot, Pipedrive, Streak, Monday, etc.) is fine. We use Day AI — it's intuitive and we'll train you on it.

Nice-to-Have

Experience in B2B lead generation or cold
 outreach

Familiarity with the US education market (K-12, school districts, charter networks)

Experience with tools like Instantly, Apollo, or LinkedIn Sales Navigator

Experience working with a US-based startup or founder directly

Please apply with 7 Apply Points 



What We Offer

A long-term role with a growing company (this is not a one-off project)

Direct access to the founder — your work has immediate, visible impact

Training on our outreach framework and tools

Clear daily expectations (25
s/day) with no micromanagement

title: Experienced Funnel Builder – Funnelish (E-commerce / Dropshipping)

How to Apply

title: Personal Injury Case Manager
description:
PERSONAL INJURY CASE MANAGER - Law Firm



This position will start out part-time and transition into a full-time position (40 hours per week) for the right candidate. There is a 6 week probationary period in which the ideal candidate will receive $4.50 USD per hour. After the probationary period, the ideal candidate's pay will increase up to $6.25 USD per hour. 



This position requires working in Eastern Standard Time (UTC -5) from 8:30 am - 5:00 pm EST.



Brodie Law Group is seeking a Personal Injury Case Manager to join our team and support our attorneys and paralegals in fighting for the rights of injured clients. In this role, you’ll be responsible for managing personal injury cases from intake to resolution, ensuring clients receive the care, attention, and advocacy they deserve.



The ideal candidate will have at least 2 years experience as a personal injury case manager. 



Do you thrive in a fast-paced environment where attention to detail and organization are essential?



Are you a compassionate and proactive professional who enjoys guiding clients through challenging situations?



Do you take pride in your ability to manage cases effectively while providing top-tier client service?



Why Join Us?



At Brodie Law Group, we don’t just handle cases, we change lives. Our firm is dedicated to fierce advocacy and unparalleled client service, ensuring that injury victims get the justice and compensation they deserve.



Unlike firms that treat clients like case numbers, we take a personalized approach, guiding them through every step of their claim. Our team values collaboration, hard work, and a relentless commitment to winning.



This is more than just a job, it’s an opportunity to join a law firm that is redefining the personal injury experience. If you want to be part of a team that fights hard and wins big, we’d love to hear from you!



**

IMPORTANT: TO APPLY

You will be evaluated and vetted based on your attention to detail. 

DO NOT apply here, please go to 
/careers for step-by-step instructions on how to apply. 

**



What You’ll Do:



• Manage personal injury cases from intake to settlement or litigation.

• Communicate regularly with clients, insurance companies, medical providers, and attorneys.

• Ensure all case files are organized, accurate, and up-to-date.

• Obtain and review medical records and bills to support claims.

• Prepare demand packages and assist in negotiating settlements.

• Track case deadlines and assist attorneys in preparing for hearings, mediations, and trials.

• Guide clients through the personal injury process with professionalism and empathy.

• Coordinate medical treatment for clients.

• Work closely with attorneys to ensure the best possible outcomes for clients.



What We’re Looking For:



• A strong communicator who can build trust with clients and handle sensitive conversations with care.

• An organized and detail-oriented professional who can manage multiple cases efficiently.

• A proactive problem solver who anticipates next steps and keeps cases moving.

• Experience in personal injury case management (preferred, but not required).

• Familiarity with legal terminology, medical records, and insurance claims.

• Tech-savvy with the ability to learn new case management software.

• Ability to work independently and as part of a team in a fast-paced environment.



If you’re looking for a boring, easy job, this isn’t it. We put 110% into everything we do because winning matters.

If you want to be part of a recognized, driven, and results-oriented team, we can’t wait to hear from you.



About Brodie Law Group



Brodie Law Group is a dynamic law firm in Georgia, United States, specializing in personal injury and family law litigation. We serve clients throughout Georgia, United States, providing aggressive and compassionate representation to those who need it most.



We don’t just take cases, we take a stand for our clients.



**

IMPORTANT: TO APPLY

You will be evaluated and vetted based on your attention to detail. 

DO NOT apply here, please go to 
/careers for step-by-step instructions on how to apply. 

**



If you’re organized, excellent in English, and ready to grow with a U.S.-based firm that values excellence and empathy, apply today. We can’t wait to meet you.



All new hires are subjected to a 6 week probationary period.

title: Social Media Marketing VA
description:
Social Media Marketing VA (Full-Time, Remote)



Platforms: Instagram, X 
), TikTok, Pinterest, LinkedIn

Schedule: Monday–Friday | 9:00 AM–5:00 PM EST (New York Time)



About the Role



We are hiring full-time Social Media Marketing VA to manage and grow client social media accounts across Instagram, X 
), TikTok, Pinterest, and LinkedIn.



This is a hands-on execution role, not a content-only or automation-based position.

No bots. No automation tools. No shortcuts.

Follows / unfollows

Likes and comments

Story interactions, profile visits, community engagement

etings

mbers have been with us for 6+ years, and we value long-term collaboration, consistency, and accountability.

If you are interested in this position and meet all the requirements above, please

title: Website Designer / UI Designer / Graphics Designer - ET Timezone (USA)
description:

(Fastest responses to those that complete the application form)



Need 3 Designers ASAP!



===================

TYPE OF DESIGN TASKS:

===================

The FULL-TIME Designer will be responsible for the following:

 ads - we create the most interesting, eye-catching
 ads for our 
t the stock, boring stuff you see. We're building our business based on guaranteeing that our ads will convert better into more sales.

===================

3) Good internet

mbers have worked with us for many years.

===================

ABOUT US

===================

Our team is 100% remote with a home base in NJ however tea
mbers are scattered around the world including Philippines, Guam, India, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Armenia, and USA. We have an interesting team of marketers and techies, and are looking for a top-notch designers who wants a long-term position with job security.

Therefore, we are not a good fit for the person who wants to be 'average' or 'content' with their current skills. We're constantly learning, improving, and impressing.



All tea
mbers are paid every month via PayPal. Guaranteed.

title: Executive Assistant to Financial Advisor
description:
Executive Assistant to Financial Advisor

We are a financial advisory firm serving dentists nationwide. We are seeking a high-level Executive Assistant to work directly with a senior advisor in a fast-paced, client-focused environment.



This is not a task-only admin role. This position is designed for someone who can function as a true right-hand partner. Even though this is a remote position, we need someone who works alongside the advisor in real time, helping manage priorities, follow ups, and execution that come out of ongoing client relationships.



The goal is simple: create clarity, structure, and consistent execution so nothing slips and everything moves forward.



Work Schedule

Full-time



9:00 am to 5:00 pm US Mountain Time



Must be available and responsive during those hours



Core Responsibilities

1. Post-Meeting Execution

Review meeting transcripts and AI-generated notes



Extract clear action items, deadlines, and ownership



Enter and track tasks in the project management system



Ensure all follow ups are documented and assigned



Proactively monitor and close open loops



2. Task and Workflow Management

Organize and prioritize tasks fro
etings,
, and internal discussions



Maintain a centralized, reliable task system



Create clarity around next steps



Help the advisor focus on high-value client work



3. System Creation and Reinforcement

Identify gaps where systems do not exist



Help build and document standard operating procedures



Improve existing workflows



Reinforce compliance with established processes



Drive consistency across recurring activities



4. Organizational and Operational Support

Assist with weekly planning and prioritization



Prepare checklists and structured workflows



Maintain organized digital files and documentation



Create repeatable processes for recurring client work



What We Are Really Looking For

This role requires someone who thinks in systems and enjoys bringing order to complexity.



You should be:



Proactive rather than reactive



Comfortable working closely with a driven advisor



Highly detail-oriented



Strong at summarizing and organizing information



Confident enough to ask clarifying questions



Able to think one or two steps ahead



We are looking for someone who wants to operate as a partner, not just complete assigned tasks.



Communication Requirements

Fluent, natural English, written and spoken



Clear, professional communication style



Comfortable handling client-related information



Able to summarize conversations accurately and concisely



Ideal Background

3+ years supporting an executive, advisor, or business owner



Strong experience with task management tools such as Asana, ClickUp, Monday, or similar



Experience documenting and building processes



Comfortable in a fast-paced professional services environment



Bonus:



Experience in financial services



Familiarity with CRM systems



Experience supporting client-facing professionals



What Success Looks Like in 90 Days

All meeting transcripts consistently converted into clear, tracked action items



A clean, reliable task system is in place and actively used



Follow ups are proactive, not reactive



Key workflows are documented



The advisor feels organized, prepared, and in control

title: Performance Media Buyer & Tracking Specialist
description:
ABOUT INUMIN MEDIA

Inumin Media is a digital marketing agency helping businesses grow through paid ads, content, and website systems. Our clients run Google Ads and
/Instagram Ads. You will manage campaigns, handle tracking setups, fix attribution issues, and deliver clear performance reporting.



This role requires strong technical skill, clear thinking, and fast execution. You must be comfortable working inside Google Ads, Meta Ads Manager, GTM, GA4, and GSC.



––––––––––

ROLE OVERVIEW

You will own ad strategy, campaign setup, technical tracking, optimization, creative direction, and reporting. You must understand how traffic, tracking, and conversions work together. You will support both Inumin Media and our clients across various industries.



You must be comfortable working during Alberta, Canada business hours for alignment calls.



––––––––––

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



CAMPAIGN STRATEGY

• Build advertising strategies based on client goals

• Break down campaigns into simple actionable plans

• Conduct keyword research, audience research, and competitor analysis

• Proactively recommend improvements to performance, tracking, and funnels



CAMPAIGN SETUP

• Launch and manage Google Ads, Meta Ads, and IG campaigns

• Set up campaign structures, budgets, targeting, placements

• Write headlines, descriptions, and primary text

• Build custom audiences, remarketing audiences, and lookalikes

• Create ad variations and request creative assets when needed



TECHNICAL SETUP & TRACKING (CRITICAL DUTY)

You must fully own all tracking and event configuration:

• Build and configure new GTM containers

• Set up GA4 events, parameters, conversions

• Configure Google Ads conversion tracking

• Implement Meta Pixel and CAPI

• Build custom event triggers (form submissions, button clicks, add-to-cart, checkout steps, lead forms, quizzes, scroll depth)

• Use DebugView, GTM Preview, and Test Events to confirm functionality

• Connect GA4, Google Ads, GTM, and GSC

• Build Looker Studio dashboards

• Troubleshoot attribution discrepancies

• Maintain documentation for each client setup



OPTIMIZATION

• Review performance daily

• Optimize bids, budgets, keywords, audiences

• Split test creatives, headlines, hooks, and angles

• Fix weak links in funnels (landing pages, load speed, messaging)

• Improve CTR, CPA, ROAS, and overall conversion flow



REPORTING

• Build weekly performance reports

• Provide clear explanations and next-steps

• Highlight what worked, what failed, and what needs improvement

• Present results internally or to clients when needed



COLLABORATION

• Work with the creative team when new visuals or videos are required

• Provide clear instructions and samples for ad creators

• Communicate with the team using Loom videos, messages, and meetings



––––––––––

REQUIREMENTS



EXPERIENCE

• 2+ years running active Google Ads and Meta Ads campaigns

• Strong hands-on experience with GTM, GA4, conversion events, and debugging

• Experience managing budgets of at least $1,000–$10,000 per month

• Experience handling multiple accounts at once



SKILLS

• Strong analytical skills

• Good ad copywriting

• Good creative judgment

• Fast and organized workflow

• Strong English communication

• Ability to work without micro-management



TOOLS

• Google Ads

• Meta Ads Manager

• Tag Manager

• GA4

• Search Console

• Looker Studio

• Canva (or similar tools)



WORK STYLE

• You communicate clearly

• You ask questions early

• You take initiative

• You show your work with screenshots or Loom videos

• You document setups

• You move quickly during setup and optimization

• You can work during Alberta (Canada) time zone for meetings



––––––––––

WHAT YOU WILL NOT DO

• You will not wait for Gerald to figure out tracking

• You will not leave conversion events undone or untested

• You will not delay tasks without explanation

• You will not guess or assume—always ask

• You will not require constant reminders



––––––––––

TO APPLY

Send the following:

	1.	Resume/CV

	2.	1–2 minute video introducing yourself

	3.	Short breakdown of your experience with Google Ads, Meta Ads, GTM, and GA4

	4.	Internet speed test link

	5.	Portfolio (screenshots of ads, dashboards, results, etc.)

	6.	Your location and confirmation you can work Alberta business hours

title: Short-Form Content Curator
description:
Attention, Rockstars! We’re looking for a full-time Short-Form Content Curator. This role is responsible for reviewing raw video content and identifying key segments for short-form and long-form video production. This role is essential in curating compelling content that aligns with the company’s storytelling and branding efforts. The selected clips are supplied to the Virality Engineer for quality assessment and final approval before production.



Responsibilities:

Review raw video footage and identify engaging 
nts for content creation.

Timestamp and categorize video segments for short-form and long-form edits.

Collaborate closely with the Marketing Director to determine the viability of selected content, upcoming and current projects.

Ensure thorough content review and maximize the use of available footage.

Maintain and organize content using the Asana Video Project Board.

Assist in repurposing content for multiple platforms, including TikTok, YouTube, and marketing campaigns.

Work alongside other marketing units such as Graphic Design and Social Media to support content strategy.

Track and update project progress, ensuring deadlines are met.

Maintain proper organization of raw assets in designated storage locations.



Qualifications/Requirements:

Strong understanding of VIDEO CONTENT and storytelling techniques.

Ability to work collaboratively with various teams.

Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

Experience using project management tools (e.g., Asana) preferred.

Knowledge of digital marketing and social media trends is a plus.



Our Purpose:

To develop and market products that help individuals to grow in multiple facets in life.

To Increase awareness and skill sets for the public we serve.

To make a significant difference in the quality of life of people not reaching their potential and those often left behind.

To produce and develop Millionaire closers.



By applying, you will show that you are committed to being a SUCCESS, and your success is important to us. I believe in supporting our clients and helping associates achieve their financial goals.



The position is Full-Time (remote) between the hours of 8:00AM - 5:00PM Pacific Standard Time, Monday through Friday.

.



A CULTURE LIKE NO OTHER!

Limelight Media has a culture like no other! Our mission is to spread positivity and create an uplifting environment for all of our employees. We offer a Disneyland-like experience for everyone we engage with - employees, students, business partners and anyone else we come into contact with. At our facility you will find a fun atmosphere that consists of energetic employees, arcade games, basketball hoops, food and drinks, 85 inch TVs and more! Come be a part of something great!!!

description:
We're looking for a Scriptwriter & Clip Researcher to create engaging voiceover scripts for our YouTube documentary 

channel. 





We want to create videos between a length of 30 till 45 minutes. And we need around 1500 words with clip relevant footage. 



Since scriptwriting can be AI-assisted, the main work is:



- Watch reference videos from channels we provide or search for similar channels. 

- Research and identify relevant footage/clips

- Write compelling voiceover scripts that match the footage (Using ai) 



Requirements:

- Experience with AI voiceover tools (or willing to learn)

- Understanding of what keeps YouTube viewers engaged

- Self-starter who can work independently



To Apply, Include:



2 or 3 Writing samples or previous scripts.

Your scriptwriting experience. 

How many scripts you can deliver per week in combination with clip research? 



What We Offer:

Consistent work for the right person

Budget: Per script & Clipresearch 5$ 



This is a long-term opportunity. We need someone who understands storytelling and can create scripts that keep viewers hooked from start to finish.

title: Digital Operations VA  |Contract | Part-Time | Ongoing
description:
Jennie Wright Marketing & Strategy is hiring a highly capable, digitally fluent Virtual Assistant to support content, platform management, and backend execution across multiple client accounts and internal projects.



This is not a beginner VA role.



We are looking for someone who understands how digital businesses actually run.



You will be supporting a marketing and strategy company that works with events, podcasts, thought leaders, healthcare-adjacent brands, and professional service businesses. The work is detail-oriented, fast-moving, and visible to clients.

If you like structure, responsibility, and doing work that actually matters, keep reading.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

You will support both internal projects and client-facing work.



This includes:

Content & Blog Support

Formatting and publishing blog posts in WordPress

Optimizing posts with proper headings, spacing, links, and images

Uploading featured images and graphics (created in Canva or provided)

Embedding videos, podcasts, and lead magnets

Ensuring posts are clean, consistent, and error-free

Social & Scheduling

Scheduling posts in Go High Level (GHL) and/or other platforms

Loading captions and images correctly

Ensuring formatting translates properly across platforms

Tracking publishing calendars

Double-checking links and CTAs

Canva Support

Making simple but polished graphics based on brand guidelines

Repurposing quotes into social graphics

Updating PDFs or slide decks with minor edits

Resizing assets for multiple platforms

Platform & Backend Support

Updating landing pages in WordPress or GHL

Loading lead magnets and automations in GHL

Testing forms and
 sequences

Ensuring opt-ins and workflows function correctly

Managing shared team
 inbox

Advanced VA Support

Creating SOP documents

Organizing Google Drive folders

Tracking deadlines and follow-ups

Supporting podcast uploads and show notes formatting

Light research as needed

Proactively flagging issues before they become problems

You are not just clicking buttons.

You are maintaining quality control across the business.



What We’re Looking For

This role is best suited for someone who already has experience supporting digital businesses and understands marketing context.



You must:

Be fluent in English (written and spoken)

Be confident communicating in Slack and on Zoom

Have strong WordPress experience

Be comfortable in Canva (not just templates — clean layouts)

Understand GHL basics (posting, scheduling, simple workflows)

Be detail-oriented and notice inconsistencies

Follow instructions carefully without needing constant reminders

Hit deadlines consistently

Work professionally and respectfully with the team



Bonus if you:

Have SEO familiarity

Understand podcast publishing workflows

Have experience with digital launches or summits

Can anticipate needs without being prompted



How We Work

We are a boutique marketing and strategy company based in Ontario, Canada, serving clients in healthcare, events, professional services, and thought leadership.



We operate with:

Clear expectations

Direct communication

Accountability

Mutual respect

No micromanaging, but strong ownership



You will report to our Business Operations Lead and collaborate with our team regularly.

If you do excellent work, communicate well, and take initiative, there is long-term opportunity here.

If you need constant supervision or prefer highly repetitive work only, this may not be the right fit.



Time & Structure

Contract role

Part-time hours to start

Some EST overlap required

title: Gaming YouTube Script Writer (HSR, ZZZ, JRPGs)
description:
A dream job for a gamer who loves to write!



I run a growing YouTube channel focused on gacha games and JRPGs. I’m looking for a script writer who genuinely loves gaming and can turn messy, complex game info (kits, lore, story beats, community drama, patch changes) into scripts that are easy to follow, entertaining and accurate.



YOU WILL BE WRITING ACROSS:

- Zenless Zone Zero (required deep knowledge)

- Honkai: Star Rail (required deep knowledge)

- JRPGs and other upcoming games (example: a plot summary for a Dragon Quest remaster)

- Future games (example: Ananta)



One week you might write a ZZZ character lore breakdown and a “push or skip” video for Honkai Star Rail. The next week you might write a story summary or “what you need to know” video for a completely different game.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

Write YouTube scripts for:



- Character guides, lore explainers, “pull or skip”, patch overviews and other stuff that audiences might like

- Plot summaries and recaps (spoiler-safe when required)

- Short-form scripts (Shorts/Reels style)

- Take complicated mechanics or lore and make them simple for everyday viewers

- Match different tones depending on the audience and video goal (funny, serious, hype, explanatory, story-time)

- Suggest video opportunities based on what’s trending in the games we cover (patch cycles, banners, drama, community interest, search demand)



REQUIRED:

- No agency submissions - I’m looking for individuals who want to be part of a team yet enjoy working from home

- No AI-written scripts: when it comes to game guides, AI is often inaccurate and misses nuance. I’m hiring a human writer for a reason.

- Strong existing knowledge of Zenless Zone Zero and Honkai: Star Rail, including characters and lore (you will be asked specific questions to confirm this)

- Adaptable to learning new games fast

- Able to write clearly and logically, with strong pacing and hooks

- Fast delivery without sacrificing quality

- A PC, mobile device or console capable of playing the games we cover (ZZZ, HSR, and upcoming titles). Must be able to easily download and play new games that may need coverage.



NICE TO HAVE:

- A sense of humour 

- You already watch gaming YouTube and understand retention, hooks, pacing and “why people keep watching”

- You write and read A LOT

- You can pitch strong titles hooks, and thumbnail text options



PAY STRUCTURE (PATHWAY):

This role starts as per-script, with clear upside for great work.



Step 1: 8-week paid trial (pay-per-script)



- Pay per script based on length/format

- Clear deadlines agreed before each script

- Must be open to revisions and feedback (especially the first few weeks to get the tone of voice right with the YouTube channel)



Step 2: If we work well together



- We move to a small monthly retainer for a set number of scripts (still part-time), with extra scripts priced at the same per-script rate.



To apply: include your preferred rates for:



1. Your per-script rate (in PHP) for each format:



3–5 min script: $___

6–10 min script: $___

10–30 min script: $___



2. Your preferred monthly retainer after the trial (and what it includes):



“$___/month for ___ scripts” (tell me the mix and revision limits)





HOW TO APPLY



Send:

 1. A short intro about you and your gaming background

 2. Your writing samples (scripts preferred, otherwise any strong writing)

 3. Your rates per script length (listed above)

 4. Your weekly availability and typical turnaround time per script

 5. Confirm what device you use to play ZZZ/HSR (PC/mobile/console)

 6. Answer the short TEST TASKS below (copy/paste responses in your application)





TEST TASKS:

1. What’s your Honkai Star Rail or Zenless Zone Zero UID and region?

2.Describe the entire plot of Honkai Star Rail’s Amphoreus in 3 sentences or less. And make it personal and funny.

3. What's your favourite side quest in HSR or ZZZ, and why?

4. What’s the first JRPG you ever played, and what did you enjoy most about it?

5. Writing task: In
words only, explain how Honkai Star Rail’s Cyrene works to a brand new player.



NO AI-WRITTEN RESPONSES PLEASE! Any AI detection will result in the immediate rejection of your application.

title: Social Media Growth Lead & Video Editing Specialist
description:
Role Overview:

Are you a creative storyteller who lives and breathes social media trends? We are looking for a high-level Social Media VA & Video Editor to join our team and help scale the brand of Molly Pelletier, RD. 



This is not a passive posting role. We need a self-directed creator who can take long-form content, find the "gold," and turn it into high-performing Reels, TikToks, and Shorts. You will have a direct seat at the table with the founder, helping to shape our content engine and community.



What You’ll Do (Responsibilities):



- Video Mastery: Edit long-form YouTube videos into high-impact short-form clips (IG Reels, TikTok, YT Shorts) using FinalCut/ CapCut/ similar software. Occasional long-form edits may also be asked. 



- Creative Ideation: 
 and the current landscape to pitch hooks and narratives that drive engagement.



- Content Management: Plan and maintain the monthly content calendar; write captions using AI tools (fine-tuned to sound like Molly); and schedule all posts.



- Community Growth/Engagement: Manage engagement by replying to comments and messages 



- Performance Tracking: Monitor analytics to suggest improvements based on what the data is telling us.



- Brand Support: Assist with YouTube thumbnails and occasional long-form strategy. As well as occasionally posting our blogs/articles on various platforms i.e.
 and 
. 



Why This Role Is Special:



- Direct Impact: Work directly with the founder—no layers of management.



- Creative Freedom: You aren't just an order-taker; you are a partner in the creative process.



- Established Foundation: The brand already has strong traction with over half a million followers across platforms; your work will be seen by a large, engaged audience.



- Growth Potential: As the content engine scales, so does your role and responsibility. This position is starting as a part-time role with the potential to increase to full-time. 



The Ideal Candidate (Requirements):

- Editing Whiz: Expert-level skills in FinalCut (or similar), with a sharp eye for hooks, pacing, subtitles, and motion graphics.



- Strategic Thinker: You understand why a video goes viral and how to hook an audience in the first 3 seconds.



- AI-Savvy: Proficient in using AI tools to streamline workflows while maintaining a human, authentic brand voice. 



- Self-Directed: You don’t need a micro-manager. You are organized, meet deadlines, and have extreme attention to detail.



- Excellent Communicator: Fluent in English (written and verbal) for both caption writing and team coordination.



- Passionate: You genuinely care about health/wellness content and helping the brand grow.



How to Apply: 

To ensure you have great attention to detail, in addition to your resume, please include the following in your application:



1. Any relevant experience working with creators or brands, and a short note about why this role interests you



2. A link to your portfolio/social media or a folder of short-form videos you have edited.



3. A brief explanation of a social media trend in the gut health niche you’re currently seeing work well.



4. Your favorite AI tool for content creation and how you use it.



5. Important: Put "Growth Specialist Found" in the subject line of your application.

Responsibilities and Duties

* Creating new ad creatives for our dropshipping products: in Danish and Swedish.

* Swipe ad creatives from competitors

* Implement Direct Response Marketing strategies to convert visitors into customers.

* Design eye-catching advertisements for social media platforms,
 marketing, and website banners.

* Stay updated on industry trends and best practices in digital advertising and design.

Qualifications and Skills



* Proven experience in creating ad creatives.

* Proficiency in graphic design software such as Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) Canva etc. Software that I use myself: Elevenlabs and Clipchamp. But if you prefer to use other software, that would also be fine.

* Strong understanding of digital marketing principles and techniques.

* Excellent communication skills and ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams.

* Detail-oriented with a keen eye for visual aesthetics and design.

* Ability to multitask and prioritize tasks in a fast-paced environment.

* Familiarity with e-commerce platforms and online advertising channels.



Also:

* You do what you say. You are passionate about delivering results and you always finish what you start. - You take pride in being able to keep your word.

* Have a high attention to detail. When it comes to details, nothing gets past you.. and we mean nothing! - So much so that we want you to include "the devil is in the details" as the answer to the first question when you submit your application. Seriously.

* Preferably you have a couple of years experience in this field, and have worked for other dropshipping and e-commerce companies. You must understand how paid advertising works, in the sense that you know how sending traffic to an online store should lead to conversions.



Salary Expectations:

You will start as Trainee Ad Creative Specialist, where you will be working on the side of the company owner with compensation of 5$/hr. You will start as parttimer, but if everything goes well, this can grow into a fulltime job.



We always start with a one-month trial to ensure safety for both parties. After that, we'll have an evaluation to see if both parties would like to proceed to work together.



Benefits:

* Get to work in a young company with lots of ambitions

* Work fully remote

* Get paid every two weeks, instead of once per month (13 times per year)

* Upgrade your knowledge and skills in the fastest growing industry: digital marketing



If you can commit to and live with the following principles, then you are the type of person who will be successful and help our company thrive. If you feel this level of engagement is not right for you or that you're not willing or able to participate with us at this level, we are not a good fit for you.



Our expectation is that you will take the steps necessary to do what you say you are going to do and be accountable for your actions. In other words, live 'Above the line'.



Are you looking for a new adventure? Make sure you apply today!

title: AI Video & Content Creator (Full-Time) | Kling  · NanoBanana Pro · CapCut
description:
The Role

This is a hands-on, output-driven role for someone who genuinely loves working with cutting-edge AI tools, stays ahead of the curve, and takes pride in the quality of what they produce.

Collaborating closely with the team and contributing creative ideas

Good communication skills in English

Curious, fast-learning, and genuinely excited about AI content creation



Bonus: Experience in E-commerce or DTC content is required



Salary & Growth Path

Trial period: €3.50/hr

Post-trial: €3.75/hr — and this is just the beginning



We're a growing company, and we reward people who grow with us. As your skills develop and the business scales, your rate increases alongside it. Tea
mbers who show initiative, quality, and consistency don't stay at the same rate for long. We actively look for reasons to pay people more — not reasons to keep them where they are.

If you're someone who delivers and keeps getting better, your income will reflect that.



We don't believe in keeping good people underpaid. If you perform, you get rewarded — quickly and consistently.



Why Join Us?



???? Real growth opportunities — We scale fast and promote from within. Creative leads, department heads, manager roles — these are real paths for the right person.

???? Your income grows with you — Strong performance is rewarded immediately, and long-term growth is built into how we operate.

???? We invest in your development — SOPs, onboarding calls, and ongoing team support so you're never figuring things out alone.

???? A team that actually cares — We're building a genuine community, not just a workforce. Our team supports each other, and that's something we actively protect.

????? Systems already in place — You won't be starting from scratch. Clear processes and tools are ready for you from day one.





About Us

We're a fast-growing DTC E-commerce brand that's scaling hard — and we're building the team to match. Many of our tea
mbers are based in the Philippines, and we're proud of the culture and community we're creating together. We're not looking to fill a seat. We're looking for someone who wants to grow with us long-term.



???? Application Task — This Is Important, Please Read

To apply for this role, we ask you to complete a short creative task. This is your opportunity to show us what you can do.

Your task:

Create a 5–7 second AI-generated video of a person walking confidently through a busy crowd in a city, with people in the crowd turning to look at them as they pass.

For reference, here is an example of the style and quality we're looking for:

???? [
]

Please aim to match or exceed the quality shown. We're looking for smooth, realistic footage with strong visual storytelling — in just a few seconds.



How to submit:

- Upload your video to Google Drive

- Make sure the link is set to "Anyone with the link can view"

- Include the link in your application





How to Apply

Please send us:

- A short intro about yourself and your experience with AI video tools

- Your Google Drive link with the completed task video

- Any additional portfolio work you'd like to share (optional but welcome)

- Your availability to start



We review every application personally and get back to serious candidates quickly.

title: Project & Commercial Lifecycle Support Coordinator
description:
1. Company Overview



Air Rite Mechanical Services is a 35-year established commercial & industrial HVAC contractor operating across South East Queensland.



We manage multiple concurrent projects ranging from $50k to $2.5m and are currently operating with hybrid Estimator / Project Managers. As we scale, we are introducing structured lifecycle support to reduce reactive workload and increase commercial discipline.



This role is a key operational support position within the business.



2. Role Objective



To provide structured administrative and workflow support across the full project lifecycle:



• Estimating

• Project Award

• Project Delivery



The primary purpose is to:



Reduce reactive workload for PMs

Enforce supplier and tender follow-up discipline

Maintain live tracking registers

Protect commercial timeframes

This is not a personal assistant role and does not involve commercial decision-making.



3. Reporting Structure



Reports to: Director / Senior PM (Business Partner)

Supports: 2 x Hybrid Estimator / Project Managers



4. Core Responsibilities



A. Estimating Support



Log incoming RFQs

Create structured tender folders

Issue RFQs to PM-approved suppliers

Track 3-quote compliance

Follow up supplier pricing deadlines

Maintain live tender pipeline register

Send structured tender follow-up
s 

Collate and format tender submissions



B. Project Award Support



Create project folder structure

Set up RFI register

Set up variation register structure (admin only)

Create procurement tracker

Extract claim schedule from contract

Set claim reminders

Assist with system setup (Simpro entry if required)



C. Delivery Support



Track supplier quotes and procurement deadlines

Reissue drawings post-award for reprice

Maintain RFI register

Update variation tracking register (admin only)

Track variation ageing (>21 days)

Send claim reminders (7 days prior)

Assist with claim backup collation

Track payment due dates



D. Shared Inbox Support



Monitor shared
's

Forward and categorise incoming enquiries

Flag urgent items



5. What This Role Does NOT Do



No commercial negotiation

No contract interpretation

No pricing decisions

No direct builder negotiation

The role tracks, organises and escalates only.



6. Required Skills & Experience



Essential:



Strong administrative discipline

Experience supporting construction, engineering or trade-based businesses

Advanced organisational skills

High attention to detail

Ability to manage multiple live workflows

Confident written English communication

Proficient in Excel and shared drive systems

Comfortable working within structured processes



Highly Regarded:



Experience in construction / mechanical services

Experience with RFQs and procurement processes

Familiarity with project registers

Experience with Simpro or similar job management systems



7. Candidate Profile



We are seeking someone who:



Is structured and process-driven

Is comfortable enforcing follow-up discipline

Is not intimidated by senior operators

Can work independently

Understands deadlines matter commercially

Is proactive but not overreaching

This role requires maturity and discipline, not creativity.





9. Working Arrangement



Full-time role

Overlapping hours with AEST required

Daily communication via Teams /

Access to shared drive, Simpro and registers



10. Cultural Fit



Air Rite is a structured but entrepreneurial business. The successful candidate must be:



Accountable

Direct

Calm under pressure

Comfortable in a fast-paced environment

Willing to follow structured SOPs

title: Content Marketing Manager
description:
About Inflight

Inflight is an aviation community offering Flight Training, FBO services, Aircraft Maintenance, and a 24/7 members-only social lounge called Cloud 1941. We operate on a member-exclusive model—everything we do is built around creating an incredible experience for our aviation community.



We're a community of people who love aviation, and our marketing needs to reflect that—authentic, real, and grounded in the actual experiences of our members.



The Role

We're looking for a Marketing Director to own the day-to-day execution of our marketing efforts. You'll be the central hub: managing content production, coordinating with members and contractors, and keeping our brand consistent across every channel.



This is a hands-on execution role. Our leadership team sets the strategic direction, but your ideas, insights, and input on what's working will absolutely shape what we do. You'll be the person who makes it all happen—and we want you in the conversation, not just taking orders.



What You'll Do

Content Management & Production



Manage a content calendar across all platforms (social media,
, website, blog)

Edit and produce video content from raw footage submitted by community members (short-form for social, longer edits for YouTube/website)

Edit and retouch photos for use across marketing channels

Create graphics for social media posts,
 headers, website banners, and promotional materials

Write and publish blog posts about aviation topics, community events, member spotlights, and flight training

Build and send
 campaigns (newsletters, promotions, member updates)

Community Content Program



Run our member content submission program—our community members submit videos and photos from their flights, time in Cloud 1941, training sessions, and more

Curate and organize incoming submissions

Select winning content each month and coordinate flight credit rewards

Turn raw member content into polished, on-brand marketing assets

Coordination & Project Management



Serve as the primary point of contact for our outsourced SEO and Google Ads contractors

Coordinate deliverables, timelines, and reporting between contractors and our leadership team

Track marketing performance metrics and prepare simple reports

Manage our social media posting schedule and engagement

What We're Looking For

Must-Have Skills



Experience in digital marketing, content management, or a similar role

Strong video editing skills

Photo editing proficiency

Graphic design ability for social media and
 assets

Experience managing social media accounts for a brand

 marketing experience

Excellent written English

Highly organized with strong project management habits

Comfortable working independently and managing your own schedule within the required overlap hours

Nice-to-Have



Experience with WordPress or similar CMS platforms

Basic understanding of SEO principles

Experience coordinating with third-party contractors or agencies

Familiarity with aviation, flight training, or membership-based businesses

Experience with analytics tools (Google Analytics, social media insights)

Knowledge of short-form video trends (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

Tools You'll Likely Use

Fima / Canva / Adobe Creative Suite (graphics)

Premiere Pro, CapCut, or DaVinci Resolve (video)

Mailchimp 
)

WordPress (website/blog)

Google Workspace (docs, sheets, communication)

Social media scheduling tools

Project management tools (Notion)

Why This Role Is Great

You're joining a passionate aviation community, not a faceless corporation

Real creative ownership — you'll shape how the world sees Inflight

Work with authentic, exciting content (people flying planes, hanging out in a lounge, completing maintenance on aircraft, people doing what they love with others who share the same interest)

Stable, full-time position with a growing US-based company

Room to grow as Inflight grows

How to Apply

Send us the following:



Your resume

A portfolio or samples showing your video editing, graphic design, and/or content work

Links to any social media accounts or brands you've managed

A short note (2–3 sentences) telling us why this role interests you

If you're someone who gets excited about creating great content and working with a community of aviation enthusiasts, we want to hear from you!

title: Part-Time UI/UX Designer (20 hrs/week)

We are a Berlin-based B2B SaaS company running two products in the performance marketing space. We are looking for a talented UI/UX designer to join our fully remote team on a permanent part-time basis (20 hours per week).

-Design website pages for desktop and mobile (landing pages, product pages, blog layouts)

-Support web application design in Figma using Autolayout and component-based workflows

-Create presentations and sales materials

-Design custom illustrations for marketing and product use

-Video editing skills (potential future task)

Compensation

We pay via international bank transfer.

-Fully remote work

title: Credit Repair Lead Generator & Sales Closer (Remote | Commission + Base)

 groups

, phone number for enrollment

title: Real Estate Deal Analysis / Property Feasibility VA
description:
We are an Australian property development company looking for a highly analytical Virtual Assistant to assist with real estate deal analysis and feasibility studies.



You will be responsible for analysing residential property opportunities across Queensland and other Australian regions and building detailed feasibility reports to determine if deals meet our required profit margins.



This is NOT a basic admin role. We are looking for someone strong with numbers, spreadsheets, and research.



Responsibilities:

 • Research suburb data (median price, days on market, demand trends)

 • Analyse comparable sales using Australian real estate platforms

 • Build detailed feasibility spreadsheets (purchase price, renovation costs, holding costs, selling costs, profit margins, ROI)

 • Input and structure renovation budgets

 • Calculate LVR, equity splits, investor returns (e.g., 15% p.a. structures)

 • Present clean, professional summary reports

 • Deliver completed feasibility reports within 72 hours of property submission



Requirements:

 • Strong Excel or Google Sheets skills (advanced formulas required)

 • Experience with real estate analysis (preferred)

 • Strong attention to detail

 • Ability to follow financial models and refine them

 • Excellent written English

 • Fast turnaround and reliable communication



Bonus if you have:

 • Experience analysing Australian property

 • Experience with development or renovation feasibility models

 • Understanding of ROI, IRR, LVR, and investor structuring



We are looking for someone long-term who can grow with our company.



To apply, please answer:

 1. Have you built property feasibility reports before?

 2. What spreadsheet formulas are you strongest in?

 3. Provide an example of financial analysis you have completed.

 4. How quickly can you turn around a full feasibility report?





Please begin your application with the word “Allure” so we know you have read this job post carefully.

title: Video Content Editor (Live Commerce & Short-Form Video)
description:
About the Role

We’re looking for a dedicated video content editor to work closely with our founder-led fashion brand, turning our live try-on videos into high-performing content across YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and our Shopify website.

This is not a general VA role.

This role is for someone who understands storytelling, pacing, and hooks, and can confidently identify strong 
nts in long-form video and repurpose them into engaging, platform-ready content.

If you enjoy spotting viral 
nts, crafting clean edits, and helping content perform — you’ll love this role.

What You’ll Be Doing

1. Long-Form Editing (YouTube)

Edit 60–
 minute
 Live try-ons into clean, watchable YouTube videos

Remove dead air, tighten pacing, and improve flow

Add light polish (simple intro/outro if required)

Export in YouTube-ready formats (16:9)

2. Commerce Video Snippets (Shopify / Tolstoy)

Identify product-specific 
nts from live videos

Cut short clips (15–45 seconds) per product

Label clips clearly by product name and benefit

Prepare videos for upload to Shopify via the Tolstoy app

These clips are used to help customers see fit, movement, and feel — they are conversion-focused, not entertainment content.

3. Short-Form Social Content (Instagram Reels / TikTok)

Identify strong 
nts from lives that would work as:

Reels

TikToks

Short social videos

Create tight, engaging edits with:

Strong hooks

Captions / subtitles

Correct vertical formats (9:16)

Suggest which clips have viral potential and why

We’re looking for someone who can think, not just cut.

Who This Role Is For

You’re a great fit if you:

Have strong experience editing short-form social video

Understand what makes a clip engaging in the first 3 seconds

Are comfortable editing talking-head and live footage

Can identify good 
nts without being told timestamps

Enjoy improving content performance, not just delivering files

Skills & Experience

Must Have:

Proven video editing experience (portfolio required)

Experience editing Instagram Reels and/or TikTok

Strong sense of pacing, hooks, and storytelling

Comfortable working with long-form video

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

Nice to Have:

Experience with eCommerce or fashion brands

Familiarity with Shopify or Tolstoy-style video tools

Understanding of conversion vs awareness content

Experience repurposing lives, podcasts, or YouTube content

Tools

You should be comfortable using:

CapCut, Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or similar

Subtitle/caption tools

One Drive 

Ongoing, long-term role

Approx. 10–20 hours per week to start (can grow)

Consistent weekly workload

How to Apply (Important)

Please include:

A short note about your experience with short-form video

Examples of Reels, TikToks, or short-form edits you’ve worked on

A brief answer to this question:

How do you d
 which 
nts from a long video will work best as short-form content?

Applications without examples will not be considered.

Trial Task (Paid)

Shortlisted applicants will be asked to complete a paid test edit using a short section of a live try-on video.

Final note (this matters)

We’re looking for someone who wants to be part of a brand long-term — not just complete tasks, but help our content perform better week after week.

If you love spotting great 
nts and turning them into engaging video, we’d love to hear from you.
