title: AI Platform Engineer
description:
We are building Ava, an in-house AI platform that transforms how our agency operates. Ava combines our proprietary data warehouse (SQL Server with daily Amazon metrics across all clients) with AI agents that automate analysis, generate reports, enforce compliance, and provide strategic recommendations. Our goal: scale from 14 to 40 clients while reducing headcount per client – only possible through intelligent automation.



This is not a typical development role. You will be building the AI infrastructure that powers a next-generation Amazon agency.



Core Responsibilities

Immediate (Month 1–2)

- Finish and deploy our Next.js analytics dashboard (Polaris) – client-facing pages for Customers, Subscribe & Save, and Lifetime Value, powered by SQL Server

- Set up a vector database and RAG pipeline to unify our unstructured knowledge (SOPs, analysis frameworks, compliance documents, meeting transcripts) so AI agents can pull the right context instantly

- Deploy the platform to production so clients can access their dashboards



Near-Term (Month 3–4)

- Build production AI agents from our library of 35+ detailed agent specifications – these handle listing optimization, competitive analysis, keyword strategy, compliance checking, and client reporting

- Implement agent-to-agent handoff systems where one agent’s output feeds into the next (e.g., Semantic Strategist ? Listing Optimizer ? Compliance Checker)

- Build automated alerting – Buy Box monitoring, inventory warnings, performance anomalies – delivered via Slack or



Growth (Month 5+)

- Automated client reporting (daily/weekly performance summaries generated from SQL data)

- Client onboarding automation (call transcripts ? task generation)

- Monthly Business Review deck generation

- Model fine-tuning and optimization as agent usage scales



Required Skills

- 3–5 years of professional software development experience

- Python – you’ll build AI pipelines, data processing scripts, and backend services

- TypeScript / Next.js / React – our dashboard platform runs on Next.js with Server Components

- SQL – comfortable writing complex queries against SQL Server (our data warehouse has 50+ tables)

- LLM API integration – production experience with Claude API, OpenAI API, or similar. Not just calling an API – building reliable systems with error handling, token management, prompt versioning

- Vector databases and RAG – experience with Pinecone, Weaviate, ChromaDB, pgvector, or similar. Understanding of embeddings, chunking strategies, and retrieval quality

- Agent architectures – building multi-step AI workflows with tool use, validation gates, and state management



Nice-to-Have

- Experience with Amazon SP-API or Amazon Seller Central data

- ML fundamentals (fine-tuning, classification, embeddings beyond RAG)

- Cloud deployment (Vercel, AWS, or similar)

- Experience in an agency or e-commerce environment

- Familiarity with MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers



What We’re NOT Looking For

- RPA tool specialists (UiPath, Blue Prism, Automation Anywhere)

- Pure data scientists who don’t build production systems

- Frontend-only developers with no AI/backend experience

- People who need detailed tickets – you’ll get requirements in plain English and figure out the technical approach





Work Details

- Hours: Full-time (40 hrs/week) – some overlap with US Eastern Time required for team syncs

- Compensation: Competitive, based on experience. Please include your rate expectations in your application

- Tools: Claude Code, VS Code, Git, SQL Server Management Studio, Slack



How to Apply

Submit the following:

- Resume or portfolio highlighting AI/ML and full-stack projects you’ve built

- Brief note (2–3 paragraphs) on why this role interests you and what you’d bring to it

Kindly submit your application at 
 using the subject line: Applicant – AI Platform Engineer.

title: Overseas Remote Construction Estimator
description:
Construction Estimator will be responsible for preparing accurate and competitive cost estimates for a variety of projects. This role requires close coordination with project managers, architects, engineers, and subcontractors to ensure timely and precise bid submissions and budgeting. Must have experience with New Jersey/New York (or Tri-State Area) local pricing. 



Key Responsibilities:

• Research and prepare detailed, competitive cost estimates for construction projects.

• Define and clarify the scope of work based on project plans, specifications, and client requirements.

• Perform cost build-up, including pricing for labor, materials, equipment, and subcontractor work.

• Conduct thorough risk analysis and incorporate potential risk costs into estimates.

• Prepare and submit accurate bid proposals within deadlines.

• Identify labor, material, and time requirements for each project.

• Analyze and evaluate subcontractor and supplier offers to ensure cost-efficiency and compliance.

• Review and assess competing bids for scope accuracy, pricing, and qualifications.

• Ensure high levels of accuracy in cost estimating and pricing.

• Input and maintain cost data in the company’s estimating database for future reference and benchmarking.

• Maintain strict client confidentiality and handle sensitive project data with professionalism.

• Build and maintain strong working relationships with subcontractors, vendors, and suppliers.

• Prepare and manage the estimating schedule to align with project timelines and bid due dates.

• Review and interpret construction drawings, blueprints, and technical specifications.

• Select appropriate estimating metrics and benchmarks to ensure accurate and consistent estimates.

Qualifications:

• 3+ years of experience in construction estimating, preferably in both residential and commercial sectors.

• Strong understanding of construction materials, methods, and market pricing.

• Exceptional attention to detail and organizational skills.

• Self-motivated with the ability to work independently in a remote environment.

• Degree in Construction Management, Civil Engineering, or a related field is a plus.

• Familiarity with New Jersey/New York building codes and local pricing trends is a must.

title: Billing & Procurement Account Manager
description:
About Edge360 / Staff360

Edge360 / Staff360 is a trusted Managed Service Provider (MSP) and Business Process Outsourcing (BPO) agency. We help businesses streamline operations, optimize technology, and scale efficiently by providing reliable IT solutions and outsourcing support.

We’re growing fast and looking for motivated professionals who want to be part of a team that drives digital transformation.



Position Overview

We’re hiring a Billing & Procurement Account Manager who will play a key role in managing billing, procurement, and financial operations. This role requires someone detail-oriented, proactive, and comfortable working in a fast-paced environment.

You’ll be the go-to person for ensuring accuracy in billing, smooth procurement processes, and strong vendor relationships—all while supporting our MSP and BPO projects.



Key Responsibilities

Prepare accurate and competitive quotes for client projects in collaboration with sales and technical teams.

Manage procurement: sourcing, ordering, and tracking hardware, software, and other project resources.

Handle billing and invoicing, ensuring compliance with company policies and client agreements.

Maintain project plans, timelines, and budgets to support efficient delivery.

Act as the main contact for accounts payable/receivable, resolving inquiries quickly.

Work with the accounting team on reconciliations, reporting, and audits.

Manage vendor relationships, negotiate contracts, and identify cost-saving opportunities.

Assist with financial forecasting, budgeting, and process improvements.

Support ad-hoc tasks related to billing, procurement, and project management.



Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Business, Finance, Accounting, or related field (or equivalent experience).

At least 3 years of experience in billing, procurement, or financial management—preferably in MSP, BPO, or IT services.

Proficiency in financial software (QuickBooks, SAP, etc.) and project management tools (Microsoft Project, Asana, etc.).

title: Intake Specialist with US Law Firm
description:
We are a US Law Firm that helps seniors and their families with important legal matters. We are looking for a friendly and reliable Intake Specialist to answer phone calls and help new clients get started with our firm.

You will be the first person people talk to, so we are looking for someone who is kind, patient, and enjoys helping others.



What You Will Do

In this role, you will:

• Answer incoming phone calls in a friendly and professional way

• Talk with potential clients and listen to their concerns

• Schedule appointments for consultations

• Follow up with potential clients

• Keep notes and client information organized

• Help callers feel comfortable, respected, and cared for



Many of our callers are seniors or family members, so being calm, kind, and understanding is very important.



What We Are Looking For

We are looking for someone who:

• Speaks and writes English clearly

• Is warm, friendly, and polite on the phone

• Is dependable and shows up on time every day

• Can build good relationships and trust with clients

• Is organized and pays attention to details

• Has experience in customer service, call handling, or intake (this is a plus, but not required)

• Can work 9 am - 6 pm EST



Benefits We offer:

• 15 days of Paid Time Off (PTO)

• Paid Holidays

• Rice Subsidy

• HMO Coverage

• Monthly bonuses



How to Apply:

1. Submit a resume

2. A video explaining why you’re interested in the position

title: Shopify Web Developer - CRO Specialist - Ecommerce Advertising Agency - Full Time 4b
description:
APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED: 





CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.



Note: All Remote Employees Must Be Available To Work During The Following Business Hours:

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Friday: 9am – 5:30pm EST



Roles & Responsibilities

- Develop landing pages using Figma and various WYSYWIG editors including but not limited to Replo and Pagefly.

- Edit product, collection and other page templates using Shopify Liquid template engine, and various HTML/CSS frameworks.

- Install various checkout/tracking applications (aftersell, Zipify OCU, Upstack, etc)

- Install various applications for product bundling when needed, and create product bundles. 

- Install tracking pixels on client’s websites

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Work in my project management system, ClickUp.

- Apply a process-first mentality and provide feedback to help further develop our operating systems.



Required Experience & Education

- Strong verbal and written English language skills (American Dialect)

- Strong knowledge of HTML/CSS/Javascript/Shopify Liquid required. 

- Knowledge of Python and Ruby preferred but not required.

- 1+ years of web development (Shopify) experience required

- 1+ years of backend python (flask/django) development experience preferred but not required

- 1+ years of marketing agency experience preferred but not required

- Must be highly organized and possess strong attention to detail

- All applicants are encouraged to apply, regardless of experience or education



APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED:

title: Hiring Full-Time Remote US Experienced Bookkeeper
description:
???? About Us:

We’re a U.S.-based financial services company providing daily bookkeeping, financial insights, and tax planning to small and mid-sized businesses across various industries. Our remote team supports clients with precision, professionalism, and responsiveness — and we’re growing fast.



We’re now hiring a Bookkeeping Manager who will oversee day-to-day operations, manage a small team of bookkeepers, and ensure quality and accuracy across all client accounts. This is a long-term role with significant room for growth into a leadership position.



???? Key Responsibilities:

Manage and oversee daily bookkeeping operations for 15–25 U.S.-based clients



Ensure timely and accurate reconciliations of bank, credit card, and merchant accounts



Review financials and finalize books for monthly close



Communicate with bookkeepers, provide training and feedback, and resolve bookkeeping issues



Maintain clean records in QuickBooks Online and Keeper.app



Collaborate with internal team (reviewers, tax, client success) to ensure client satisfaction



Help improve internal systems, SOPs, and task management processes



? Requirements:

Minimum 3 years of bookkeeping experience (QuickBooks Online required)



Strong command of U.S. bookkeeping standards



Experience reviewing and managing a team of bookkeepers



Ability to handle multiple clients and deadlines simultaneously



Excellent English (written & spoken) – must communicate professionally with clients and team



Highly organized, efficient, and reliable



Familiarity with Keeper.app and Slack/
 is a bonus



???? Working Hours:

Full-time role (8 hours/day)



Must be able to work U.S. EST time zone



Willing to be monitored via time-tracking software (HiveDesk or equivalent)



Stable internet and quiet working environment required



???? Why Join Us?

???? Stable U.S.-based company with long-term client contracts



???? Supportive, growth-focused team culture



???? Clear path to advance into a leadership or reviewer role



???? Competitive pay based on experience



???? Performance bonuses tied to quality and team productivity



?? Ongoing training and access to our SOPs + tools



???? To Apply:

Please send the following:



? Your updated resume



? A short cover letter highlighting your bookkeeping and management experience



? Any relevant work samples or references



? Use the subject line: Bookkeeping Manager – [Your Full Name]



We’re actively interviewing and hiring this week — apply now if you’re ready to take ownership, lead a team, and help us scale the right way.

title: Registered Nurse / Clinical Quality Assurance Registered Nurse
description:
Registered Nurse / Clinical Quality Assurance Registered Nurse



Job Type: Full-Time

Work Hours: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM Pacific Time, with a 1-hour break

Salary: $1,300 per month



Job Overview: 

We are seeking a Registered Nurse / Clinical Quality Assurance Registered Nurse with experience in Medicare home health documentation and PDGM coding. Experience with Kinnser/WellSky Home Health or similar home health EMR systems is preferred. In this role, you will review OASIS assessments, clinical visit notes, and patient charts to ensure accuracy, compliance, and readiness for submission. Responsibilities include conducting QA reviews, validating OASIS data, reviewing diagnoses and PDGM coding, ensuring Plans of Care and physician orders align with clinical documentation, and maintaining survey-ready records. The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, organized, and able to collaborate closely with clinical staff to ensure timely, compliant, and high-quality documentation.



Key Responsibilities:

-Quality Assurance & Clinical Review

-Conduct QA for all OASIS assessments and clinical visit notes

-Perform OASIS scrubbing and validation prior to submission to iQIES

-Ensure OASIS accuracy, consistency, and compliance with CMS requirements

-Review documentation for skilled need, homebound status, goal progression, and appropriate interventions

-Coding & PDGM Review

-Code charts accurately according to the patient's diagnoses

-Ensure appropriate primary diagnosis selection for PDGM grouping

-Review comorbidities and secondary diagnoses

-Identify potential LUPA risks and documentation issues

-Plan of Care & Orders Review

-Review and finalize the Plan of Care (485)

-Ensure physician orders align with the clinical documentation and plan of care

-Track and review physician orders and unsigned orders

-Documentation & Compliance

-Complete 30-day summaries

-Ensure charts meet Medicare Conditions of Participation

-Maintain survey-ready documentation

-Identify and flag compliance risks

-Operational Oversight

-Monitor documentation timeliness for SOC, recertifications, and visit notes

-Provide feedback to clinicians when corrections are required

-Maintain consistent communication with the Director of Nursing (DON) and clinical staff



Skills & Qualifications:

Registered Nurse (RN) license required.

Experience working in home health quality assurance, clinical documentation review, or chart auditing.

Strong knowledge of OASIS documentation standards and CMS Medicare home health requirements.

Experience with Kinnser/WellSky Home Health or similar home health EMR systems (preferred).

Solid understanding of PDGM coding and diagnosis review for home health services.

Ability to identify documentation gaps, compliance risks, and coding inaccuracies.

Strong attention to detail, analytical skills, and organizational abilities.

Excellent written communication skills for providing feedback to clinicians and clinical staff.

Ability to work independently in a remote environment and complete QA reviews and coding tasks within required timelines.

Ability to collaborate effectively with nursing leadership and clinical teams.

title: AI Automation Architect / GHL Funnel & Automation Wizard
description:
GHL Funnel & AI Automation Architect



Type: Full-Time



About the Role



We are a rapidly expanding performance marketing agency, managing 20-30 active clients in the life insurance sector with a combined monthly ad spend of approximately $100,000. Our mission is relentless efficiency and unparalleled results. We are not just looking for a tea
mber; we are seeking a GHL Funnel & AI Automation Architect — a visionary who will design, build, and optimize the intelligent systems that power our growth and redefine our operational capabilities.



This is not an entry-level role. This is a call to the elite. We demand a proven architect of digital ecosystems, someone who can not only build high-converting funnels but also infuse them with cutting-edge AI to create self-optimizing, autonomous machines. Your mandate is to impress us, to demonstrate an undeniable mastery of GoHighLevel, AI, and automation that leaves no doubt about your ability to handle every aspect of our funnel builds, integrations, and automated workflows. If you don't live and breathe GHL and AI, this isn't for you. We need an individual who can step in, take absolute ownership, and deliver immediate, transformative impact.



Who You Are



•

The GHL & AI Mastermind: You are not just proficient; you are a recognized authority in GoHighLevel. You possess an innate ability to leverage AI to enhance every facet of funnel performance, lead nurturing, and client engagement. You're constantly pushing the boundaries of what's possible with GHL and AI.



•

An Automation Virtuoso: Your expertise extends beyond GHL into the intricate world of Make/Zapier/n8n. You can seamlessly integrate disparate systems (Slack, Calendly, Google Sheets, CRMs, custom APIs) into a cohesive, intelligent workflow that eliminates manual intervention and maximizes efficiency.



•

The Data Alchemist: You transform raw data into strategic insights. You can architect dynamic, intuitive dashboards from complex data sources, providing real-time command centers that drive critical business decisions.



•

A Proactive Innovator: You don't wait for problems to arise; you anticipate them and build preventative, AI-driven solutions. You are a self-starter who identifies opportunities for exponential improvement and executes with precision and speed.



•

Relentlessly Results-Driven: You are obsessed with measurable outcomes. Your work is characterized by a fierce commitment to optimizing conversion rates, reducing operational costs, and scaling client success through intelligent automation.



•

Intelligent, Hungry, and Fast: You possess a sharp intellect, an insatiable hunger for learning, and the ability to execute at an extraordinary pace. You thrive under pressure and consistently exceed expectations.



What You Will Be Doing



•

Architecting Intelligent Funnels: You will design, build, and continuously optimize high-converting sales and marketing funnels within GoHighLevel, integrating advanced AI capabilities for lead scoring, personalization, and automated follow-up sequences.



•End-to-End Automation & Integration: You will be the central figure in automating our entire operational ecosystem. This includes building complex workflows using Make/Zapier/n8n to connect GHL with all critical business tools, ensuring seamless data flow and process execution.



•Developing AI-Powered Solutions: You will conceptualize, build, and deploy sophisticated AI chatbots for lead qualification, customer support, and internal process automation, constantly refining their performance based on data.



•Creating Dynamic Business Intelligence Dashboards: You will develop and maintain custom, real-time analytics dashboards that provide a comprehensive overview of agency and client performance, enabling rapid, data-informed decision-making.



•Strategic Process Optimization: You will conduct deep dives into existing processes, identifying bottlenecks and implementing AI-driven automation solutions that dramatically enhance efficiency and scalability.



•Driving Innovation: You will actively research and implement emerging AI and automation technologies, ensuring our agency remains at the forefront of marketing innovation.

title: Title: Salesforce CRM Architect / Implementation Specialist (Setup & Automation)
description:
Overview



We are looking for an experienced Salesforce expert to help us design and implement a complete CRM and operations system inside Salesforce. The goal is to build a clean, reliable system so our company can operate primarily inside Salesforce instead of using multiple disconnected tools.



This is an implementation and architecture role. We want someone who can plan the structure correctly and then build it.



Our focus is simplicity, reliability, and automation.



About Our Company



We are a growing home services company in the United States focused on storm shelters. Our business generates leads through phone calls and website inquiries and we need a streamlined system for managing leads, sales, estimates, and customer lifecycle.



Currently we use multiple tools, and we want to consolidate as much as possible into Salesforce.



Primary Goals



• Centralize lead management and customer data  

• Track phone and web leads inside Salesforce  

• Manage the full sales pipeline  

• Automate follow-ups and notifications  

• Create a simple quoting / estimate workflow  

• Track customer status from lead ? sale ? installation  

• Provide clear dashboards and reporting  



Responsibilities



• Design the Salesforce architecture for our business  

• Set up Sales Cloud (and other modules if needed)  

• Create pipelines, stages, and opportunity management  

• Build automations and workflows  

• Configure lead capture from forms and phone calls  

• Design quote/estimate workflow  

• Set up dashboards and reporting  

• Configure integrations with other systems if required  

• Document the system and train our team



Requirements



• Strong Salesforce implementation experience  

• Ability to architect systems, not just configure fields  

• Experience with workflow automation and process design  

• Experience integrating external tools and APIs  

• Ability to simplify systems (we prefer clean over complex)  

• Strong communication and documentation skills



Nice to Have



• Experience with home services or contractor businesses  

• Experience with call tracking integrations  

• Experience building quoting workflows in Salesforce  

• Salesforce certifications



Project Scope



Initial engagement will focus on system architecture and implementation. After the system is live, there may be ongoing work for improvements and optimization.



Important



We are looking for someone who can build a simple, reliable system rather than overengineering the platform. Our goal is for our team to operate inside Salesforce daily with minimal complexity.



If you apply, please include:



• Examples of Salesforce systems you have implemented  

• Your recommended approach for building a CRM for a home service business  

• Estimated timeline for implementation

title: NZ Accounting Specialist (15-20 hours per week)
description:
Start Out Savvy is a boutique New Zealand accounting practice specialising in service businesses.

We help business owners get on top of their numbers, their cashflow, and their growth. 

We're bold, practical, and genuinely good to work for - and we're looking for an experienced NZ Accounting Specialist to join our small, high-performing offshore team.



?? Please read before applying

This role requires direct, hands-on experience preparing New Zealand GST returns and annual accounts. 

If your NZ knowledge is theoretical only, please do not apply. All shortlisted applicants will complete a paid test task before any offer is made.



The Role (15 hrs per week, Monday–Thursday only):

You'll be working alongside our NZ-based team preparing client files to review-ready standard, including:



Preparing NZ annual financial statements and tax returns in Xero and Xero Workpapers

Preparing GST returns for trades businesses (monthly and two-monthly filers)

Xero reconciliation, coding and bookkeeping for small business clients

Provisional tax calculations and IRD filing preparation

Payroll support for clients with employees

Weekly status update via Google Chat every Thursday — proactive communication is non-negotiable



Who You Are:



CPA or equivalent qualification preferred

Minimum 3 years hands-on experience preparing NZ GST returns and annual accounts independently

Worked for a NZ accounting practice or outsource provider (not study only — real client files)

Daily Xero user - must be Xero Advisor Certified 

Strong working knowledge of NZ IRD, tax codes, and filing requirements

Excellent written English — clear team communication is essential

Able to work independently without hand-holding — you know what to do when you open a client file

Available Monday–Thursday, 15 hours per week from early April 2026

If you are currently working full-time for another employer, do not apply



Bonus Points If You Have:



Experience with trades businesses, contractors or construction clients

Cashflow & management reporting

Familiarity with NZ company structures, shareholder salaries and dividend treatment



Why Join Us:



Guaranteed 15 hours per week from day one — stable, reliable income

Weekly pay via Wise in NZD

5 paid cultural leave days per year — your holidays, your choice

2 paid team recharge days per year — we rest together as a team

Christmas payment paid first week of December in lieu of 13th month payment

4-day work week — we finish Thursday, every week, always

Long-term role with written progression milestones — real growth, not vague promises

A small, genuine team that values your contribution and tells you so



How To Apply:

Send your application with:



A cover message (max 200 words) covering: how long you have been preparing NZ GST returns and annual accounts, which NZ firms you have worked for, and your current weekly availability

Your CV with a clear work history listing every role, dates, and specifically what NZ accounting work you performed

Your answer to this question — "A trades client has 180 unreconciled transactions in Xero with a GST return due. 

What do you do first, and what are the three most common coding errors you look for in a trades business?"



Shortlisted applicants will be invited to complete a paid test task (USD $15, 48-hour turnaround). 

This is how we assess real skill — not just what you tell us.

We review applications as they arrive. When we find the right person, the role is filled. Apply promptly.

description:

title: Client Success Coordinator
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

The Client Success Coordinator supports client onboarding and Client engagement within the 10X Business Academy. This role helps ensure clients and their teams stay on track with their learning programs by monitoring participation, coordinating touchpoints, and maintaining accurate client records. The Coordinator works closely with the Client Success Manager to identify engagement risks early, maintain proactive communication, and contribute to strong client satisfaction and retention.



ABOUT CARDONE VENTURES

Our mission is to help business owners achieve their personal, professional, and financial goals through the growth of their businesses. We work in dozens of verticals and provide strategic business guidance through courses, live events, partnerships, and investments. Our core values are the backbone of our business and guide our hiring process: we are inspirational, accountable, transparent, disciplined, aligned, and results-oriented. This company operates nationally and is growing by the day.



Wondering what it's like to work here? Come check this:


/watch?v=PIIv7sYj1Ns



SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE:

• Clients remain actively engaged in programs with strong participation and course completion.

• Client questions and requests are addressed quickly and professionally.

• Engagement data and client records are accurate, organized, and consistently updated.



OBJECTIVES

• Support onboarding of new clients by coordinating kickoff activities and tracking setup completion.

• Monitor Client engagement metrics such as participation, attendance, and course progress.

• Conduct scheduled check-ins and follow-up communication with clients.

• Maintain accurate client records in CRM and learning platforms.

• Identify disengagement risks early and escalate them to the Client Success Manager.

• Prepare engagement summaries and progress reports for leadership review.

• Coordinate scheduling for kickoff calls, accountability sessions, and coaching meetings.

• Assist with renewal preparation by compiling engagement insights and participation data.

• Performs other related duties as assigned.



COMPETENCIES

• Strong written and verbal communication skills in English.

• Organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple tasks simultaneously.

• Professional and client-focused approach to communication and service.

• Ability to track engagement data and recognize participation trends.

• Strong time management and follow-through on commitments.

• Comfortable working with CRM systems, learning platforms, and productivity tools.

• Ability to work independently while collaborating with a remote team.



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

• Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Communications, Education, or a related field preferred.

• 1–3 years of experience in customer service, account coordination, BPO, or client-facing roles.

• Experience working with global clients or remote teams is a plus.

• Familiarity with CRM systems or online learning platforms is preferred.



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

• Prolonged periods sitting at a desk and working on a computer



COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY

As an equal opportunity employer committed to meeting the needs of a multigenerational and multicultural workforce, Cardone Ventures recognizes that a diverse staff, reflective of our community, is an integral and welcome part of a successful and ethical business. We hire local talent at all levels regardless of race, color, religion, age, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, or disability, and actively foster inclusion in all forms both within our company and across interactions with clients, candidates, and partners.



If this position caught your eye, send us your resume! For best consideration, please complete the online application form:


/

title: Virtual Assistant – Influencer Outreach & Coordination
description:
About the Role

We’re looking for a highly organized, fast-moving Virtual Assistant to support our Influencer Manager by keeping our influencer funnel full and moving every day.



This role is execution-focused. You will handle daily influencer outreach, follow-ups, tracking, and coordination so our Influencer Manager can focus on relationships, approvals, and performance instead of chasing DMs.



Core Responsibilities

Influencer Outreach & Funnel Management

Conduct daily outbound influencer outreach on TikTok and Instagram (DMs +
 when available)

Follow up consistently with creators to move them through the funnel

Maintain a steady flow of new creators entering the pipeline each week

Track outreach status (contacted, responded, interested, shipped, posted, etc.)



Organization & Tracking

Keep influencer tracking sheets accurate, clean, and up to date

Log creator details, handles, follower counts, engagement metrics, and communication history

Flag high-potential creators or urgent follow-ups for the Influencer Manager

Ensure no creators fall through the cracks

Coordination Support

Assist with basic coordination tasks (collecting shipping info, confirming timelines, reminders)

Support influencer campaign execution by ensuring next steps are clearly documented

Help prepare lists or summaries for approvals and reviews



What We’re Looking For

Highly organized and fast

Familiar with TikTok + Instagram creator ecosystems

Comfortable with repetitive daily work (outreach, follow-ups, tracking)

Extremely detail-oriented

Strong written English for creator communication

Reliable internet and the ability to work independently

Nice-to-Haves

Previous experience as a VA, Influencer Coordinator, or Outreach Assistant

Experience using Google Sheets, Airtable, or Notion

Experience supporting US-based brands or influencer programs



What This Role Is (and Is Not)

This role IS: execution-heavy, process-driven, volume-based, and critical to keeping the influencer funnel moving.

This role is NOT: influencer relationship ownership, strategy or performance analysis, or contract negotiation.



Why This Role Matters

Your work enables our Influencer Manager to focus on relationships, approvals, and performance—while you ensure the influencer pipeline stays full, organized, and moving every day.

title: Rockstar Accountants
description:
FULL-TIME NIGHT SHIFT | Remote | For High-Performance Professionals Only



Pivotl is seeking an exceptional Remote Accountant to join our specialized team providing advanced accounting services across the United States. This is a FULL-TIME, NIGHT SHIFT position designed for seasoned professionals who thrive under pressure and deliver excellence consistently.



IMPORTANT: This is NOT a side job or flexible arrangement. We need dedicated professionals accustomed to night shift operations who can commit to full-time hours. If you're seeking part-time work or are uncomfortable with night schedules, please do not apply.



What Sets This Role Apart

- 4-day work week, 3 days off - Maximize your work-life balance

- Premium compensation for proven high performers

- Comprehensive benefits: Paid vacation/sick leave, extensive paid training,

- Complete autonomy in a remote environment - perfect for self-directed professionals

- Specialized focus on HOME SERVICE industries (HVAC, Solar, and related sectors)



The Challenge - Are You Ready?



We need a financial data cleanup specialist who can handle:

- Granular-level financial data reconciliation across complex business structures (Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, AR, Vendor Recon)

- High-pressure deadline management while maintaining 100?curacy

- Independent problem-solving of complex accounting discrepancies

- Proactive identification and resolution of financial irregularities

- Core Responsibilities for Elite Performers

- Execute comprehensive book-cleanup projects with tight deadlines

- Perform detailed adjusting entries with a deep understanding of tax implications

- Master QuickBooks Online for complex multi-entity structures

- Conduct advanced data analysis using Excel and Google Sheets

- Manage full-cycle AR/AP, invoicing, payroll, and bank reconciliations

- Deliver precise categorization and accounting across diverse business models



Non-Negotiable Requirements

- Proven track record in US accounting with demonstrable results

- Expert-level proficiency in QuickBooks Online

- Advanced Excel/Google Sheets skills for complex data manipulation

- Exceptional English communication - written and verbal

- Night shift availability - this is not flexible

- Autonomous work style - you must be self-directed and proactive

- Competitive Advantages (Preferred)

- Industry background in HVAC, solar, generators, roofing, foundations, or electrical

- Construction/contracting industry experience highly valued

- Experience using any of the following: Service Titan, Housecall Pro, Sera, Jobber, Service Trade, Acculynx, etc

- Experience using Keeper.app is a plus



Who Should Apply

- Rock stars only. We want professionals who:

- Thrive in high-pressure, deadline-driven environments

- Work autonomously without constant supervision

- Have extensive experience cleaning up complex historical financial data

- Take ownership of results and deliver consistent excellence

- Are committed to full-time night shift operations



Who Should NOT Apply

- Those seeking part-time or flexible arrangements

- Professionals are uncomfortable with night shift schedules

- Anyone looking for a "side job" or supplemental income

- Those requiring extensive hand-holding or micromanagement

- Ready to prove you're among the elite?

title: Video Editor and Social Media Manager
description:
Job Overview:

I am the CEO of Pauv (
), an Austin-based startup building the "stock market for people." I am looking for a high-energy, creative partner to help me scale our social presence and reach out to potential partners (musicians, athletes, and streamers).



Responsibilities:



- Video Editing (CapCut): I will provide ~3 minutes of raw footage daily. You will edit this into a high-retention, <60 second short-form video (TikTok/Reels style) with captions, cuts, and engaging pacing. Expected output: 2-3 videos per day. I will provide you with video editing software.

- Social Outreach: Engage with target accounts on X, TikTok, and Instagram. This includes leaving thoughtful comments and sending personalized DMs to potential "Issuers" based on scripts/guidelines I provide.

- Daily Sync: Report on engagement metrics and lead status.



Requirements:



- Expertise in CapCut: You must be able to edit quickly and follow "viral" styles (hooks, captions, jump cuts).

- Excellent English: Your written English must be flawless and conversational. No "bot-like" messaging.

- Reliability: You must be able to deliver edits within 24 hours of receiving raw footage.

- Interest in Finance/Creators: You should understand the concept of "investing in people" or the creator economy.



We will ONLY look at applications who have a portfolio linked with short form video content. 



There will also be a short video editing test and a conversationalist test before moving on.

title: Senior WordPress Developer & Site Manager (Advanced Coding + Performance Focus)
description:
## **Job Overview**



We are hiring a **Senior WordPress Developer** to fully manage and protect a **mission-critical WordPress + WooCommerce website**. This is a **full-time, long-term role** for someone with **deep technical expertise**, not a junior or entry-level WordPress assistant.



This site is content-heavy, SEO-driven, and compliance-sensitive. We need someone who can **build, optimize, troubleshoot, and maintain the site at an expert level without breaking things**.



**Only apply if you have strong coding experience and advanced WordPress knowledge.**



---



## **Core Responsibilities**



### **Advanced WordPress Development**



* Architect and maintain a complex WordPress site using **Kadence Theme** and **Gutenberg block editor**

* Develop and customize blocks, templates, and layouts (no page-builder-only users)

* Work directly with **PHP, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS** (not just basic edits)

* Create and manage **custom post types, taxonomies, and templates**

* Safely implement structural changes without site downtime



### **Advanced Troubleshooting & Stability**



* Diagnose and resolve complex WordPress, plugin, and WooCommerce issues

* Debug PHP errors, database issues, and server-level conflicts

* Handle plugin conflicts and compatibility issues proactively

* Maintain staging ? production workflows correctly



### **Performance & Page Speed Optimization**



* Optimize for **Core Web Vitals (LCP, CLS, INP)**

* Advanced experience with:



  * Caching (server-level + plugin-based)

  * Image optimization

  * Script and asset optimization

  * Database optimization

* Experience with tools such as **WP Rocket, LiteSpeed, Cloudflare, Redis, or similar**

* Maintain fast load times on content-heavy pages



### **SEO & Technical Structure Support**



* Implement advanced SEO structures (clean URLs, internal linking, schema)

* Work with **Rank Math SEO** at a technical level

* Ensure proper indexing, canonicalization, and crawl efficiency

* Support large-scale content publishing without SEO issues



---



## **Required Experience (Non-Negotiable)**



* **3+ years of professional WordPress development experience**

* **Strong coding skills**:



  * PHP (WordPress core & theme customization)

  * JavaScript

  * Advanced HTML & CSS

* **Kadence Theme + Gutenberg blocks experience**

* Advanced WooCommerce experience

* Proven experience optimizing WordPress sites for **speed and performance**

* Experience managing **high-risk or high-traffic websites**



???? **This role is NOT for:**



* Beginners or junior WordPress users

* VA-style WordPress assistants

* Page-builder-only developers

* “I know basic HTML/CSS” applicants



---



## **Work Requirements**



* **Full-time (40 hours/week)**

* **Must work during US Central Time business hours**

* Reliable internet and professional communication skills

* Long-term commitment only



---



## **Nice-to-Have (Strong Plus)**



* Experience with regulated, research, or compliance-sensitive websites

* Experience with WooCommerce at scale

* Familiarity with hosting environments like WP Engine

* Experience with Git or version control

* Experience optimizing large content libraries



---



## **Compensation**



* Competitive pay based on skill level and experience

* Long-term stability and consistent work

* Opportunity to become the **primary technical owner** of a growing platform



---



## **How to Apply**



Please include:



1. **Detailed WordPress development experience**

2. Examples of **advanced WordPress sites** you’ve worked on

3. Your **experience with Kadence and Gutenberg**

4. Your **page speed optimization experience** (tools + results)

5. Your **availability during US Central Time**

6. Your **expected monthly salary**



Applications without proof of advanced experience will not be considered.



---



### **Final Note**



This site cannot break. We are looking for someone who understands that responsibility and has the experience to handle it.



---



If you want next:



* A **technical screening test**

* A **trial task that exposes weak candidates**

* A **salary range recommendation for Philippines senior devs**

* A **first-week onboarding checklist**



Just say the word.

title: Video Editor for Online Course
description:
We are hiring a skilled video editor to help edit a professional online course and create short-form content.



This is not beginner editing. We are looking for someone who has already edited online courses or educational programs.



What You’ll Be Editing



• Online course lessons (long-form recordings)

• Educational content with clean pacing

• Short clips for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts



What We Need From You



• Strong experience editing online courses or coaching programs

• Advanced skills with CapCut Pro or Adobe Premiere Pro

• Ability to add:



• Zoom cuts

• Overlays and callouts

• Motion graphics

• Captions and subtitles

• Clean transitions

• Retention-focused edits



You should also be comfortable using AI tools for captions, noise cleanup, and editing efficiency.



Bonus Skills



• Motion graphics experience

• Experience editing coaching / mentorship programs

• Ability to cut long videos into viral short clips



Responsibilities



• Edit course videos into structured lessons

• Clean audio and visuals

• Add captions, graphics, and motion elements

• Turn course content into short social media clips



To Apply



Send the following:



Examples of online courses you have edited



Tools you use (CapCut, Premiere, AI tools, etc.)



Your availability



At the top of your application write the word COURSE EDITOR so we know you read the post.



Only apply if you have real course editing experience.



Now the truth you probably don’t want to hear.



Your biggest mistake with hiring editors isn’t the job post. It’s the lack of a filtering system.



If you just post this and start interviewing, you will waste hours with mediocre editors.



A smarter structure:



Job post



Portfolio filter



5 minute paid test edit



Then interview



Anyone who refuses the test edit gets eliminated immediately.



Because in editing, portfolios lie. Test edits don’t.



If you want, I can also show you:



the exact test edit task that exposes fake editors in 10 minutes



the message template that filters 90% of applicants instantly.

title: sales rep- cold calls
description:
We are seeking a motivated and confident Cold Calling Sales Representative to help generate new business opportunities for our growing security services company. The primary responsibility of this role is to contact businesses, property managers, construction companies, event organizers, and commercial clients to introduce our professional security services and schedule meetings or secure contracts.



The ideal candidate is comfortable making a high volume of outbound calls each day, speaking with decision makers, and confidently presenting the value of professional security services. You will be responsible for identifying potential clients, explaining our services, building interest, and helping move prospects toward closing security contracts.



Responsibilities include researching potential businesses that may require security services, making outbound cold calls, introducing our company and services, identifying the correct decision makers, and explaining how our security solutions can help protect their property, staff, or events. You will also maintain basic notes on calls and follow up with interested prospects.



We are looking for someone who is persistent, professional, and results-driven. Previous sales or cold calling experience is preferred, but strong communication skills and confidence on the phone are the most important qualities for this role.



This is a performance-based opportunity with strong earning potential. In addition to base pay, you will receive a $125 bonus for every contract that is successfully closed as a result of your outreach efforts. The more qualified leads and contracts you generate, the more you can earn.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys sales, is comfortable speaking with new people, and wants to grow with a company in the security industry.



Key Responsibilities

 • Make outbound cold calls to businesses and potential clients

 • Introduce our security services and generate interest

 • Identify decision makers such as property managers, business owners, and event coordinators

 • Schedule appointments or help move leads toward closing contracts

 • Maintain simple records of calls and follow-ups

 • Work toward weekly lead and contract goals



Compensation

 • Base pay (depending on hours agreed)

 • $125 bonus for every contract closed from your leads



If you are confident on the phone, motivated by performance, and want the opportunity to earn bonuses based on results, we encourage you to apply.

title: FULL-Time YouTube Video Editor!
description:
I'm seeking a young talented and passionate YouTube Video Editor who wants to be original and not edit according to what is trendy. This role is perfect for someone who loves video editing, creating engaging content, stable work, and flexible schedule.  



The style of the channel is clean, minimal, and classy editing style. I do not want Mr Beast style or too much flashy edits. We love the styles of Ali Abdaal, Peter McKinnon, and Ben Francis, and we'd like to emulate their production value and you can always add your cinematic flair.



What You'll Be Doing:

Editing Raw YouTube Videos: You'll be the primary editor for our YouTube channel, which includes educational tips, vlogs, and how-to's. It's an educational Channel. We'll aim for a Minimum of 2 long forms per week, create thumbnails per video and Reels/Shorts.



I'll film content in bulk for the main channel. The long-form video can vary from 10-20mins of talking head. I use a teleprompter, so editing the A-roll will be fairly simple.



Requirements:



Fast Editing + Deadline Reliability:

Have the main A-roll cut done within 24 hours. You need to edit quickly without sacrificing quality. We often work with tight deadlines, so you must be able to deliver final drafts fast, meet turnaround expectations, and handle revisions efficiently. We use 
 for revisions.



Editing Expertise: You should be an excellent editor, capable of handling all aspects of video editing, including audio syncing, color grading, photoshop/photo edits and more. Experience with Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci, Capcut or Final Cut Pro is a must.



Communication:

We use 
 every day. You must be extremely responsive, open to feedback, and capable of communicating updates, questions, and progress in real-time. If you don’t communicate fast, you won’t succeed in this role — simple as that.



Great understanding of Aesthetic & Attention to detail is super important



You'll also be responsible for creating 3 different Thumbnails for each video.



Interest in Our Niche: A passion for business, productivity, books, entrepreneurship, or personal finance will make this role more enjoyable for you.





Why Join Us? & BENEFITS For You:



-Creative Control: You'll have a lot of creative freedom. If you have ideas on how to expand our content, we're all ears!



-Flexible Schedule: You can work hour of the day as long it gets done. Our work often requires constant communication for feedbacks and improvement. The workload will aim to be around 40 hours per week, but it might come at unconventional times.



Post your favorite book in the Subject  and add a 30sec-1minute introduction of yourself or your application will not be considered!!



-Growth and Impact: Be part of a growing online business. Your work will reach and impact people worldwide. You are looking for something secure and stable that will give you the chance to grow into a bigger position.



-Adventure and Ownership: Enjoy the freedom to bring your creative ideas to life and on possible travel opportunities.



-Mentorship: Work closely with me and learn from my experiences in building businesses and growing an audience. You will be challenged to improve your skills.



Salary: $1,000 USD



If you're passionate about video editing, love creating engaging content, and are excited about the opportunity to join a dynamic growing team, we'd love to hear from you!

title: Estimation and Contractor Recruitment Specialist
description:
Role Overview:



The Estimation and Contractor Recruitment Specialist is responsible for creating comprehensive, detailed scopes of work based on project requirements, identifying qualified contractors capable of performing each specific role, and managing the quotation process to ensure accurate, competitive pricing. The ideal candidate will leverage exceptional organizational skills, numerical proficiency, and outstanding communication abilities to ensure seamless coordination and clarity across all project phases.



Key Responsibilities:



- Thoroughly review and analyze project details to clearly define and document comprehensive scopes of work.

- Develop precise scopes of work tailored to each contractor role, clearly specifying all tasks, materials, skills, and expectations.

- Identify, recruit, and engage qualified contractors who possess the necessary skill sets and experience to successfully fulfill defined scopes of work.

- Solicit and obtain detailed quotations from multiple contractors (ideally three per role) for each defined scope.

- Critically evaluate contractor quotations for accuracy, completeness, competitiveness, and alignment with project objectives.

- Compile and present organized summaries of quotations, contractor capabilities, and recommendations for selection to project stakeholders.

- Maintain meticulous records of scopes, quotations, contractor communications, and evaluation criteria.

- Qualifications and Essential Skills:

- Demonstrated organizational skills with an ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines effectively.

- Strong numerical aptitude and analytical skills to interpret and compare contractor quotes accurately.

- Exceptional written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to articulate complex technical requirements clearly and precisely.

- Proven ability to independently problem-solve, demonstrating common sense and critical thinking.

- Self-motivated, proactive, and capable of navigating complex challenges to deliver effective solutions.



** Must be comfortable engaging in detailed discussions and negotiations with contractors to clearly define project requirements, ensure complete mutual understanding of the scope, and achieve optimal pricing. **





Personal Attributes:



- Highly organized and detail-oriented.

- Excellent interpersonal skills and emotional intelligence.

- Dependable and results-driven, capable of working autonomously.

- Strong sense of ownership and accountability in task execution.



This role is critical to ensuring precise contractor selection and project execution, significantly impacting overall project success through clear communication, meticulous preparation, and thorough evaluation.



Working hours are from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM EST; please ensure you are comfortable and available to work within this schedule.

title: Ecommerce Graphic Designer – Toy Lifestyle Compositing Specialist (Photoshop Expert)

We’re looking for a highly skilled Ecommerce Graphic Designer who can turn simple product renders into eye-catching, realistic lifestyle images for toy products. You understand compositing, lighting, shadows, perspective, textures, and realism so the final image feels authentic, playful, and emotionally engaging.

title: Veterinary Sales Leader (CSR Coach + Producer)
description:
Copperfield Animal Clinic in Texas is hiring a remote Sales Leader to help more pets get the care they need. Your work will directly increase appointments, reduce missed care, and help clients follow through so problems are caught early.



Many pet owners delay care because life gets busy, prices feel confusing, or they do not understand urgency. When calls are not booked or follow ups do not happen, pets miss exams, vaccines, screenings, and dentals that prevent bigger problems later. In this role you will coach our onsite CSRs to convert more calls into appointments and you will personally follow up with lapsed clients and unbooked callers so more pets come in and stay on track.



You will lead a simple system that improves booking rate and show rate while keeping communication calm and helpful. You will listen to call recordings, tighten scripts, and teach objection versus smoke screen so CSRs respond without pressure. You will run weekly video coaching with the onsite team, answer their sales questions, and hold them to clear standards. You will also do your own outreach by phone and text to bring back clients who have not visited in 18 plus months and to recover callers who did not book. A key focus is helping clients visit twice per year by supporting an annual exam now and a dental six months later, then confirming those dental appointments so pets actually receive the care.



This is a remote role with a paid trial. You must have proven phone sales or appointment setting experience and coaching experience is strongly preferred. You must speak and write English very well, you must be organized and consistent with tracking, and you must close without being pushy. You must have reliable high speed internet for clear calls with no disconnects, you must provide a speed test screenshot showing download and upload speed, and you must confirm you have a backup internet option.



To apply, reply with:

1. short summary of your phone sales and coaching experience

2. How you find whether a customers objection is legitimate or a smoke screen with one example of each

3. your internet speed test screenshot and backup plan 



Finalists will complete a short role play and a call review test in the final interview.

title: Customer Service Representative
description:
About Us

Private Duty Staffing (PDS) is a Human Resources Staffing and solutions company based in Michigan.  We aid companies in managing their manpower needs, and we search for talents across the globe to find the perfect fit for our client’s workforce.



Job Description

This is a remote position.



Role Overview

We are looking for a Customer Service Representative (CSR) to serve as a key point of contact for our customers. In this role, you will handle inquiries, resolve concerns, and provide accurate information across multiple communication channels.

This position is ideal for individuals who are customer-focused, detail-oriented, and comfortable working remotely in a fast-paced environment while supporting U.S.-based clients.





Key Responsibilities

- Respond to customer inquiries via phone,
, chat, or ticketing systems

- Provide clear, accurate, and professional support regarding services and processes

- Resolve customer concerns with empathy and a solutions-focused approach

- Document customer interactions accurately in internal systems

- Escalate complex issues to the appropriate team or supervisor when needed





Eligibility Requirements (Required)?

To be considered for this role, applicants must meet at least one of the following criteria:

- Have lived or worked in the United States, OR

- Have physically worked in the United States, OR

- Are currently or were previously a participant in the InterExchange Work Program

Applicants who meet at least one of the eligibility criteria above are encouraged to apply.





Requirements

- Previous experience in customer service, call center, or client support roles preferred

- Strong spoken and written English communication skills

- Excellent problem-solving, listening, and interpersonal skills

- Ability to multitask and manage time effectively in a remote setup

- Availability to work assigned schedules aligned with U.S. Eastern Standard Time (EST) business hours when required.



Preferred Skills

- Experience supporting U.S.-based customers

Benefits

title: Data Analyst (Operations Experienced)
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

The Data Analyst plays a key role in transforming raw data into actionable insights that drive strategic decision-making across the organization. This position is responsible for building and maintaining Lookr dashboards, creating and automation reliable data sources, and overseeing the company’s daily, weekly, and monthly reporting infrastructure.



ABOUT CARDONE VENTURES

Our mission is to help business owners achieve their personal, professional, and financial goals through the growth of their businesses. We work in dozens of verticals and provide strategic business guidance through courses, live events, partnerships, and investments. Our core values are the backbone of our business and guide our hiring process: we are inspirational, disciplined, accountable, transparent, aligned, and results-oriented. This company operates nationally and is growing by the day.



SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

• Producing accurate, insightful reports that drive strategic decisions and improve campaign performance.

• Supporting the Marketing Operations, Sales Operations, and dashboard builders by ensuring seamless data integration, reporting accuracy, and actionable analysis across all platforms.

• Creating and maintaining dashboards that drive data transparency and actionable insights.





OBJECTIVES

• Dashboard Development: Build, manage, and optimize interactive dashboards in both Lookr studio and Power BI to support the marketing team.

• Ensure data accuracy, visual clarity, and usability of all reporting structures.

• Create and maintain reliable data sources, pipelines, and scheduled automations to streamline data collection and reporting processes.

• Collaborate cross-functionally with other ops teams to ensure data integrity and scalability.

• Continuously improve reporting efficiency and adapt structures to evolving business needs.

• Present findings and recommendations clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

• Translate complex datasets into digestible insights, visualizations, and narratives that drive clary and action.



COMPETENCIES

• Strong analytical skills, with the ability to extract, analyze, and report data from various sources.

• Proficiency in CRM tools, Zapier integrations, and marketing funnel workflows.

• Expertise in data reporting, KPI tracking, and leveraging analytics to drive marketing growth.

• Skilled in integrating and optimizing marketing platforms such as HubSpot, ClickFunnels, Kajabi, and Shopify.

• Experience with project management tools like Asana to track and organize campaigns.

• Strong problem-solving skills to address challenges in marketing operations and improve efficiency.

• Ability to write clear, compelling reports and presentations for stakeholders at all levels.

• A growth mindset with a willingness to learn and apply new technologies.



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

• 3-5 years in a reporting and analytics role.

• Hands-on experience creating dashboards in both Lookr studio as well as Power Bi.



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

Prolonged periods of time sitting at a desk and computer



COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY



As an equal opportunity employer committed to meeting the needs of a multigenerational and multicultural workforce Cardone Ventures recognizes that a diverse staff, reflective of our community, is an integral and welcome part of a successful and ethical business. We hire local talent at all levels regardless of race, color, religion, age, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation or disability, and actively foster inclusion in all forms both within our company and across interactions with clients, candidates and partners.



If this position caught your eye, send us your resume! For best consideration, please complete the online application form:

title: 4K Video Editor Needed ASAP - "TRSH Talk" Style (Reels & Full Episodes)
description:
Project Overview:



I am looking for a creative, fast-paced video editor to help launch a "Coming Soon" trailer and two episodes for my new series, Spill It. The editing style must strictly follow the vibe of the viral YouTube series TRSH Talk.



The Deliverables:



1x Mashup Trailer (9:16 Vertical): A "Coming Soon" teaser featuring both artists. High intense energy



2x Full Episodes: Individual edits for each artist.



3x Social Media Reels: High-energy highlights from the footage.



Technical Requirements



4K Resolution: All final exports must be in high-quality 4K resolution.



Audio Syncing: You MUST be able to perfectly sync the high-quality mic audio with the camera audio we recorded.



Multi-Cam/Cutting: Expertise in Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or DaVinci Resolve.



Fast Turnaround: Ability to work and communicate today.



Editing Style: The "TRSH Talk" Vibe



We are looking for high-retention, "viral" style editing. Please include the following "Easter Eggs" and effects:



The "Awkward Silence" Zoom: When an artist says something wild, do a slow, dramatic zoom on their face to make it funnier.



Shake Effects: Use a slight camera shake during loud, high-energy, or "hype" 
nts.



Bouncy Subtitles: Use bold, colorful, and animated captions (e.g., "The Bold Font") for key phrases and punchlines.



Dynamic Zooms: Frequent punch-ins and outs to emphasize reactions.



Sound Design: Pop-up sound effects (SFX), "whooshes," and comedic accents.



EXAMPLES: 








==


==



We are mainly posting this on IG and TIKTOk so need it to be engaging and eye catching. 



Will send you the logo for the show as well. 



How to Apply



Send a link to your portfolio or a specific clip you’ve edited in the "Retention" or "TRSH Talk" style.



Confirm you have the internet speed to handle 4K footage uploads/downloads.



Confirm you can start immediately.



Type "SPILL IT 4K" at the top of your application so I know you read the full post.

title: Remote Healthcare Recruiter / Talent Sourcing Specialist Home Care Agency (Part-Time)
description:
Company:

Senior Pro Services LLC (SPS)



Location:

Remote (Philippines preferred)



About Us



Senior Pro Services is a California-based healthcare company providing home care and home health services to elderly and disabled patients in the United States.



We are currently expanding our recruiting operations and are seeking a motivated Remote Recruiter to help us build a strong workforce that supports patient care and operational growth.



This position will play an important role in helping us identify and recruit talented professionals who will support the expansion of our healthcare services.



Responsibilities

• Source candidates for healthcare-related positions in the United States

• Post job listings on recruiting platforms and professional networks

• Screen resumes and evaluate candidate qualifications

• Conduct initial candidate interviews

• Schedule interviews with company management

• Maintain an organized pipeline of applicants

• Track recruiting activities and provide weekly progress reports

• Assist with building long-term talent pools for future hiring needs



Initial Assignment



Your first assignment will be to help recruit a Remote Healthcare Marketing Specialist who will support our referral development and business growth efforts.



This role focuses on building relationships with healthcare referral sources and helping generate patient referrals for our services.



Typical responsibilities of the Healthcare Marketing Specialist include:

• Connecting with hospital discharge planners, case managers, and social workers

• Developing relationships with referral sources in healthcare facilities

• Introducing our home care and home health services to potential referral partners

• Helping generate patient referrals for our services

• Maintaining communication with referral partners and tracking referral activity



The goal of this role is to expand our referral network and increase patient admissions for our healthcare services.



Once this position is filled, the role will expand to recruiting additional healthcare professionals such as:

• Caregivers (CNA / HHA)

• Registered Nurses (RN)

• Licensed Vocational Nurses (LVN)

• Physical Therapists (PT)

• Occupational Therapists (OT)

• Speech Therapists (ST)

• Medical Social Workers



Requirements

• Excellent written and spoken English communication skills

• Experience with talent sourcing and candidate pipeline development online

• LinkedIn recruiting experience preferred for U.S.-based companies is a plus

• Strong organizational and time-management skills

• Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

• Reliable internet connection and professional work environment



Work Schedule



Part-Time

Approximately 20 hours per week



Flexible schedule, with some availability to coordinate with U.S. business hours when needed.



Compensation



$6 - $10

Performance bonuses may be offered based on successful hires and recruiting outcomes.



How to Apply



Please include the following when submitting your application:

1. Your resume

2. A brief description of your recruiting experience

3. Examples of positions you have recruited for in the past



To confirm that you carefully read this job posting, please include the phrase:



“SPS Growth”



in your application message.



Applications that do not include this phrase may not be considered.

title: [ONE-TIME PROJECT] Credit Dispute Expert – PDF Audit & Letter Drafting
description:
Job Overview:

I am looking for a skilled Credit Repair Specialist for a one-time project to audit my 3-bureau credit reports and draft professional dispute letters. I have my reports ready in PDF format.



SECURITY RULE (Strictly Enforced):

I will NOT be sharing my logins for IdentityIQ, MyFreeScoreNow, or any other credit monitoring sites. You will work strictly from the PDFs I provide. I will redact (black out) my SSN and Date of Birth on the PDFs for your initial audit.



Scope of Work:



PDF Audit: Review the 3 PDFs and identify all inaccuracies, late payments, or unverified collections.



Strategy Summary: Provide a brief list of the items found and the specific laws (FCRA, FDCPA, or Metro 2) you plan to cite for each.



Letter Drafting: Create high-quality, custom dispute letters for Experian, Equifax, and TransUnion. (No basic generic templates; these must be tailored to my report).



Final Delivery: Send the completed letters to me in Word/PDF format so I can print, sign, and mail them myself.



Compensation:



Fixed Price: $60.00 USD (Paid upon delivery and review of all audit notes and drafted letters).



Requirements:



2+ years of experience in US Credit Repair.



Deep knowledge of the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA).



Ability to work via PDF only without requiring account access.



Excellent written English and attention to detail.



How to Apply:



Briefly describe your experience with US credit repair.



Explain your approach to disputing a "Collection" vs. a "Late Payment."



Start your application with the phrase "PDF SECURE" so I know you read the security rules.

title: Senior Cost Accountant
description:
Senior Cost Accountant

Job Type: Full-Time

Work Hours: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:30 PM Mountain Time, with a 30-minute break

Salary: $1600



Job Overview: 



We are seeking a highly detail-oriented and analytical Senior Cost Accountant to lead cost accounting and inventory operations across our portfolio of curated global artisan brands. This high-ownership individual contributor role is responsible for managing perpetual inventory, average and standard costing, landed cost allocations, inventory reconciliations, and cost of goods sold (COGS) analysis, while ensuring accuracy and compliance with US GAAP. You will oversee month-end close activities, prepare financial reports and margin analysis, and collaborate closely with operations and the US-based Accounting Manager to strengthen inventory processes and drive financial visibility across multiple SKUs and brands.



Key Responsibilities:



Inventory & Cost Accounting (Primary Focus)

- Manage perpetual inventory accounting for 2+ brands across multiple SKUs

- Average costing: Ensure system accuracy for costing

- Landed cost accounting: Track and allocate freight, duties, customs costs

- Inventory reconciliations and variance analysis (monthly physical counts from 3PL)

- Cost of goods sold (COGS) analysis and margin reporting

- Work closely with operations on inventory movements and adjustments

- Month-End Close & Financial Reporting



- Execute full monthly close for 2+ brands

- Prepare journal entries, accruals, and balance sheet reconciliations

- Generate monthly financial statements and gross profit analysis

- Partner with US-based Accounting Manager on reporting and special projects



Compliance & Process

- Ensure GAAP compliance for inventory accounting

- Assist with annual audit (especially inventory sections)

- Support sales tax and other compliance requirements

- Identify and implement inventory process improvements



Required Qualifications:



- Bachelor’s degree in Accounting

- 5+ years progressive accounting experience

- Strong cost accounting / inventory accounting background

- Prior US accounting experience strongly preferred

- Advanced Excel skills (pivot tables, Vlookups, complex formulas, data analysis)

- Fluent English (written and verbal) - you’ll communicate daily with US team

- Strong understanding of US GAAP, especially inventory/COGS

- Exceptional attention to detail and analytical skills

- Self-directed with strong ownership mentality

- Own laptop/computer capable of running accounting software

- Stable high-speed internet connection for remote work



Preferred Qualifications:

- CPA or equivalent license

- NetSuite experience (primary ERP)

- Manufacturing, retail, or e-commerce inventory experience

- Public accounting background (Big 4 or regional firm)

- Landed cost, freight accounting, or import/export experience

- Shopify, Stripe, or Ramp experience

I'm looking for a long-term, dedicated VA so I can focus on creating. This is not a task-based freelance gig. I want someone who becomes a core part of my operation and grows with me over time.



Who You Are:

  - Detail-oriented, proactive, and a strong communicator

  - Experience supporting a content creator and/or entrepreneur

  - Comfortable with financial tools (QuickBooks, Google Sheets)

  - Self-directed — you don't need to be micromanaged

What You'll Own:

Wave 1 — Admin (Starting immediately):

  - Professional and personal
 management

  - Folder and file organization



Wave 2 — Finances (Month 1):

  - Financial organization and data entry support via QuickBooks and Google Sheets for my LLC

Possible Wave 5 — Brand Support (Late 2026/Early 2027)

  - Future tasks to be determined.



--> Future growth is performance-based. The right candidate could grow into a "right-hand" operations role.



Hours: 

   - This role starts part-time (15–20 hrs/week) with a clear path to full-time as we build systems together. I'm looking for  someone committed to growing with me long-term, not a short-term freelance arrangement.



Availability:

  - I'm based in Chicago (CST) and require a minimum of 3-4 hours of overlap with CST business hours daily. Candidates comfortable working slightly adjusted schedules to accommodate US time zones are strongly preferred.



Tools We Use:

Compensation:
