title: Content & Growth Operator (Founder Support)
description:
About Saffron Road



Saffron Road is an Australian fashion brand creating beautiful, comfortable clothing designed for real women and real life.



Our brand is built around community. Much of our content comes from styling sessions, customer conversations, and live videos where we share ideas, outfits, and stories.



We are a small, focused team and we prefer to stay lean. Instead of hiring multiple specialists, we are looking for one capable person who enjoys running systems, taking initiative, and working closely with a founder.



The Role



We are looking for someone who can help turn our **live videos and brand content into a consistent stream of social media posts**.



You will work directly with the founder and help keep our content engine running smoothly — editing videos, posting content, identifying what performs well, and helping reuse winning content for advertising.



This role suits someone who enjoys **content creation, social media, and improving systems.**



 Your Responsibilities



Video Editing & Content Repurposing



* Review long-form videos (such as
 or Instagram Lives)

* Identify interesting 
nts and styling tips

* Edit these into short videos for:



  * Instagram Reels

  * TikTok

  *
 posts

* Add captions, hooks and simple graphics

* Create multiple short clips from each long video



Social Media Management



* Schedule and post daily content across:



  * Instagram

  *

  * TikTok

* Write captions based on guidance from the founder

* Maintain a consistent posting schedule



Content Performance Tracking



* Monitor which posts perform best

* Identify posts that could be reused or repurposed

* Maintain a simple tracker of views and engagement



 Ads Support



We run simple ad campaigns rather than complex media buying.



Tasks include:



* Identifying strong organic posts that could work as ads

* Uploading posts into
 Ads Manager

* Duplicating existing ads

* Monitoring basic results



 Shopify Video Support



* Upload short videos to Shopify products using the Tolstoy app

* Organise and label video content for easy reuse



Skills & Experience



**Essential**



* Strong video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar)

* Understanding of short-form video content

* Good written English

* Ability to work independently

* Strong attention to detail



**Nice to Have**



* Experience with
 Ads Manager

* Shopify experience

* Familiarity with TikTok or Instagram trends



Why This Role Is Different



You will work directly with the founder of the brand and help run the content system behind the business.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys **taking ownership, improving processes, and growing with a brand long term.**



How to Apply



Please include:



1. A short introduction about yourself

2. Examples of videos you have edited (Reels or TikTok)

3. The editing software you use

4. Your expected monthly salary per hour and per month.



Shortlisted applicants may be asked to complete a **short editing test** using one of our live videos.



We are looking for someone who wants to become a **trusted right-hand support to the founder.**

you will also need to document your workflows in notion.

title: AI Automation Engineer
description:
About role:



Sofia Health is a growing tech platform in the health & wellness space. We are looking for an experienced AI Automation Engineer who can build AI agents, develop automations, write scripts, and integrate APIs to improve our internal systems, workflows, and customer experience.



This is NOT a beginner role.



We are looking for someone who has real, hands-on experience building automations with AI + code, connecting platforms, and deploying systems that run reliably in production. You will work directly with the CEO and our engineering team to create internal AI tools, streamline processes, and build systems that remove manual work across the company.



* RESPONSIBILITIES:

You will be responsible for designing, building, and maintaining AI-powered systems, including:



AI Agents & Workflows:

- Build, deploy, and maintain AI agents for internal operations (provider tagging, onboarding, support tools, content workflows, etc.)

- Train models and optimize prompts for reliability and accuracy

- Build autonomous or semi-autonomous agents that perform multi-step tasks



Automation & Integrations:

- Build automations using Python, JavaScript, 
, Zapier, or custom code

- Create integrations between Sofia Health and third-party platforms (Stripe, Google Calendar,
 systems, podcast tools, CRM, etc.)

- Develop custom API workflows and write scripts for repetitive tasks

- Troubleshoot broken integrations, rate limits, and edge cases



Engineering & System Support:

- Write clean, maintainable scripts for automation tasks

- Build internal dashboards and tools where needed

- Work with our engineering team to design system architectures for AI-driven workflows

- Document processes, logic, and technical flows clearly



Continuous Improvement:

- Identify opportunities to automate manual processes

- Proactively bring ideas for new AI tools or system improvements

- Help design scalable AI workflows as the company grows



* REQUIREMENTS: 

You must have REAL experience in the following:



Technical Skills (Required):

- Strong experience with AI tools & OpenAI API

- Ability to build multi-step AI agents

- Strong Python or JavaScript scripting skills

- Experience with REST APIs (auth, webhooks, tokens, rate limits)

- Experience with 
 or Zapier

- Building internal automations that run in production

- Experience integrating tools like Stripe, Google Calendar, CRMs, Notion,
 platforms, etc.

- Strong debugging and problem-solving skills



Soft Skills:

- Extremely detail-oriented

- Strong documentation habits

- Can manage entire projects independently

- Fast learner, proactive thinker

- Comfortable working with ambiguity and building systems from scratch

- Reliable, organized, and comfortable with fast-moving tasks



Bonus Skills (Nice to Have):

- Experience with Django or other web frameworks

- Experience with LangChain or similar frameworks

- Experience with workflow mapping

- Experience in marketplace or SaaS environments



* WHO THIS ROLE IS PERFECT FOR

Someone who:

 ? loves building automations

 ? enjoys solving complex operational problems with AI

 ? has experience deploying scripts or agents that run reliably

 ? wants stability and a long-term full-time role

 ? thrives in a fast-moving startup environment



* WORK ENVIRONMENT

Fully remote

Flexible schedule (with overlap in US morning hours preferred)

Long-term career growth potential

Work directly with leadership

Opportunity to shape AI systems for the entire company





* WHY WORK WITH US

At Sofia Health, you’ll help build AI systems that power a fast-growing platform reaching thousands of wellness professionals and clients. Your work will directly shape how we automate, scale, and innovate.

If you’re excited to build real AI systems that solve real problems, we want you on our team.



**HOW TO APPLY

If this role feels like the right fit for you and you’re ready to apply,

Please complete our job application form:

title: GoHighLevel (GHL) Automation & Funnel Assistant
description:
GoHighLevel Automation & Operations Assistant (Remote)



About the Role



I’m a Canadian Naturopathic Doctor who runs an online thyroid program and educational workshops. My team is growing, and I’m looking for someone who is comfortable working inside GoHighLevel (GHL) to help manage automations, funnels, and
 workflows.



This role focuses primarily on maintaining and updating existing systems in GoHighLevel. We run 1 to 2 webinars, challenges, or workshops each month, and a key part of this role is updating the funnels and automations for those events. This includes adjusting dates, updating
s, checking tags, and ensuring the automation runs correctly.



In addition to maintaining existing systems, you may also help build or improve funnels and landing pages when new workshops, programs, or marketing initiatives are launched.



Hours will vary depending on the month. Some months may have more work during workshops, while others may be lighter. You will be paid hourly for the time worked.



I’m hoping to hire someone who can start immediately or within the next 1–2 weeks.

________________________________________

Core Responsibilities



GoHighLevel System Management

• Update dates for workshops and challenges

• Duplicate and update funnels for new events

• Maintain tagging structure (for example, tracking the month and year of registrations)

• Check automations to ensure
s and workflows run properly



Replay Management

• Download Zoom recordings after workshops

• Upload recordings to YouTube (unlisted)

• Embed replay videos on landing pages in GoHighLevel

• Post the replay in the private
 group

• Update replay
 links



 & Automation Support

• Upload written
s into GoHighLevel

• Insert correct links and videos

• Test
s and automations before sending



General Funnel Maintenance

• Update landing page text or links when needed

• Check that all pages and forms are working properly

• Flag any technical issues quickly

________________________________________

Skills Required

• Hands-on experience working inside GoHighLevel

• Ability to build or modify landing pages and funnels in GoHighLevel, including marketing pages and program funnels

• Experience managing funnels and automations

• Experience supporting webinar, workshop, or challenge funnels

• Familiarity with GHL workflows, triggers, and tagging systems

• Comfortable updating
 sequences, landing pages, and tagging structures

• Highly detail-oriented and organized

• Strong written English

________________________________________

Bonus Skills (Helpful but not required)

• Experience working with membership areas or gated content in GoHighLevel

• Experience integrating payments or contracts into funnels

• Familiarity with webinar or challenge launches in online education businesses

• Ability to troubleshoot automations or workflow errors

• Experience organizing tagging systems or CRM data

• Experience building membership areas or programs in GoHighLevel that include login access and payment integration

________________________________________

Position Details

• This is a long-term role with a growing company

• Work is hourly and task-based with no monthly retainer

• There will be recurring work each month updating webinar, challenge, or workshop funnels (typically 1–2 events per month)

• Additional hours may be available when new funnels, landing pages, or marketing projects are created

• Looking for someone who is comfortable with variable hours depending on projects

________________________________________

Work Structure

• Remote

• Hourly pay (hours tracked with Clockify or similar)

• Flexible schedule for most tasks

• On workshop days, the replay must be uploaded and posted between approximately 1 pm ET and no later than 6:30 pm ET, so the replay
 can go out at 7 pm ET

________________________________________

To Apply

Please include the following in your application:

1. A short description of your GoHighLevel experience

2. A link to a landing page or funnel you helped build in GoHighLevel (or screenshots if the page is private)

3. Your hourly rate (USD)

4. Your internet speed (download and upload) and the type of computer you use

5. Your current availability and when you would be able to start

6. Please confirm that you are available to complete replay posting between 1 pm ET and 6:30 pm ET on workshop days



Applications that do not include all 6 items may not be reviewed.



Please apply through OnlineJobs.ph and include the following in the Subject line of your application message:

AUTOMATION – [Your Name]

title: VA (Virtual Assistant) - AI B-Roll Creator (Long-Term, Stable Work!)
description:
I am looking for a dedicated AI B-Roll Creator to join my team. I have a long-term job opportunity, and I want to work with someone reliable for the years to come. I promise you stable work, and if you put in the effort, you will be well rewarded!



As an AI B-Roll Specialist, you will play a critical role in our daily content production pipeline! You will be the bridge between our creative strategy and our video editing team.



While you will be provided with specific content sheets containing the exact text prompts to use, this is not just a simple copy-paste job. AI generation requires a sharp eye for quality, intense attention to detail, and consistency. Your daily workflow will require focus and precision:



Review: Carefully read the daily content sheet and understand the visual goals for our products.



Execute: Run the provided prompts precisely within our AI video generation tools.



Quality Control: Review the AI-generated clips to ensure they actually look good, meet our standards, and match the prompt (discarding any weird or broken AI generations).



Organize: Methodically rename, organize, and upload the approved files into our shared Google Drive so our Video Editors can seamlessly pick them up.



You will be working collectively with a dedicated team of other VAs on these AI video creations every single day. Because our editors rely on your files, your consistency directly impacts the whole team! In return, you will be a highly valued member of our crew. We provide full support, clear guidance, and continuous feedback along the way to ensure you master the process and succeed with us long-term.



HOW TO APPLY (MANDATORY):

Do NOT just send your resume. To be considered for this role, you must complete a quick Trial Task. This shows me you can follow instructions and have the skills I need.



Click this link to see the instructions for the Trial Task:


/document/d/1JruSyuAKVlkyygrHdMzRBNCCoHf37lT8vXicIP_Lhmw/edit?usp=sharing



Once you have completed the 4 trial clips, submit your application to this job post and include your Google Drive link with the completed files

title: Remote Appointment Setter - Outbound Calls
description:
About the Company

We are a fast-growing company in the pavement assessment and maintenance industry, dedicated to helping property owners and businesses maintain safe, high-quality surfaces. Our team is passionate about delivering top-tier solutions, and we are looking for an Appointment Setter to play a key role in our sales process.

About the Role



The Appointment Setter is responsible for outbound prospecting, lead generation, and scheduling pavement assessments with commercial property owners and facility managers. This role directly contributes to sales growth by ensuring a steady pipeline of qualified appointments that lead to service quotes and closed deals. Additionally, you will assist in drafting pavement assessment reports, ensuring accuracy and completeness in post-site evaluations.



Key Responsibilities



Daily Tasks:

Conduct outbound calls to potential clients, introducing them to our pavement assessment services

Respond to inbound inquiries and follow up on leads to schedule appointments



Weekly Tasks:

Strategically schedule pavement assessments with decision-makers

Collaborate with the sales team to ensure seamless transitions from assessment to proposal



Monthly Tasks:

Draft comprehensive pavement assessment reports following field evaluations

Prepare and review performance metrics, tracking outbound calls, appointments booked, and conversion rates

Performance Metrics

Lead Indicators (Proactive Measures for Success):

Outbound calls: Maintain a high volume of strategic outreach to qualified prospects

Quality of conversations: Ensure effective engagement and communication with potential clients

Appointment conversion rate: Monitor the efficiency of turning calls into scheduled assessments

Client relationship development: Foster strong connections to improve long-term success rates

Lag Indicators (Results & Impact):

Appointments booked: Reflects the effectiveness of lead generation efforts

Assessments converted to sales: Measures how successfully booked assessments lead to revenue

Timeliness and accuracy of reports: Ensures all assessments are well-documented for the sales team

Client satisfaction and feedback: Tracks the overall experience of customers throughout the process

What We’re Looking For



Proactive mindset: Takes initiative and seeks out opportunities



Results-driven: Motivated by goals and consistently strives to exceed them



Excellent communicator: Engages prospects, builds relationships, and presents value clearly



Highly organized: Manages follow-ups, schedules appointments efficiently, and meets deadlines



Adaptable and resilient: Thrives in a fast-paced environment and embraces new challenges



Team-oriented: Works closely with sales and leadership to drive company success



Why Join Us?



Be part of a growing company with opportunities for advancement

Competitive base salary plus performance-based bonuses

Work in a high-impact role where your efforts directly drive business success

Remote position with flexibility and autonomy



Apply Today

If you’re a motivated sales professional who excels in outbound prospecting and appointment setting, we want to hear from you. Apply now and take the next step in your career.



Application Instructions (Please Read Carefully):

To be considered for this position, you must follow these instructions exactly:



1. Begin your application with the word “Rhino.”

2.  Tell us your favorite productivity tool and why you like it.

3. Attach or link a short video (1 minutes) where you introduce yourself, share your background, and tell us why you think you’d be a great fit for this role.

title: Junior Paid Ads Operations Specialist
description:
POSITION

Junior Paid Ads Operations Specialist (Google & Meta Ads)



ABOUT INUMIN MEDIA



Inumin Media is a digital marketing agency that manages advertising campaigns for small and medium-sized businesses. Our clients advertise primarily on Google Ads and
 Ads.



We are building structured internal systems for managing ad accounts and are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Junior Paid Ads Operations Specialist who can follow processes, execute tasks, and document work clearly.



This role is ideal for someone early in their career who wants to grow into a full media buyer over time.



You will be trained on our systems and workflows.



–––––––––––––––––––



IMPORTANT — READ BEFORE APPLYING



This is a process-driven role.



You will be trained on our internal systems and SOPs. Your job is to follow the process, complete tasks on time, and document what you are doing.



This is not a freelance “run ads your own way” position.



We value:



• reliability

• communication

• attention to detail

• accountability



more than previous experience.



–––––––––––––––––––



WORK SCHEDULE



This role will begin part-time.



• Starting schedule: 20 hours per week

• Must be available to work during Alberta, Canada business hours (9AM -1PM)



After a successful trial period and consistent performance, there will be opportunities to move into a full-time role (40 hours per week).



We are looking for someone who wants a long-term position, not short-term freelance work.



Non-Negotiables (Read This Twice)



• You show up on time, every day

• You meet deadlines without reminders

• You communicate early if something might slip

• You invoice on time, every time

• You do not disappear, sleep in, or go quiet without notice

• You take ownership of mistakes and fix them quickly





Work Style (This Matters)



• You value structure over flexibility

• You prefer clarity over guessing

• You close loops

• You ask questions early, not after deadlines

• You understand that operations work requires consistency

• You are comfortable with more check-ins during the first 30 days





Schedule



• Part-time for the first 3 months (probation)

• Transition to full-time only after reliability is proven

• Required overlap: 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM Edmonton, Alberta (MST)

• You must adjust your start time during Daylight Savings

• Monday to Friday





Compensation



• Starting at $5.50-$6.50 USD per hour (part-time)

• Paid bi-weekly

• Independent contractor role

• No 13th-month pay

• No employee benefits



–––––––––––––––––––



WHAT YOU WILL DO



You will help manage advertising campaigns across Google Ads and Meta Ads.



Campaign Setup Support



• Assist with Google Ads and
 Ads campaign setup

• Build campaigns following our internal checklist

• Upload keywords, audiences, creatives, and extensions

• Configure campaign structure based on instructions



Tracking & Technical Setup



• Assist with installing tracking codes

• Help configure events in Google Tag Manager and GA4

• Test conversions to ensure tracking is working

• Document tracking setups



Campaign Monitoring & Optimization



• Monitor campaign performance

• Flag issues or anomalies

• Implement optimization changes based on internal strategy

• Update bids, budgets, targeting, and ads



Reporting & Documentation



• Maintain weekly account notes

• Document optimization actions and strategy updates

• Prepare performance summaries for internal review

• Maintain clear records so we can answer client questions about past performance



Asset Creation



You will also assist with producing marketing assets used in campaigns.



This may include:



• Creating ad graphics and simple creatives

• Producing social media ad variations

• Editing images or short video clips for ads

• Creating visual variations for A/B testing



Basic design tools such as Canva or similar tools will be used. Training will be provided.



Internal Communication



• Notify the team if landing pages, creatives, or technical fixes are required

• Report blockers immediately

• Provide updates without needing to be asked



–––––––––––––––––––



TOOLS YOU WILL WORK WITH



You will work with tools such as:



• Google Ads

• Meta Ads Manager

• Google Tag Manager

• Google Analytics (GA4)

• Looker Studio

• Canva

• Slack

• Asana



Experience with these tools is helpful but not required. Training will be provided.



–––––––––––––––––––



REQUIREMENTS



• Strong English communication skills

• High attention to detail

• Ability to follow step-by-step processes

• Organized and reliable

• Comfortable learning technical tools

• Stable internet connection

• Ability to work during Alberta, Canada business hours



–––––––––––––––––––



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF



• You prefer working completely independently without process

• You struggle to provide updates

• You often miss deadlines

• You are working multiple full-time jobs



–––––––––––––––––––



WHAT WE VALUE MOST



We value people who:



• communicate clearly

• take ownership of tasks

• ask questions early

• stay organized

• follow through on commitments



Experience can be taught. Reliability cannot.



–––––––––––––––––––



TO APPLY



Please send the following:

 1. Your resume / CV

 2. A 1–2 minute video introducing yourself

 3. A short explanation of why you want to learn paid advertising

 4. A link to your internet speed test

 5. Confirm you can work during Alberta, Canada hours



Applications without a video introduction will not be reviewed.



“Please include the word OPTIMIZE in the first line of your application so we know you read the full job description.”

title: Senior Market Specialist / Professional Trader – Signal Validation Partner
description:
Overview



We are looking for a highly experienced trader or market specialist to assist in monitoring and validating signals from an established trading signal platform.



This position is NOT suitable for beginner traders.



We are seeking a professional-level trader who has several years of real trading experience, strong technical analysis skills, and the discipline to evaluate high-probability setups across major markets.



The successful candidate will work with us to filter, validate, and manage signals, improving overall trading performance.



This is a commission-based collaboration with profit-sharing and potential long-term partnership.



Key Responsibilities



• Monitor signals from an established signal platform

• Validate trades using advanced technical analysis

• Filter low-probability trades and identify high-quality setups

• Provide market insights and trade timing guidance

• Apply strict risk management principles

• Assist in optimizing signal performance



Markets may include:



• Forex

• Gold (XAUUSD)

• Silver

• Oil

• Major indices



Mandatory Requirements (Applicants without these will not be considered)



Applicants must meet ALL of the following:



• Minimum 3+ years active trading experience

• Proven experience trading Forex or commodities

• Advanced understanding of technical analysis and market structure

• Regular use of TradingView or MetaTrader platforms

• Experience reviewing or validating trading signals

• Ability to demonstrate consistent trading discipline



Preferred Experience



• Experience running or working with a signal service

• Familiarity with multi-timeframe analysis

• Experience trading Gold or high-liquidity instruments

• Understanding of risk models and position sizing



Compensation



This role is based on:



• Commission sharing

• Profit participation

• Potential long-term trading partnership



Compensation will be discussed with shortlisted candidates only.

Payment: Bi-weekly via PayPal

Review: Performance review & possible increase after 3 months



About the Role



Enet Auto Parts is a Toronto-based automotive parts company serving customers across North America. We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Order Processor / Operations Assistant to manage daily order flow, shipping coordination, and customer updates.



This is a long-term, stable night-shift role suited for someone who is organized, comfortable working independently, and confident communicating in English.

title: Podcast Editor and Thumbnail Designer
description:
YouTube Podcast Video Editor + Thumbnail Designer



We are looking for a talented video editor to help edit our weekly podcast and design YouTube thumbnails.



Our show is called Sorta Sophisticated, a podcast focused on culture, ideas, and interesting conversations.



We are looking for someone who understands YouTube pacing, storytelling, and clickable thumbnails.



This is a part-time, long-term role with one episode per week.



Responsibilities



Each week you will:



• Edit one long-form podcast episode (~45 minutes)

• Remove pauses, filler words, and dead air

• Improve pacing and conversation flow

• Balance audio levels between speakers

• Clean up audio if needed

• Add subtle zoom cuts or visual emphasis when appropriate

• Export the final YouTube-ready video



You will also:



• Design one YouTube thumbnail for the episode



Thumbnails should be:



• Clear and easy to understand

• High contrast and attention-grabbing

• Optimized for YouTube click-through rate



Editing Style



We prefer a clean, professional podcast editing style similar to modern YouTube interview podcasts.



This means:



• Natural pacing

• Clean cuts

• Minimal effects

• Subtle visual movement when appropriate



Avoid excessive transitions or flashy editing.



Requirements



• Experience editing long-form YouTube videos or podcasts

• Experience designing YouTube thumbnails

• Strong understanding of YouTube pacing and storytelling

• Proficiency with Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or DaVinci Resolve

• Experience with Photoshop, Canva, or similar design tools

• Ability to meet weekly deadlines

• Reliable internet connection



Compensation



• $500 per month

• 1 podcast episode per week

• Opportunity for long-term work if performance is strong



How to Apply



Apply through the form below:







You will be asked to provide:



• Resume

• Examples of videos you have edited

• Examples of YouTube thumbnails you have created



Top candidates will be invited to complete a short editing test before final selection.

title: Unity Developer — Creative Iteration (Mobile Gaming) Full-Time | Remote | Monthly Contract
description:
We make mobile games and we're looking for a Unity developer to join our creative production team. Your job isn't building games from scratch — it's taking scenes from our existing title that have already proven themselves in ad creatives, and producing a high volume of polished iterations: new layouts, fresh angles, visual tweaks, and gameplay variations that we can test as new ad content.

It's repetitive work by nature, but the best person for this role will bring genuine creative instinct to every iteration — spotting what makes a scene compelling and finding new ways to push it further. If you can go beyond the brief and conceive your own original concepts that hook a viewer in the first two seconds and keep them watching, there's real room to grow with us.

You'll be working with an existing codebase and will have access to Claude Code (AI coding assistant) to handle the heavy lifting, so you're not starting from scratch on every task.



What You'll Be Doing



-     Taking high-performing Unity scenes and producing multiple creative iterations — new camera angles, layouts, lighting, 

      and visual treatments

-     Recording and uploading large volumes of raw gameplay footage for use across our creative pipeline

-     Building and applying interesting shaders to add visual polish and variety

-     Introducing new mechanics or design ideas within existing scene frameworks

-     Pitching and executing your own original scene concepts — exhilarating, captivating footage that retains viewers 

      and performs as ad content

-     Working within an established codebase — reading, extending, and modifying existing scripts confidently

-     Using Claude Code to accelerate development and handle boilerplate work



What We're Looking For



-     Solid Unity experience with a strong portfolio — this is the most important thing

-     Comfortable working inside an existing project and codebase rather than building from zero

-     Experience writing custom shaders (Shader Graph or HLSL)

-     A creative eye — you should be able to look at a scene and have ideas, not just wait to be told what to change

-     Self-directed and productive working remotely with minimal hand-holding

-     Comfortable with repetitive, output-focused work without letting quality slip



Nice to Have



-     Video editing skills — even basic ability to capture and cut together scene recordings is a bonus

-     Familiarity with mobile game ad creative trends (what hooks work, what visual styles perform)

-     Experience with AI tools in your development workflow



Salary & Growth

-     Starting salary is based on experience and portfolio. We review performance after an initial period, and those 

      who  demonstrate strong output and creative initiative can expect salary progression — this is a role where the right 

      person  can grow quickly.



To Apply



-     Share your portfolio — Unity projects, shaders, or anything that shows your work in action. Video or GIF demos of 

      scenes or effects are ideal. Tell us briefly about a project where you had to work within someone else's 

      existing codebase.

title: Real Estate Virtual Assistant — Transaction Coordination & Listing Admin
description:
ABOUT US



Mathew Lendrum is a REALTOR with Coldwell Banker First Ottawa, based in Perth, Ontario, Canada. He specializes in rural and recreational properties across Eastern Ontario — cottages, waterfront lots, hobby farms, and country homes. At any given time Mathew manages 20-30 active listings.



This is a small but high-volume operation. You will work alongside Mathew and his AI assistant, Lucy, who manages data, automation, and back-end systems so that you can focus on the human side of the business.



THE ROLE



This is a full-time, long-term remote position. We are not looking for a freelancer juggling multiple clients — we need someone fully committed to this team.



- Hours: 40 hours per week, Monday through Friday

- Core hours: Must be available 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM EST daily (remaining 4 hours flexible)

- Start date: Within 2 to 4 weeks of offer

- Trial period: 2-week paid trial before transitioning to full employment



RESPONSIBILITIES



Transaction Coordination (~35%)

- Track all conditions, deadlines, and critical dates across active transactions

- Chase documents from lawyers, lenders, home inspectors, and other parties

- Communicate professionally with lawyers, mortgage lenders, and brokerages

- Manage the condition calendar and send daily deadline reminders

- Coordinate possession day logistics including key handoffs and utility transfers



Listing Administration (~25%)

- Book photographers, videographers, and stagers

- Order lawn signs, lockboxes, and marketing materials

- Prepare MLS listing data sheets from property notes

- Monitor ShowingTime for showing requests and feedback

- Update the Listings Database spreadsheet



 & Calendar Management (~15%)

- Triage the general inbox and flag urgent items

- Draft professional
 responses for review and approval

- Manage showings and appointments across multiple Google Calendars



Social Media & Marketing (~15%)

- Create and schedule 3-4 posts per week on
 and Instagram

- Use provided templates and brand guidelines

- Create basic graphics using Canva templates

- Write new listing announcements, sold celebrations, and market updates

- Monitor engagement and respond to comments/messages



CRM & Client Communication (~10%)

- Log all significant interactions in Notion CRM

- Update contact records and monitor stale contacts list

- Send routine follow-up messages using approved templates



REQUIREMENTS — MUST HAVE



- 2+ years of real estate virtual assistant experience (North American market strongly preferred)

- Excellent written English

- Google Workspace proficiency: Gmail, Drive, Sheets, Calendar

- Experience with Notion or comparable CRM/project management platform

- Social media management experience 
 Business Suite, Instagram)

- Reliable high-speed internet and quiet dedicated workspace

- Own computer with webcam and microphone

- Available during core EST hours: 9-5 or 8-4 EST preferred



NICE TO HAVE



- Canadian real estate transaction experience

- Dialpad or VoIP platform experience

- ShowingTime or comparable showing management system

- Canva or graphic design skills

- Experience working alongside AI tools or automated workflows



WHAT MAKES THIS ROLE UNIQUE



Most real estate agents run their operations manually. Mathew has invested significantly in AI infrastructure. Lucy handles the behind-the-scenes work: syncing data, processing
s, and generating reports.



The division is clear: Lucy manages most data and automation, you manage people and execution. If you are comfortable working alongside AI tools and see them as productivity multipliers, you will thrive here.



COMPENSATION



- Base rate: $8-10 USD/hour (40 hrs/week)

- 2-week paid trial at $8 USD/hour

- Performance review at 6 months with potential increase to $10-12 USD/hour

- Payment via Wise, bi-monthly

- Long-term position — we are building a team, not cycling through contractors



SCREENING QUESTIONS — PLEASE ANSWER ALL FIVE IN YOUR APPLICATION



*AI use is expected, but we will know if you simply copy/paste results from an AI service. We want someone who will use AI to augment their existing skills, not replace them.



Q1 (VIDEO — REQUIRED): Record a 2-minute Loom video (
 — free). Introduce yourself, then walk us through how you handled a real transaction from accepted offer to closing. Name the tools you used, the roles/people you coordinated with, and one thing that almost went wrong. If you don't have RE experience, walk us through a complex project you managed with multiple deadlines and stakeholders. Paste the Loom link in your application.



Q2: What CRM and project management tools have you used professionally? Describe your experience level with each.



Q3: It's Thursday morning. A financing condition expires Sunday. The lender hasn't sent the mortgage commitment letter. You've
ed twice with no response. The buyer's agent isn't returning calls. Walk us through exactly what you do.



Q4: What timezone are you in? What hours are you available during EST business hours? How available are you for urgent tasks outside scheduled hours?



Q5: Write an Instagram post for my listing at 422 Markdale Terrace, Ottawa (You can find it on 
). Write it as you would actually publish it — don't describe what you'd write, write it.

title: Full-time VA: Content Creation, Marketing, & Shopify
description:
$450 USD / month | 40 hrs/week | Long-term



We're hiring a full-time Marketing VA to support a growing e-commerce brand. The brand has strong traction on Amazon and an established Shopify store, but needs to expand its Shopify presence through better content, website optimization, and
 marketing. You will be the marketing engine.



This is not a task-follower role. We need someone who can learn a brand deeply, think creatively, and run with direction. You'll receive close coaching and feedback (especially early on), but the expectation is that you take initiative and grow into someone who can suggest ideas, not just execute them.





CORE OF THE ROLE (what you'll do most)

- Create marketing content: graphics and short-form video in Canva for Social Media

- Source UGC and build out a creative asset library

- Write or support blog content

- Help optimize website pages (design, copy, conversion)

- Help build and manage
 marketing flows





SUPPORTING RESPONSIBILITIES

- Coordinate with an existing social media team on content and assets

- Communicate with an Amazon agency as needed (not managing Amazon directly)

- Daily reporting and project tracking

- General administrative and operational support as needed



Beyond the list, what matters most is how you see. Can you look at a brand's Instagram and immediately spot what's missing? Can you take a vague brief and turn it into something a client would actually post? Do you think about why content works, not just what looks pretty? That's what we're hiring for.



YOU'RE A GREAT FIT IF YOU

- Have strong written and spoken English

- Have a good eye for design and brand aesthetics

- Can look at a website and identify what's working and what's not

- Are comfortable in Canva (both graphics and video)

- Think in terms of brand, audience, and story, not just "make a post"

- Can work independently once direction is clear

- Are organized, detail-oriented, and proactive

- Are excited to use AI tools to work faster and smarter



If you're earlier in your career but have a strong creative eye and a hunger to learn, you're welcome to apply. We will train you on the tools.



TOOLS YOU'LL USE (training provided where needed)

Canva, Slack, Asana, ChatGPT, Shopify, Klaviyo, Google Workspace



SCHEDULE & PAY

- $450 USD / month

- 40 hours per week

- Initial schedule: 9 AM to 5 PM MST (11 PM to 7 AM PH time) for the first 12 weeks, then we'll evaluate flexibility together

- Weekly pay for the first 60 days

- 13th month pay

- Paid time off + Philippine holidays



WHAT TO EXPECT

You won't be managed directly by the brand owner for your professional development. Hazelize (the agency placing this role) provides regular coaching, performance feedback, and ongoing training. The brand owner gives direction and feedback on the work itself, and you'll communicate with them daily. Think of it as having two layers of support: the client tells you what to work on, andwe helps you get better at it.



HIRING PROCESS

1. Application review

2. A few rounds of interview questions via

3. Paid test projects (you will be compensated regardless of whether you're selected)

4. If you're the right fit, you'll receive an employment offer letter and we'll get started



HOW TO APPLY

Use this subject line exactly: MKTVA-TLBRN -- Your Name



Include:

1. A short paragraph explaining why you're a strong fit. Describe your experience, don't just list it

2. A screenshot from speedtest.net

3. Confirmation you can work the required hours

4. 2 to 3 examples (actual links to real digital assets I can view) of marketing content you've created (Canva designs, social posts, videos,
 campaigns, whatever shows your best work) -- ensure the permissions of any links are set to public

5. Your resume

6. Use 6 Apply Points

7. Your favorite TV show as a kid



DO NOT contact me via direct
, LinkedIn, or any other method outside of Onlinejobs.ph or you will be immediately disqualified. Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

title: AI Video Editor
description:

About Us



We're a music label. Our visual world is built at the intersection of AI-generated imagery, cinematic editing, and a premium brand identity.



We're a small, fast-moving team: Founder, SMM Manager, AI Image Creator, Sound Engineer, Coordinator, and Video Editor. You'd be the Video Editor.



___



The Role



You'll turn AI-generated images and brand assets into short-form video content for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts. The majority of your work is vertical reels (9:16) — assembling visuals from our AI Creator, adding text overlays, syncing to music, and delivering polished content that looks like it belongs on a major label's feed.



You'll receive detailed briefs from our SMM Manager specifying the audio track, pacing, text overlays, subtitle style, and emotional direction for each piece. Your job is to execute them at a high level.



___



What You'll Be Doing



- Editing 10-14 polished short-form reels per bi-weekly cycle (7-55 seconds each)

- Producing 20-30 quick test reels per month for A/B testing on TikTok (simpler edits, fast turnaround)

- Working with AI-generated images as visual bases — animating, adding motion, transitions, text

- Placing text overlays precisely: hooks, educational lines, lyrics, CTAs — all in English

- Matching mood archetypes: some pieces are bold and powerful, others intimate and meditative

- Syncing edits to music — our tracks are the audio backbone of every piece

- Delivering ready-to-post MP4 files via shared iCloud

- Later: producing AI music videos for YouTube (3-minute cinematic clips in 16:9) — this is the advanced tier



___



Must-Have Skills



Cinematography fundamentals. This is non-negotiable. You need to understand camera work — framing, shot types (wide/medium/close-up/detail), lighting direction, lens behaviour (bokeh, flares), camera movement motivation. Even though we work with AI-generated images, the quality of what you produce depends entirely on whether you can "see" like a camera operator. Without this, AI-generated frames will look generic.



Video editing proficiency. CapCut, Premiere, After Effects, DaVinci — whatever your tool, you need to be fast and precise with cuts, transitions, text animation, and color grading.



Text overlay and typography. A large portion of our content is text-on-screen. You need to place text with intention — correct sizing, spacing, timing. We have a defined font system and you'll work within it.



English fluency. All briefs, all text overlays, all captions, and all communication are in English. You need to read briefs accurately, place English text on screen without errors, and feel the rhythm of English phrases to know where to break lines and place emphasis.



Music sync intuition. Every reel is built around an audio track. You need to feel how cuts, text reveals, and transitions land on the beat or between phrases.



___



Nice-to-Have



- Experience with AI image/video generation tools (Midjourney, Higgsfield, Runway, Kling, Heygen)

- Understanding of TikTok/Reels trends and what performs well in short-form

- Experience with motion graphics or After Effects expressions

- Understanding of color theory and brand-consistent color grading



___



How We Work



- You receive a content brief for each piece from our SMM Manager (detailed: audio track, pacing, structure, text overlays, subtitle style, emotional direction)

- Our AI Image Creator delivers base images to shared iCloud before you start

- You edit and deliver finished MP4s back to iCloud

- Turnaround: we work in bi-weekly cycles — you'll get all briefs at once and deliver across the period

- Communication: async-first, English



___



What We're Looking For in a Person



- Self-directed. You get a brief, you deliver. No hand-holding needed.

- Detail-oriented. One typo in a text overlay, one wrong font, one frame of black at the start of a reel — these things matter to us.

- Brand-sensitive. Our aesthetic is "expensive, infinite, calm, inevitable." Not hustle culture. Not cheap spiritual. If you understand the difference between cinematic editorial and a generic AI Instagram post, we'll get along.

- Fast communicator. If something in the brief is unclear or an asset is missing — say so immediately, don't wait.



___



To Apply



Send us:



1. Portfolio link — 3-5 examples of short-form video editing (TikTok/Reels style). Bonus if any involve AI-generated visuals or music-synced content.

2. Brief response — in 2-3 sentences, tell us: what makes a reel feel cinematic vs. generic?

3. Availability — how many hours per week you can commit, and your timezone.
